example.cn: 还有更叫人生气的呢。上个星期六我找他陪我去看电影，他很高兴地答应了，可是八点的电影，我等到八点一刻他还没到。打他手机，才知道他跑到另一家电影院去了。这些虽然都是小事儿，但是叫我非常生气，觉得他根本不在乎我。真想跟他分手。
example.py: hái yǒu gèng jiào rén shēngqì de ne shàng ge xīngqīliù wǒ zhǎo tā péi wǒ qù kàn diànyǐng tā hěn gāoxìng de dāying le kěshì bā diǎn de diànyǐng wǒ děng dào bā diǎn yí kè tā hái méi dào dǎ tā shǒujī cái zhīdào tā pǎo dào lìng yì jiā diànyǐngyuàn qù le zhèxiē suīrán dōu shì xiǎoshìr dànshì jiào wǒ fēicháng shēngqì juéde tā gēnběn bù zàihu wǒ zhēn xiǎng gēn tā fēnshǒu
example.translation: There's something even more infuriating. Last Saturday, I asked him to go to a movie with me. He happily agreed. But for the 8:00 movie, I waited until 8:15 and he still hadn't arrived. I called his cell phone, only to find out he had gone to another movie theater. Although these are all small things, they make me very angry. I feel like he doesn't care about me at all. I really want to break up with him.

example.translation: You are busy today. Are you busy tomorrow?

example.translation: You are busy today. Are you busy tomorrow?

example.translation: I'm busy today, but I won't be busy tomorrow.

example.translation: I'm busy today, but I won't be busy tomorrow.

example.cn: 明天我请你吃晚饭,怎么样?

example.translation: How about I treat you to dinner tomorrow?

example.cn: 你为什么请我吃饭?

example.translation: Why are you inviting me to dinner?

example.translation: Why are you inviting me to dinner?

example.cn: 因为明天是高文中的生日。

example.translation: Because tomorrow is Gao Wenzhong's birthday.

example.cn: 还请我的同学李友。

example.translation: I'm also inviting my classmate Li You.

example.cn: 要多付一个月的房租当押金,搬出去的时候还给你。
example.py: Yào duō fù yí ge yuè de fángzū dāng yājīn, bān chūqù de shíhou huán gěi nǐ.
example.translation: You need to pay one extra month's rent as a security deposit, which will be returned to you when you move out.

example.cn: 还请我的同学李友。
example.py: Hái qǐng wǒ de tóngxué Lǐ Yǒu.
example.translation: I'm also inviting my classmate Li You.

example.translation: That's great! I know Li You. She is also my friend. What time tomorrow?

example.translation: Tomorrow morning I have two classes, and at three in the afternoon I have to give an exam to the second-year class.

example.cn: 老师，今天下午您有时间吗？

example.translation: Teacher, are you free this afternoon?

example.cn: 我想问您几个问题。

example.cn: 出租汽车太贵，我开车送你去吧。

example.translation: Taxis are too expensive. I'll drive you there.

example.translation: Tomorrow morning I have two classes, and at three in the afternoon I have to give an exam to the second-year class.

example.translation: So when can I meet with you?

example.py: hē kāfēi méi wèntí nà wǒ shénme shíhou gēn nǐ jiànmiàn nǐ jīntiān wǎnshang yǒu kòngr ma
example.translation: Coffee, no problem. So when can I meet with you? Are you free tonight?

example.translation: Li You, how did you do on last week's exam?

example.translation: Because you helped me review, I did pretty well.

example.translation: Okay, give me a pen and a piece of paper. What character should we write?

example.cn: 姑妈退休前省吃俭用存了一笔钱，要留给孙子孙女上大学用。
example.py: Gūmā tuìxiū qián shěng chī jiǎn yòng cúnle yī bǐ qián, yào liú gěi sūnzi sūnnü shàng dàxué yòng.
example.translation: Before she retired, my aunt saved a sum of money by being frugal, intending to leave it for her grandchildren to use for college.

example.cn: 你教我怎么写“懂”字吧。
example.py: Nǐ jiāo wǒ zěnme xiě “dǒng” zì ba.
example.translation: You teach me how to write the character 'dǒng'.

example.cn: 第七课的语法很容易,我都懂,可是生词太多,汉字也有一点儿难。
example.py: Dì qī kè de yǔfǎ hěn róngyì, wǒ dōu dǒng, kěshì shēngcí tài duō, Hànzì yě yǒu yìdiǎnr nán.
example.translation: The grammar for Lesson 7 is very easy, I understand it all. But there are too many new words, and the Chinese characters are a bit difficult too.

example.cn: 白英爱，你平常来得很早，今天怎么这么晚？

example.translation: Bai Ying'ai, you usually come very early. How come you are so late today?

example.translation: I was preparing for my Chinese class yesterday. I didn't go to bed until four o'clock in the morning. Did you go to bed late, too?

example.cn: 因为王朋帮我练习中文，所以我功课做得很快。
example.py: Yīnwèi Wáng Péng bāng wǒ liànxí Zhōngwén, suǒyǐ wǒ gōngkè zuò de hěn kuài.
example.translation: Because Wang Peng helped me practice Chinese, I finished my homework very quickly.

example.cn: 大家早，现在我们开始上课。第七课你们都预习了吗？
example.py: dà jiā zǎo xiàn zài wǒ men kāi shǐ shàng kè dì qī kè nǐ men dōu yù xí le ma
example.translation: Good morning, everyone. Let's begin class now. Have you all prepared for Lesson 7?

上课.definition: to go to a class, to start a class, to be in class

example.cn: 大家早，现在我们开始上课。
example.py: Dàjiā zǎo, xiànzài wǒmen kāishǐ shàng kè.
example.translation: Good morning, everyone. Let's begin class now.

example.cn: 大家早，现在我们开始上课。
example.py: Dàjiā zǎo, xiànzài wǒmen kāishǐ shàng kè.
example.translation: Good morning, everyone. Let's begin class now.

example.cn: 李友，请你念课文。
example.py: Lǐ Yǒu, qǐng nǐ niàn kèwén.
example.translation: Li You, please read the text.

example.cn: 李友，请你念课文。
example.py: Lǐ Yǒu, qǐng nǐ niàn kèwén.
example.translation: Li You, please read the text.

example.cn: 你昨天晚上听录音了吧？
example.py: Nǐ zuótiān wǎnshang tīng lùyīn le ba?
example.translation: Did you listen to the recording last night?

example.cn: 但是她的朋友昨天晚上帮她学习了。
example.py: Dànshì tā de péngyou zuótiān wǎnshang bāng tā xuéxí le.
example.translation: But her friend helped her study last night.

example.cn: 他是一个男的，很帅，很酷，叫王朋。
example.py: Tā shì yí ge nán de, hěn shuài, hěn kù, jiào Wáng Péng.
example.translation: He's a boy. He's very handsome and cool. His name is Wang Peng.

example.cn: 他是一个男的，很帅，很酷，叫王朋。
example.py: Tā shì yí ge nán de, hěn shuài, hěn kù, jiào Wáng Péng.
example.translation: He's a boy. He's very handsome and cool. His name is Wang Peng.

example.cn: 第一节课是中文，老师教我们发音、生词和语法，也教我们写字，还给了我们一篇新课文，这篇课文很有意思。
example.py: Dì yī jié kè shì Zhōngwén, lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen fāyīn, shēngcí hé yǔfǎ, yě jiāo wǒmen xiě zì, hái gěile wǒmen yī piān xīn kèwén, zhè piān kèwén hěn yǒu yìsi.
example.translation: The first class was Chinese. The teacher taught us pronunciation, new words, and grammar. She also taught us how to write characters and gave us a new text. The text was very interesting.

example.cn: 今天我很忙，很累。
example.py: Jīntiān wǒ hěn máng, hěn lèi.
example.translation: I was very busy and tired today.

example.cn: 早上七点半起床，洗了澡以后就吃早饭。
example.py: zǎo shang qī diǎn bàn qǐ chuáng xǐ le zǎo yǐ hòu jiù chī zǎo fàn
example.translation: I got up at 7:30 in the morning. After taking a shower, I had breakfast.

example.cn: 早上七点半起床，洗了澡以后就吃早饭。
example.py: zǎo shang qī diǎn bàn qǐ chuáng xǐ le zǎo yǐ hòu jiù chī zǎo fàn
example.translation: I got up at 7:30 in the morning. After taking a shower, I had breakfast.

example.cn: 洗了澡以后就吃早饭。
example.py: Xǐ le zǎo yǐhòu jiù chī zǎofàn.
example.translation: After taking a shower, I had breakfast.

example.cn: 我一边吃饭，一边听录音。
example.py: wǒ yìbiān chīfàn yìbiān tīng lùyīn
example.translation: I ate while listening to the audio recording.

example.cn: 九点到教室去上课。
example.py: Jiǔ diǎn dào jiàoshì qù shàngkè.
example.translation: At 9:00, I went to the classroom for class.

example.cn: 老师教我们发音、生词和语法。
example.py: Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen fāyīn, shēngcí hé yǔfǎ.
example.translation: The teacher taught us pronunciation, new words, and grammar.

example.cn: 还给了我们一篇新课文，这篇课文很有意思。
example.py: Hái gěile wǒmen yī piān xīn kèwén, zhè piān kèwén hěn yǒu yìsi.
example.translation: ...and gave us a new text. The text was very interesting.

example.cn: 第二节是电脑课，很难。
example.py: Dì-èr jié shì diànnǎo kè, hěn nán.
example.translation: The second class was computer class. It was very difficult.

example.cn: 第二节是电脑课，很难。
example.py: dì'èr jié shì diànnǎo kè hěn nán
example.translation: The second class was computer class. It was very difficult.

example.cn: 中午我和同学们一起到餐厅去吃午饭。
example.py: Zhōngwǔ wǒ hé tóngxuémen yìqǐ dào cāntīng qù chī wǔfàn.
example.translation: At noon, I went to the cafeteria with my classmates for lunch.

example.cn: 中午我和同学们一起到餐厅去吃午饭。
example.py: Zhōngwǔ wǒ hé tóngxuémen yìqǐ dào cāntīng qù chī wǔfàn.
example.translation: At noon, I went to the cafeteria with my classmates for lunch.

example.cn: 中午我和同学们一起到餐厅去吃午饭。
example.py: Zhōngwǔ wǒ hé tóngxuémen yìqǐ dào cāntīng qù chī wǔfàn.
example.translation: At noon, I went to the cafeteria with my classmates for lunch.

上网.definition: to go online, to surf the internet

example.cn: 下午我到图书馆去上网。
example.py: Xiàwǔ wǒ dào túshūguǎn qù shàngwǎng.
example.translation: In the afternoon, I went to the library to go online.

example.cn: 七点半我去白英爱的宿舍跟她聊天（儿）。
example.py: qī diǎn bàn wǒ qù Bái Yīng'ài de sùshè gēn tā liáotiān er
example.translation: At 7:30, I went to Bai Ying'ai's dorm to chat with her.

example.cn: 到那儿的时候，她正在做功课。
example.py: Dào nàr de shíhou, tā zhèngzài zuò gōngkè.
example.translation: When I got there, she was doing her homework.

example.cn: 到那儿的时候，她正在做功课。
example.py: Dào nàr de shíhou, tā zhèngzài zuò gōngkè.
example.translation: When I got there, she was doing her homework.

example.cn: 睡觉以前，高文中给我打了一个电话，告诉我明天要考试，我说我已经知道了。
example.py: Shuìjiào yǐqián, Gāo Wénzhōng gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà, gàosu wǒ míngtiān yào kǎoshì, wǒ shuō wǒ yǐjīng zhīdào le.
example.translation: Before I went to bed, Gao Wenzhong gave me a call. He told me there would be an exam tomorrow. I said I already knew.

example.cn: 睡觉以前，高文中给我打了一个电话，告诉我明天要考试，我说我已经知道了。
example.py: shuìjiào yǐqián Gāo Wénzhōng gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà gàosu wǒ míngtiān yào kǎoshì wǒ shuō wǒ yǐjīng zhīdào le
example.translation: Before I went to bed, Gao Wenzhong gave me a call. He told me there would be an exam tomorrow. I said I already knew.

example.cn: 睡觉以前，高文中给我打了一个电话，告诉我明天要考试，我说我已经知道了。
example.py: Shuìjiào yǐqián, Gāo Wénzhōng gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà, gàosu wǒ míngtiān yào kǎoshì, wǒ shuō wǒ yǐjīng zhīdào le.
example.translation: Before I went to bed, Gao Wenzhong gave me a call. He told me there would be an exam tomorrow. I said I already knew.

example.cn: 睡觉以前，高文中给我打了一个电话，告诉我明天要考试，我说我已经知道了。
example.py: shuìjiào yǐqián Gāo Wénzhōng gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà gàosu wǒ míngtiān yào kǎoshì wǒ shuō wǒ yǐjīng zhīdào le
example.translation: Before I went to bed, Gao Wenzhong gave me a call. He told me there would be an exam tomorrow. I said I already knew.

example.cn: 一封信
example.py: yī fēng xìn
example.translation: A Letter

example.cn: 一封信
example.py: yī fēng xìn
example.translation: A Letter

example.cn: 你好！好久不见，最近怎么样？
example.py: Nǐ hǎo! Hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn, zuìjìn zěnmeyàng?
example.translation: Hello! Long time no see, how have you been recently?

example.cn: 你好！好久不见，最近怎么样？
example.py: nǐ hǎo hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn zuì jìn zěn me yàng
example.translation: Hello! Long time no see, how have you been recently?

example.cn: 她最爱吃蛋糕。
example.py: Tā zuì ài chī dàngāo.
example.translation: She loves eating cake the most.

example.cn: 你好！好久不见，最近怎么样？
example.py: nǐ hǎo hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn zuì jìn zěn me yàng
example.translation: Hello! Long time no see, how have you been recently?

example.cn: 电脑中心离图书馆很近,就在图书馆和学生活动中心中间。
example.py: diàn nǎo zhōng xīn lí tú shū guǎn hěn jìn jiù zài tú shū guǎn hé xué sheng huó dòng zhōng xīn zhōng jiān
example.translation: The computer center is very close to the library. It's right between the library and the student activity center.

example.cn: 这个学期我很忙，除了专业课以外，还得学中文。
example.py: Zhège xuéqī wǒ hěn máng, chúle zhuānyèkè yǐwài, hái děi xué Zhōngwén.
example.translation: I'm very busy this semester. Besides my major courses, I also have to study Chinese.

example.cn: 这个学期我很忙，除了专业课以外，还得学中文。
example.py: Zhège xuéqī wǒ hěn máng, chúle zhuānyèkè yǐwài, hái děi xué Zhōngwén.
example.translation: I'm very busy this semester. Besides my major courses, I also have to study Chinese.

example.cn: 开始我觉得很难，后来，王朋常常帮我练习中文，就觉得不难了。
example.py: Kāishǐ wǒ juéde hěn nán, hòulái, Wáng Péng chángcháng bāng wǒ liànxí Zhōngwén, jiù juéde bù nán le.
example.translation: At first I thought it was very difficult. Later, Wang Peng often helped me practice Chinese, and then I felt it wasn't difficult anymore.

example.cn: 下个星期六，我们学校有一个音乐会，希望你能来。
example.py: Xià ge xīngqīliù, wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu yí ge yīnyuèhuì, xīwàng nǐ néng lái.
example.translation: Next Saturday, our school is having a concert. I hope you can come.

example.cn: 下个星期六，我们学校有一个音乐会，希望你能来。
example.py: Xià ge xīngqīliù, wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu yí ge yīnyuèhuì, xīwàng nǐ néng lái.
example.translation: Next Saturday, our school is having a concert. I hope you can come.

example.cn: 下个星期六，我们学校有一个音乐会，希望你能来。
example.py: Xià ge xīngqīliù, wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu yí ge yīnyuèhuì, xīwàng nǐ néng lái.
example.translation: Next Saturday, our school is having a concert. I hope you can come.

example.cn: 我用中文写信写得很不好，请别笑我。
example.py: wǒ yòng zhōngwén xiě xìn xiě de hěn bù hǎo qǐng bié xiào wǒ
example.translation: I don't write well in Chinese, please don't laugh at me.

笑.definition: to laugh at, to laugh, to smile

example.cn: 我用中文写信写得很不好，请别笑我。
example.py: Wǒ yòng Zhōngwén xiě xìn xiě de hěn bù hǎo, qǐng bié xiào wǒ.
example.translation: I don't write well in Chinese, please don't laugh at me.

example.cn: 祝好！
example.py: Zhù hǎo!
example.translation: Best wishes!

example.cn: 小姐,您要买什么衣服？
example.py: Xiǎojiě, nín yào mǎi shénme yīfu?
example.translation: Miss, what clothes would you like to buy?

example.cn: 小姐,您要买什么衣服？
example.py: Xiǎojiě, nín yào mǎi shénme yīfu?
example.translation: Miss, what clothes would you like to buy?

件.definition: (measure word for shirts, dresses, jackets, coats, etc.)

example.cn: 我想买一件衬衫。
example.py: wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī jiàn chènshān
example.translation: I'd like to buy a shirt.

example.cn: 我想买一件衬衫。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yí jiàn chènshān.
example.translation: I'd like to buy a shirt.

example.cn: 颜色很好。
example.py: Yánsè hěn hǎo.
example.translation: The color is great.

example.cn: 您喜欢什么颜色的,黄的还是红的？
example.py: Nín xǐhuan shénme yánsè de, huáng de háishì hóng de?
example.translation: What color do you like? Yellow or red?

example.cn: 我喜欢穿红的。
example.py: Wǒ xǐhuan chuān hóng de.
example.translation: I like to wear red.

example.cn: 我喜欢穿红的。
example.py: Wǒ xǐhuan chuān hóng de.
example.translation: I like to wear red.

example.cn: 我还想买一条裤子。
example.py: Wǒ hái xiǎng mǎi yì tiáo kùzi.
example.translation: I'd also like to buy a pair of pants.

example.cn: 中号的。
example.py: Zhōng hào de.
example.translation: Medium.

example.cn: 不要太贵的,也不要太便宜的。
example.py: Bú yào tài guì de, yě bú yào tài piányi de.
example.translation: Not too expensive, and not too cheap either.

example.cn: 如果长短合适的话,我就买。
example.py: Rúguǒ chángduǎn héshì de huà, wǒ jiù mǎi.
example.translation: If the length is suitable, I'll buy it.

example.cn: 颜色很好。如果长短合适的话,我就买。
example.py: yánsè hěn hǎo rúguǒ chángduǎn héshì dehuà wǒ jiù mǎi
example.translation: The color is great. If the length is suitable, I'll buy it.

example.cn: 妈妈这么漂亮,儿子长大一定也很帅。
example.py: Māma zhème piàoliang, érzi zhǎng dà yīdìng yě hěn shuài.
example.translation: The mother is so beautiful, the son will definitely be very handsome when he grows up.

example.cn: 颜色很好。如果长短合适的话,我就买。
example.py: yánsè hěn hǎo rúguǒ chángduǎn héshì dehuà wǒ jiù mǎi
example.translation: The color is great. If the length is suitable, I'll buy it.

example.cn: 如果长短合适的话,我就买。
example.py: Rúguǒ chángduǎn héshì dehuà, wǒ jiù mǎi.
example.translation: If the length is suitable, I'll buy it.

example.cn: 不用试。可以。
example.py: Búyòng shì. Kěyǐ.
example.translation: No need to try it on. It's fine.

example.cn: 也不错。一共多少钱？
example.py: Yě búcuò. Yígòng duōshao qián?
example.translation: It's not bad either. How much altogether?

example.cn: 也不错。一共多少钱？
example.py: Yě búcuò. Yígòng duōshao qián?
example.translation: It's not bad either. How much altogether?

example.cn: 也不错。一共多少钱？
example.py: yě bú cuò yí gòng duō shao qián
example.translation: It's not bad either. How much altogether?

块.definition: (measure word for the basic Chinese monetary unit [equivalent of a dollar])

example.cn: 衬衫二十一块五,裤子三十二块九毛九,一共是五十四块四毛九分。
example.py: chènshān èrshíyī kuài wǔ kùzi sānshí'èr kuài jiǔ máo jiǔ yīgòng shì wǔshísì kuài sì máo jiǔ fēn
example.translation: The shirt is twenty-one fifty, the pants are thirty-two ninety-nine. The total is fifty-four forty-nine.

毛.definition: (measure word for 1/10 of a kuai [equivalent of a dime])

example.cn: 找您四十五块五毛一。
example.py: Zhǎo nín sìshíwǔ kuài wǔ máo yī.
example.translation: Here's your change, forty-five fifty-one.

分.definition: (measure word for 1/100 of a kuai [equivalent of a cent])

example.cn: 衬衫二十一块五,裤子三十二块九毛九,一共是五十四块四毛九分。
example.py: Chènshān èrshíyī kuài wǔ, kùzi sānshí'èr kuài jiǔ máo jiǔ, yīgòng shì wǔshísì kuài sì máo jiǔ fēn.
example.translation: The shirt is twenty-one fifty, the pants are thirty-two ninety-nine. The total is fifty-four forty-nine.

example.cn: 好,这是一百块钱。
example.py: Hǎo, zhè shì yībǎi kuài qián.
example.translation: OK, here is one hundred yuan.

example.cn: 对不起，这双鞋太小了。能不能换一双？
example.py: Duìbuqǐ, zhè shuāng xié tài xiǎo le. Néng bu néng huàn yì shuāng?
example.translation: Excuse me, this pair of shoes is too small. Can I exchange them for another pair?

example.cn: 对不起，这双鞋太小了。能不能换一双？
example.py: duì bu qǐ zhè shuāng xié tài xiǎo le néng bu néng huàn yì shuāng
example.translation: Excuse me, this pair of shoes is too small. Can I exchange them for another pair?

example.cn: 对不起，这双鞋太小了。能不能换一双？
example.py: Duìbuqǐ, zhè shuāng xié tài xiǎo le. Néng bu néng huàn yì shuāng?
example.translation: Excuse me, this pair of shoes is too small. Can I exchange them for another pair?

example.cn: 也不行，这双跟那双一样大。
example.py: Yě bù xíng, zhè shuāng gēn nà shuāng yíyàng dà.
example.translation: No, they won't do either. This pair is the same size as the other one.

example.cn: 这双鞋虽然大小合适，可是颜色不好。有没有咖啡色的？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié suīrán dàxiǎo héshì, kěshì yánsè bù hǎo. Yǒu méiyǒu kāfēisè de?
example.translation: Although this pair is the right size, the color is not good. Do you have them in brown?

example.cn: 这双鞋虽然大小合适，可是颜色不好。有没有咖啡色的？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié suīrán dàxiǎo héshì, kěshì yánsè bù hǎo. Yǒu méiyǒu kāfēisè de?
example.translation: Although this pair is the right size, the color is not good. Do you have them in brown?

example.cn: 这双鞋虽然大小合适，可是颜色不好。有没有咖啡色的？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié suīrán dàxiǎo héshì, kěshì yánsè bù hǎo. Yǒu méiyǒu kāfēisè de?
example.translation: Although this pair is the right size, the color is not good. Do you have them in brown?

example.cn: 对不起，这种鞋只有黑的。
example.py: duì bu qǐ zhè zhǒng xié zhǐ yǒu hēi de
example.translation: I'm sorry, we only have this kind of shoes in black.

example.cn: 那这双黑的呢？
example.py: Nà zhè shuāng hēi de ne?
example.translation: What about this black pair?

example.cn: 这双鞋样子挺好的，就是它吧。你们这儿可以刷卡吗？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié yàngzi tǐng hǎo de, jiù shì tā ba. Nǐmen zhèr kěyǐ shuākǎ ma?
example.translation: The style of this pair is pretty good. I'll take it. Can I use a credit card here?

example.cn: 这双鞋样子挺好的，就是它吧。你们这儿可以刷卡吗？
example.py: zhè shuāng xié yàng zi tǐng hǎo de jiù shì tā ba nǐ men zhèr kě yǐ shuā kǎ ma
example.translation: The style of this pair is pretty good. I'll take it. Can I use a credit card here?

example.cn: 这双鞋样子挺好的，就是它吧。你们这儿可以刷卡吗？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié yàngzi tǐng hǎo de, jiù shì tā ba. Nǐmen zhèr kěyǐ shuākǎ ma?
example.translation: The style of this pair is pretty good. I'll take it. Can I use a credit card here?

example.cn: 这双鞋样子挺好的，就是它吧。你们这儿可以刷卡吗？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié yàngzi tǐng hǎo de, jiù shì tā ba. Nǐmen zhèr kěyǐ shuākǎ ma?
example.translation: The style of this pair is pretty good. I'll take it. Can I use a credit card here?

刷卡.definition: to pay with a credit card

example.cn: 这双鞋样子挺好的，就是它吧。你们这儿可以刷卡吗？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié yàngzi tǐng hǎo de, jiù shì tā ba. Nǐmen zhèr kěyǐ shuākǎ ma?
example.translation: The style of this pair is pretty good. I'll take it. Can I use a credit card here?

example.cn: 这双鞋样子挺好的，就是它吧。你们这儿可以刷卡吗？
example.py: zhè shuāng xié yàng zi tǐng hǎo de jiù shì tā ba nǐ men zhèr kě yǐ shuā kǎ ma
example.translation: The style of this pair is pretty good. I'll take it. Can I use a credit card here?

example.cn: 这双鞋样子挺好的，就是它吧。你们这儿可以刷卡吗？
example.py: Zhè shuāng xié yàngzi tǐng hǎo de, jiù shì tā ba. Nǐmen zhèr kěyǐ shuā kǎ ma?
example.translation: The style of this pair is pretty good. I'll take it. Can I use a credit card here?

example.cn: 对不起，我们不收信用卡。不过，这双的钱跟那双一样，您不用再付钱了。
example.py: Duìbuqǐ, wǒmen bù shōu xìnyòngkǎ. Búguò, zhè shuāng de qián gēn nà shuāng yíyàng, nín búyòng zài fù qián le.
example.translation: I'm sorry, we don't accept credit cards. However, this pair is the same price as the other one, so you don't need to pay again.

走.definition: to go by way of, to walk

example.cn: 我想坐公共汽车或者坐地铁。你知道怎么走吗？
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng zuò gōnggòng qìchē huòzhě zuò dìtiě. Nǐ zhīdào zěnme zǒu ma?
example.translation: I want to take the bus or the subway. Do you know how to get there?

example.cn: 你先坐一路汽车，坐三站下车，然后换地铁。先坐红线，再换绿线，最后换蓝线。
example.py: Nǐ xiān zuò yī lù qìchē, zuò sān zhàn xià chē, ránhòu huàn dìtiě. Xiān zuò hóng xiàn, zài huàn lǜ xiàn, zuìhòu huàn lán xiàn.
example.translation: You first take Bus No. 1. Get off after three stops, and then transfer to the subway. First take the red line, then transfer to the green line, and finally transfer to the blue line.

example.cn: 你先坐一路汽车，坐三站下车，然后换地铁。先坐红线，再换绿线，最后换蓝线。
example.py: nǐ xiān zuò yī lù qì chē zuò sān zhàn xià chē rán hòu huàn dì tiě xiān zuò hóng xiàn zài huàn lǜ xiàn zuì hòu huàn lán xiàn
example.translation: You first take Bus No. 1. Get off after three stops, and then transfer to the subway. First take the red line, then transfer to the green line, and finally transfer to the blue line.

example.cn: 我在高速公路上开车，真有点儿紧张。
example.py: wǒ zài gāo sù gōng lù shang kāi chē zhēn yǒu diǎnr jǐn zhāng
example.translation: I get a little nervous driving on the highway.

example.cn: 你先坐一路汽车，坐三站下车，然后换地铁。先坐红线，再换绿线，最后换蓝线。

example.translation: You first take Bus No. 1. Get off after three stops, and then transfer to the subway. First take the red line, then transfer to the green line, and finally transfer to the blue line.

example.cn: 不行，不行，太麻烦了。我还是打车吧。
example.py: bù xíng bù xíng tài má fan le wǒ hái shi dǎ chē ba
example.translation: No, no, that's too much trouble. I'd better take a taxi.

example.cn: 出租汽车太贵，我开车送你去吧。
example.py: Chūzū qìchē tài guì, wǒ kāi chē sòng nǐ qù ba.
example.translation: Taxis are too expensive. I'll drive you there.

example.cn: 刚才他在报纸上看到了一个广告，说学校附近有一套公寓出租，离学校很近，走路只要五分钟，很方便。
example.py: Gāngcái tā zài bàozhǐ shang kàn dào le yí ge guǎnggào, shuō xuéxiào fùjìn yǒu yí tào gōngyù chūzū, lí xuéxiào hěn jìn, zǒulù zhǐyào wǔ fēnzhōng, hěn fāngbiàn.
example.translation: Just now, he saw an ad in the newspaper that says there is an apartment for rent near the school. It's very close to the school, only a five-minute walk, which is very convenient.

example.py: Wǒ mǎi le yì běn shū sòng gěi tā.
example.translation: I bought a book to give to her.

example.cn: 不过，让你花那么多时间，真不好意思。
example.py: bú guò ràng nǐ huā nà me duō shí jiān zhēn bù hǎo yì si
example.translation: However, I feel bad for taking up so much of your time.

example.cn: 可是这儿没有公共汽车，也没有地铁，只能自己开车，很不方便。
example.py: kě shì zhèr méi yǒu gōng gòng qì chē yě méi yǒu dì tiě zhǐ néng zì jǐ kāi chē hěn bù fāng biàn
example.translation: But there are no buses or subways here. I have to drive myself, which is very inconvenient.

example.cn: 有空儿的话打我的手机或者给我发短信，我想跟你聊天儿。
example.py: Yǒu kòngr de huà dǎ wǒ de shǒujī huòzhě gěi wǒ fā duǎnxìn, wǒ xiǎng gēn nǐ liáotiānr.
example.translation: If you have free time, call my cell phone or send me a text message. I'd like to chat with you.

发短信.definition: to send a text message (lit. to send a short message)

example.translation: If you have free time, call my cell phone or send me a text message. I'd like to chat with you.

example.cn: 新年快要到了，祝你新年快乐！
example.py: Xīnnián kuàiyào dào le, zhù nǐ xīnnián kuàilè!
example.translation: New Year is almost here. Happy New Year!

example.cn: 今天天气比昨天好，不下雪了。
example.py: Jīntiān tiānqì bǐ zuótiān hǎo, bù xià xuě le.
example.translation: Today's weather is better than yesterday's. It's not snowing anymore.

example.cn: 今天天气比昨天好，不下雪了。
example.py: jīntiān tiānqì bǐ zuótiān hǎo bù xià xuě le
example.translation: Today's weather is better than yesterday's. It's not snowing anymore.

example.cn: 今天天气比昨天好，不下雪了。
example.py: Jīntiān tiānqì bǐ zuótiān hǎo, bù xià xuě le.
example.translation: Today's weather is better than yesterday's. It's not snowing anymore.

example.cn: 我约了朋友明天去公园滑冰，不知道天气会怎么样，冷不冷？
example.py: wǒ yuē le péngyou míngtiān qù gōngyuán huá bīng bù zhīdào tiānqì huì zěnmeyàng lěng bù lěng
example.translation: I've asked a friend to go ice skating in the park tomorrow. I wonder what the weather will be like. Will it be cold?

example.cn: 我约了朋友明天去公园滑冰，不知道天气会怎么样，冷不冷？
example.py: Wǒ yuē le péngyou míngtiān qù gōngyuán huá bīng, bù zhīdào tiānqì huì zěnmeyàng, lěng bu lěng?
example.translation: I've asked a friend to go ice skating in the park tomorrow. I wonder what the weather will be like. Will it be cold?

example.cn: 你约了谁去滑冰？
example.py: Nǐ yuē le shéi qù huá bīng?
example.translation: Who did you ask to go ice skating?

example.cn: 不知道天气会怎么样，冷不冷？
example.py: bù zhīdào tiānqì huì zěnmeyàng, lěng bu lěng?
example.translation: I wonder what the weather will be like. Will it be cold?

example.cn: 我刚才看了网上的天气预报，明天天气比今天更好。
example.py: Wǒ gāngcái kàn le wǎng shang de tiānqì yùbào, míngtiān tiānqì bǐ jīntiān gèng hǎo.
example.translation: I just looked at the weather forecast online. Tomorrow's weather will be even better than today's.

example.cn: 我刚才看了网上的天气预报，明天天气比今天更好。不但不会下雪，而且会暖和一点儿。
example.py: wǒ gāngcái kàn le wǎng shang de tiānqì yùbào míngtiān tiānqì bǐ jīntiān gèng hǎo búdàn bù huì xià xuě érqiě huì nuǎnhuo yìdiǎnr
example.translation: I just looked at the weather forecast online. Tomorrow's weather will be even better than today's. Not only will it not snow, it'll also be a bit warmer.

example.cn: 我刚才看了网上的天气预报，明天天气比今天更好。
example.py: Wǒ gāngcái kànle wǎng shang de tiānqì yùbào, míngtiān tiānqì bǐ jīntiān gèng hǎo.

example.translation: Ying'ai, New York is so much fun. How come you're online and not out?

example.cn: 这儿的天气非常糟糕。

example.py: diàn nǎo zhōng xīn lí tú shū guǎn hěn jìn jiù zài tú shū guǎn hé xué sheng huó dòng zhōng xīn zhōng jiān
example.translation: The computer center is very close to the library. It's right between the library and the student activity center.

example.cn: 我想到学校书店去买书。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng dào xuéxiào shūdiàn qù mǎi shū.
example.translation: I want to go to the school bookstore to buy a book.

example.cn: 书店在什么地方？
example.py: shūdiàn zài shénme dìfang
example.translation: Where is the bookstore?

example.cn: 就在学生活动中心里边。
example.py: Jiù zài xuésheng huódòng zhōngxīn lǐbian.
example.translation: It's inside the student activity center.

example.cn: 我们去中国城吃中国饭吧！
example.py: Wǒmen qù Zhōngguóchéng chī Zhōngguó fàn ba!
example.translation: Let's go to Chinatown to eat Chinese food!

example.cn: 我们去中国城吃中国饭吧！
example.py: wǒmen qù zhōngguóchéng chī zhōngguó fàn ba
example.translation: Let's go to Chinatown to eat Chinese food!

过.definition: (particle used after a verb to indicate a past experience)

example.cn: 我没去过中国城，不知道中国城在哪儿。
example.py: wǒ méi qù guo zhōngguóchéng bù zhīdào zhōngguóchéng zài nǎr
example.translation: I've never been to Chinatown. I don't know where Chinatown is.

过.definition: to live (a life), to observe (a holiday), to celebrate (a festival), to pass

example.cn: 今天高小音过生日，晚上我们在她家开舞会，你能去吗？
example.py: jīntiān gāo xiǎoyīn guò shēngrì wǎnshang wǒmen zài tā jiā kāi wǔhuì nǐ néng qù ma
example.translation: Today is Gao Xiaoyin's birthday. We're having a dance party at her place tonight. Can you go?

example.cn: 没有地图，走错了怎么办？
example.py: Méiyǒu dìtú, zǒu cuò le zěnmebàn?
example.translation: Without a map, what do we do if we go the wrong way?

example.cn: 你有谷歌地图吗？拿给我看看。
example.py: nǐ yǒu gǔ gē dì tú ma ná gěi wǒ kàn kan
example.translation: Do you have Google Maps? Let me have a look.

example.cn: 没有地图没关系，中国城我去过很多次，不用地图也能找到。你从这儿一直往南开，到第三个路口，往西一拐就到了。
example.py: méiyǒu dìtú méi guānxi Zhōngguóchéng wǒ qùguo hěn duō cì búyòng dìtú yě néng zhǎodào nǐ cóng zhèr yìzhí wǎng nán kāi dào dì sān ge lùkǒu wǎng xī yì guǎi jiù dào le
example.translation: It's okay that we don't have a map. I've been to Chinatown many times, I can find it without a map. From here, drive straight south. At the third intersection, turn west, and you'll be there.

example.cn: 你从这儿一直往南开，到第三个路口，往西一拐就到了。
example.py: Nǐ cóng zhèr yìzhí wǎng nán kāi, dào dì-sān ge lùkǒu, wǎng xī yì guǎi jiù dào le.
example.translation: From here, drive straight south. At the third intersection, turn west, and you'll be there.

example.cn: 那你一直往前开，到第三个红绿灯，往右一拐就到了。
example.py: Nà nǐ yìzhí wǎng qián kāi, dào dì-sān ge hónglǜdēng, wǎng yòu yì guǎi jiù dào le.
example.translation: Then just drive straight ahead. At the third traffic light, turn right, and you'll be there.

example.cn: 没有地图没关系，中国城我去过很多次，不用地图也能找到。你从这儿一直往南开，到第三个路口，往西一拐就到了。
example.py: méiyǒu dìtú méi guānxi Zhōngguóchéng wǒ qùguo hěn duō cì búyòng dìtú yě néng zhǎodào nǐ cóng zhèr yìzhí wǎng nán kāi dào dì sān ge lùkǒu wǎng xī yì guǎi jiù dào le
example.translation: It's okay that we don't have a map. I've been to Chinatown many times, I can find it without a map. From here, drive straight south. At the third intersection, turn west, and you'll be there.

example.cn: 你从这儿一直往南开，到第三个路口，往西一拐就到了。
example.py: Nǐ cóng zhèr yìzhí wǎng nán kāi, dào dì sān ge lùkǒu, wǎng xī yì guǎi jiù dào le.
example.translation: From here, drive straight south. At the third intersection, turn west, and you'll be there.

example.cn: 不对，不对。你看，这个路口只能往左拐，不能往右拐。
example.py: Bú duì, bú duì. Nǐ kàn, zhè ge lùkǒu zhǐ néng wǎng zuǒ guǎi, bù néng wǎng yòu guǎi.
example.translation: That's not right, not right. Look, at this intersection, you can only turn left, not right.

example.cn: 你从这儿一直往南开，到第三个路口，往西一拐就到了。
example.py: Nǐ cóng zhèr yìzhí wǎng nán kāi, dào dì sān ge lùkǒu, wǎng xī yì guǎi jiù dào le.

example.translation: From here, drive straight south. At the third intersection, turn west, and you'll be there.

哎.definition: (exclamatory particle to express surprise or dissatisfaction)

example.cn: 哎，我不知道东南西北。
example.py: āi wǒ bù zhīdào dōng nán xī běi
example.translation: Oh, I don't know the directions east, south, west, and north.

哎.definition: (exclamatory particle to express surprise or dissatisfaction or to remind)

example.cn: 好,谢谢。哎,我的电脑呢?……糟糕,电脑可能拉在出租车上了!
example.py: hǎo xièxie āi wǒ de diànnǎo ne zāogāo diànnǎo kěnéng là zài chūzūchē shàng le
example.translation: Okay, thank you. Oh, where's my computer? ...Oh no, I might have left my computer in the taxi!

example.cn: 前面有很多中国字。
example.py: Qiánmiàn yǒu hěn duō Zhōngguó zì.
example.translation: There are a lot of Chinese characters ahead.

example.cn: 你有谷歌地图吗？
example.py: Nǐ yǒu Gǔgē dìtú ma?
example.translation: Do you have Google Maps?

example.cn: 那不是中文，那是日文，我们到了小东京了。
example.py: Nà bú shì Zhōngwén, nà shì Rìwén, wǒmen dào le Xiǎo Dōngjīng le.
example.translation: That's not Chinese, that's Japanese. We've arrived in Little Tokyo.

example.cn: 那不是中文，那是日文，我们到了小东京了。
example.py: Nà bú shì Zhōngwén, nà shì Rìwén, wǒmen dào le Xiǎo Dōngjīng le.
example.translation: That's not Chinese, that's Japanese. We've arrived in Little Tokyo.

example.cn: 是吗？那我们不吃中国饭了，吃日本饭吧！
example.py: Shì ma? Nà wǒmen bù chī Zhōngguó fàn le, chī Rìběn fàn ba!
example.translation: Really? Then let's not eat Chinese food, let's have Japanese food!

example.cn: 今天高小音过生日，晚上我们在她家开舞会，你能去吗？
example.py: Jīntiān Gāo Xiǎoyīn guò shēngrì, wǎnshang wǒmen zài tā jiā kāi wǔhuì, nǐ néng qù ma?
example.translation: Today is Gao Xiaoyin's birthday. We're having a dance party at her place tonight. Can you go?

example.cn: 小音和她的男朋友、小音的表姐、白英爱、你妹妹王红，听说还有小音的中学同学。
example.py: Xiǎoyīn hé tā de nánpéngyou, Xiǎoyīn de biǎojiě, Bái Yīng'ài, nǐ mèimei Wáng Hóng, tīngshuō hái yǒu Xiǎoyīn de zhōngxué tóngxué.
example.translation: Xiaoyin and her boyfriend, Xiaoyin's older female cousin, Bai Ying'ai, your younger sister Wang Hong, and I heard some of Xiaoyin's middle school classmates will be there too.

example.cn: 听说还有小音的中学同学。
example.py: Tīngshuō hái yǒu Xiǎoyīn de zhōngxué tóngxué.
example.translation: I heard some of Xiaoyin's middle school classmates will be there too.

example.cn: 你要送给小音什么生日礼物？
example.py: Nǐ yào sòng gěi Xiǎoyīn shénme shēngrì lǐwù?
example.translation: What birthday gift are you giving to Xiaoyin?

example.cn: 我买了一本书送给她。
example.py: wǒ mǎi le yī běn shū sòng gěi tā
example.translation: I bought a book to give to her.

example.cn: 饮料或者水果都可以。
example.py: Yǐnliào huòzhě shuǐguǒ dōu kěyǐ.
example.translation: Beverages or fruit would be fine.

example.cn: 小音爱吃水果，我再买一些苹果、梨和西瓜吧。
example.py: Xiǎoyīn ài chī shuǐguǒ, wǒ zài mǎi yīxiē píngguǒ, lí hé xīguā ba.
example.translation: Xiaoyin loves fruit. I'll buy some apples, pears, and a watermelon.

把.definition: (measure word for things with handles, for handfuls of things)

example.cn: 那我带一些饮料，再买一把花儿。
example.py: nà wǒ dài yìxiē yǐnliào zài mǎi yì bǎ huār
example.translation: Then I'll bring some beverages, and also buy a bouquet of flowers.

把.definition: (indicating disposition, arrangement, or settlement of something)

example.cn: 你把蛋糕放在哪儿了？
example.py: nǐ bǎ dàn gāo fàng zài nǎr le
example.translation: Where did you put the cake?

爱.definition: to love, to like, to be fond of

example.cn: 小音爱吃水果，我再买一些苹果、梨和西瓜吧。
example.py: Xiǎo Yīn ài chī shuǐguǒ, wǒ zài mǎi yīxiē píngguǒ, lí hé xīguā ba.
example.translation: Xiaoyin loves fruit. I'll buy some apples, pears, and a watermelon.

example.py: Xiǎo Yīn ài chī shuǐguǒ, wǒ zài mǎi yìxiē píngguǒ, lí hé xīguā ba.

example.cn: 你住的地方离小音家很远，水果很重，我开车去接你，我们一起去吧。
example.py: Nǐ zhù de dìfang lí Xiǎo Yīn jiā hěn yuǎn, shuǐguǒ hěn zhòng, wǒ kāichē qù jiē nǐ, wǒmen yìqǐ qù ba.
example.translation: Your place is very far from Xiaoyin's house, and the fruit will be heavy. I'll drive to pick you up. Let's go together.

example.cn: 你住的地方离小音家很远，水果很重，我开车去接你，我们一起去吧。
example.py: Nǐ zhù de dìfang lí Xiǎo Yīn jiā hěn yuǎn, shuǐguǒ hěn zhòng, wǒ kāichē qù jiē nǐ, wǒmen yìqǐ qù ba.
example.translation: Your place is very far from Xiaoyin's house, and the fruit will be heavy. I'll drive to pick you up. Let's go together.

接.definition: to catch, to meet, to welcome

example.cn: 你住的地方离小音家很远，水果很重，我开车去接你，我们一起去吧。
example.py: nǐ zhù de dì fang lí xiǎo yīn jiā hěn yuǎn shuǐ guǒ hěn zhòng wǒ kāi chē qù jiē nǐ wǒ men yī qǐ qù ba
example.translation: Your place is very far from Xiaoyin's house, and the fruit will be heavy. I'll drive to pick you up. Let's go together.

楼.definition: multi-story building, floor (of a multi-level building)

example.cn: 好，我六点半在楼下等你。
example.py: hǎo wǒ liù diǎn bàn zài lóu xià děng nǐ
example.translation: Great, I'll wait for you downstairs at six-thirty.

example.cn: 小音和她的男朋友、小音的表姐、白英爱、你妹妹王红，听说还有小音的中学同学。
example.py: xiǎo yīn hé tā de nán péng you xiǎo yīn de biǎo jiě bái yīng ài nǐ mèi mei wáng hóng tīng shuō hái yǒu xiǎo yīn de zhōng xué tóng xué
example.translation: Xiaoyin and her boyfriend, Xiaoyin's older female cousin, Bai Ying'ai, your younger sister Wang Hong, and I heard some of Xiaoyin's middle school classmates will be there too.

example.cn: 三个半钟头。还看两个钟头的英文电视。
example.py: Sān ge bàn zhōngtóu. Hái kàn liǎng ge zhōngtóu de Yīngwén diànshì.
example.translation: Three and a half hours. I also watch two hours of English TV.

example.cn: 她还没来?我以为她已经来了。
example.py: tā hái méi lái wǒ yǐwéi tā yǐjīng lái le
example.translation: She hasn't come yet? I thought she had already arrived.

example.cn: 文中和小音都说你又聪明又用功。
example.py: Wénzhōng hé Xiǎoyīn dōu shuō nǐ yòu cōngming yòu yònggōng.
example.translation: Wenzhong and Xiaoyin both say you are smart and hardworking.

example.cn: 文中和小音都说你又聪明又用功。

example.cn: 在暑期班学的。
example.py: Zài shǔqī bān xué de.
example.translation: I learned it in summer school.

example.cn: 在暑期班学的。
example.py: zài shǔ qī bān xué de
example.translation: I learned it in summer school.

example.cn: 哎,汤姆长得真可爱!
example.py: Āi, Tāngmǔ zhǎng de zhēn kě'ài!
example.translation: Oh, Tom is so cute!

example.cn: 刚一岁,是去年生的,属狗。
example.py: Gāng yī suì, shì qùnián shēng de, shǔ gǒu.
example.translation: Just one year old. He was born last year, in the year of the Dog.

example.translation: Just one year old. He was born last year, in the year of the Dog.

example.cn: 你们看,他的脸圆圆的,眼睛大大的,鼻子高高的,嘴不大也不小,长得很像海伦。
example.py: Nǐmen kàn, tā de liǎn yuán yuán de, yǎnjing dà dà de, bízi gāo gāo de, zuǐ bú dà yě bù xiǎo, zhǎng de hěn xiàng Hǎilún.
example.translation: Look, his face is round, his eyes are big, his nose is high, and his mouth is not too big or too small. He looks a lot like Helen.

example.translation: That one looks like a name brand... Oh my, it's too expensive!

example.cn: 妈妈这么漂亮,儿子长大一定也很帅。

example.translation: The mother is so beautiful, the son will definitely be very handsome when he grows up.

example.translation: The mother is so beautiful, the son will definitely be very handsome when he grows up.

example.cn: 来,来,来,我们吃蛋糕吧。
example.py: Lái, lái, lái, wǒmen chī dàngāo ba.
example.translation: Come, come, come, let's eat the cake.

example.cn: 你好,海伦。
example.py: Nǐ hǎo, Hǎilún.
example.translation: Hello, Helen.

example.cn: 哎,汤姆长得真可爱!
example.py: Āi, Tāngmǔ zhǎng de zhēn kě'ài!
example.translation: Oh, Tom is so cute!

example.cn: 医生，我肚子疼死了。
example.py: Yīshēng, wǒ dùzi téng sǐ le.
example.translation: Doctor, my stomach is killing me.

example.cn: 医生，我肚子疼死了。
example.py: yī shēng wǒ dù zi téng sǐ le
example.translation: Doctor, my stomach is killing me.

example.cn: 医生，我肚子疼死了。
example.py: yī shēng wǒ dù zi téng sǐ le
example.translation: Doctor, my stomach is killing me.

死.definition: to die; (a complement indicating an extreme degree)

example.cn: 医生，我肚子疼死了。
example.py: yī shēng wǒ dù zi téng sǐ le
example.translation: Doctor, my stomach is killing me.

example.cn: 昨天晚上我吃了几口，夜里肚子就疼起来了，今天早上上了好几次厕所。
example.py: Zuótiān wǎnshang wǒ chī le jǐ kǒu, yèli dùzi jiù téng qǐlái le, jīntiān zǎoshang shàng le hǎo jǐ cì cèsuǒ.
example.translation: I had a few bites last night, and my stomach started to hurt during the night. This morning I went to the bathroom several times.

example.cn: 我姐姐上个星期过生日，蛋糕没吃完。昨天晚上我吃了几口，夜里肚子就疼起来了，今天早上上了好几次厕所。
example.py: wǒ jiě jie shàng ge xīng qī guò shēng rì dàn gāo méi chī wán zuó tiān wǎn shang wǒ chī le jǐ kǒu yè lǐ dù zi jiù téng qǐ lai le jīn tiān zǎo shang shàng le hǎo jǐ cì cè suǒ
example.translation: My older sister had a birthday last week, and we didn't finish the cake. I had a few bites last night, and my stomach started to hurt during the night. This morning I went to the bathroom several times.

example.cn: 我姐姐上个星期过生日，蛋糕没吃完。昨天晚上我吃了几口，夜里肚子就疼起来了，今天早上上了好几次厕所。
example.py: wǒ jiě jie shàng ge xīng qī guò shēng rì dàn gāo méi chī wán zuó tiān wǎn shang wǒ chī le jǐ kǒu yè lǐ dù zi jiù téng qǐ lai le jīn tiān zǎo shang shàng le hǎo jǐ cì cè suǒ
example.translation: My older sister had a birthday last week, and we didn't finish the cake. I had a few bites last night, and my stomach started to hurt during the night. This morning I went to the bathroom several times.

example.cn: 放在冰箱里了。
example.py: Fàng zài bīngxiāng lǐ le.
example.translation: I put it in the refrigerator.

example.cn: 发烧吗？
example.py: Fā shāo ma?
example.translation: Do you have a fever?

example.cn: 你躺下。
example.py: Nǐ tǎng xia.
example.translation: Lie down.

example.cn: 你躺下。
example.py: Nǐ tǎng xia.
example.translation: Lie down.

example.cn: 你躺下。先检查一下。
example.py: nǐ tǎng xia xiān jiǎnchá yíxià
example.translation: Lie down. Let me check.

吃坏.definition: to get sick because of bad food

example.cn: 你吃蛋糕把肚子吃坏了。
example.py: nǐ chī dàngāo bǎ dùzi chī huài le
example.translation: You upset your stomach by eating that cake.

example.cn: 你吃蛋糕把肚子吃坏了。
example.py: nǐ chī dàngāo bǎ dùzi chī huài le
example.translation: You upset your stomach by eating that cake.

example.cn: 得打针吗？
example.py: Děi dǎzhēn ma?
example.translation: Do I need an injection?

example.cn: 得打针吗？
example.py: děi dǎzhēn ma
example.translation: Do I need an injection?

example.cn: 不用打针，吃这种药就可以。
example.py: Búyòng dǎzhēn, chī zhè zhǒng yào jiù kěyǐ.
example.translation: No injection needed, just take this medicine.

example.cn: 不用打针，吃这种药就可以。一天三次，一次两片。
example.py: bú yòng dǎ zhēn chī zhè zhǒng yào jiù kě yǐ yì tiān sān cì yí cì liǎng piàn
example.translation: No injection needed, just take this medicine. Three times a day, two pills at a time.

遍.definition: (measure word for complete courses of an action or instances of an action)

example.cn: 医生，一天吃几次？请您再说一遍。
example.py: yī shēng yì tiān chī jǐ cì qǐng nín zài shuō yí biàn
example.translation: Doctor, how many times a day? Please say it again.

example.cn: 不过，你最好二十四小时不要吃饭。
example.py: Bùguò, nǐ zuìhǎo èrshísì xiǎoshí bùyào chīfàn.
example.translation: However, you'd better not eat for twenty-four hours.

example.cn: 不过，你最好二十四小时不要吃饭。
example.py: Bùguò, nǐ zuìhǎo èrshísì xiǎoshí bùyào chīfàn.
example.translation: However, you'd better not eat for twenty-four hours.

example.cn: 不行，这个办法不好！
example.py: Bùxíng, zhège bànfǎ bù hǎo!
example.translation: No way, that's not a good idea!

example.cn: 我上次生病,没去看医生,休息了两天,最后也好了。
example.py: Wǒ shàng cì shēngbìng, méi qù kàn yīshēng, xiūxi le liǎng tiān, zuìhòu yě hǎo le.
example.translation: Last time I was sick, I didn't see a doctor. I just rested for two days and got better in the end.

example.cn: 王朋,你怎么了?眼睛怎么红红的,感冒了吗?
example.py: Wáng Péng, nǐ zěnme le? Yǎnjing zěnme hónghóng de, gǎnmào le ma?
example.translation: Wang Peng, what's wrong? Why are your eyes so red? Did you catch a cold?

example.cn: 没感冒。我也不知道怎么了,最近这几天身体很不舒服。眼睛又红又痒。
example.py: méi gǎnmào wǒ yě bù zhīdào zěnme le zuìjìn zhè jǐ tiān shēntǐ hěn bù shūfu yǎnjing yòu hóng yòu yǎng
example.translation: I don't have a cold. I don't know what's wrong either. I haven't been feeling well these past few days. My eyes are red and itchy.

example.cn: 眼睛又红又痒。
example.py: Yǎnjing yòu hóng yòu yǎng.
example.translation: My eyes are red and itchy.

example.cn: 你一定是对什么过敏了。
example.py: Nǐ yīdìng shì duì shénme guòmǐn le.
example.translation: You must be allergic to something.

example.cn: 所以去药店买了一些药。
example.py: suǒyǐ qù yàodiàn mǎi le yīxiē yào.
example.translation: so I went to the pharmacy and bought some medicine.

example.cn: 你没有健康保险吗?
example.py: Nǐ méiyǒu jiànkāng bǎoxiǎn ma?
example.translation: Don't you have health insurance?

example.cn: 我有保险。
example.py: Wǒ yǒu bǎoxiǎn.
example.translation: I have insurance.

赶快.definition: right away, quickly, in a hurry

example.cn: 那你也得赶快去看病。
example.py: Nà nǐ yě děi gǎnkuài qù kànbìng.
example.translation: Even so, you still need to go see a doctor right away.

example.cn: 那你也得赶快去看病。要不然病会越来越重。
example.py: Nà nǐ yě děi gǎnkuài qù kàn bìng. Yàobùrán bìng huì yuè lái yuè zhòng.
example.translation: Even so, you still need to go see a doctor right away. Otherwise, you'll get sicker and sicker.

example.cn: 那你也得赶快去看病。要不然病会越来越重。
example.py: nà nǐ yě děi gǎnkuài qù kànbìng yàobùrán bìng huì yuèláiyuè zhòng
example.translation: Even so, you still need to go see a doctor right away. Otherwise, you'll get sicker and sicker.

example.cn: 我上次生病,没去看医生,休息了两天,最后也好了。
example.py: Wǒ shàng cì shēngbìng, méi qù kàn yīshēng, xiūxi le liǎng tiān, zuìhòu yě hǎo le.
example.translation: Last time I was sick, I didn't see a doctor. I just rested for two days and got better in the end.

休息.definition: to take a break, to rest

example.cn: 我上次生病,没去看医生,休息了两天,最后也好了。
example.py: Wǒ shàngcì shēngbìng, méi qù kàn yīshēng, xiūxi le liǎng tiān, zuìhòu yě hǎo le.
example.translation: Last time I was sick, I didn't see a doctor. I just rested for two days and got better in the end.

example.cn: 不行,不行,你太懒了。
example.py: Bùxíng, bùxíng, nǐ tài lǎn le.
example.translation: No, that won't do. You're too lazy.

example.cn: 不行,不行,你太懒了。再说,你不能自己乱吃药。走,我跟你看病去。
example.py: bù xíng bù xíng nǐ tài lǎn le zài shuō nǐ bù néng zì jǐ luàn chī yào zǒu wǒ gēn nǐ kàn bìng qù
example.translation: No, that won't do. You're too lazy. Besides, you can't just randomly take medicine on your own. Let's go, I'll go with you to see a doctor.

example.cn: 再说,你不能自己乱吃药。
example.py: Zàishuō, nǐ bùnéng zìjǐ luàn chī yào.
example.translation: Besides, you can't just randomly take medicine on your own.

example.cn: 王朋跟李友在同一个学校学习,他们认识已经快半年了。
example.py: Wáng Péng gēn Lǐ Yǒu zài tóng yī gè xuéxiào xuéxí, tāmen rènshi yǐjīng kuài bàn nián le.
example.translation: Wang Peng and Li You study at the same school. They have known each other for almost half a year.

example.cn: 李友对王朋的印象很好,王朋也很喜欢李友,他们成了好朋友。
example.py: Lǐ Yǒu duì Wáng Péng de yìnxiàng hěn hǎo, Wáng Péng yě hěn xǐhuan Lǐ Yǒu, tāmen chéng le hǎo péngyou.
example.translation: Li You has a very good impression of Wang Peng, and Wang Peng likes Li You very much, too. They have become good friends.

example.cn: 李友对王朋的印象很好,王朋也很喜欢李友,他们成了好朋友。
example.py: Lǐ Yǒu duì Wáng Péng de yìnxiàng hěn hǎo, Wáng Péng yě hěn xǐhuan Lǐ Yǒu, tāmen chéng le hǎo péngyou.
example.translation: Li You has a very good impression of Wang Peng, and Wang Peng likes Li You very much, too. They have become good friends.

example.cn: 这个周末学校演一个中国电影,我们一起去看,好吗？
example.py: Zhège zhōumò xuéxiào yǎn yí ge Zhōngguó diànyǐng, wǒmen yìqǐ qù kàn, hǎo ma?
example.translation: The school is showing a Chinese movie this weekend. Shall we go see it together?

example.cn: 我费了很大的力气才买到。
example.py: Wǒ fèi le hěn dà de lìqi cái mǎi dào.
example.translation: It took a lot of effort to get them.

example.cn: 那你不用付水电费。
example.py: nà nǐ bú yòng fù shuǐ diàn fèi
example.translation: In that case, you don't have to pay for utilities.

example.cn: 我费了很大的力气才买到。
example.py: Wǒ fèi le hěn dà de lìqi cái mǎi dào.
example.translation: It took a lot of effort to get them.

example.cn: 没有,就我们俩。
example.py: Méiyǒu, jiù wǒmen liǎ.
example.translation: No, just the two of us.

example.cn: 后天晚上八点。
example.py: Hòutiān wǎnshang bā diǎn.
example.translation: The day after tomorrow at eight in the evening.

一言为定.definition: that settles it, that's settled, it's decided

example.cn: 太好了！一言为定。
example.py: tài hǎo le yī yán wéi dìng
example.translation: Great! It's a deal.

example.cn: 你还记得我吗?
example.py: Nǐ hái jìde wǒ ma?
example.translation: Do you still remember me?

example.cn: 我姓费,你还记得我吗?
example.py: wǒ xìng Fèi nǐ hái jìde wǒ ma
example.translation: My last name is Fei. Do you still remember me?

example.cn: 你再想想。想起来了吗?
example.py: Nǐ zài xiǎngxiang. Xiǎng qi lai le ma?
example.translation: Think again. Do you remember now?

example.cn: 你是怎么知道我的电话号码的?
example.py: Nǐ shì zěnme zhīdào wǒ de diànhuà hàomǎ de?
example.translation: How did you get my phone number?

example.cn: 我要从宿舍搬出去,得打扫、整理房间。
example.py: wǒ yào cóng sùshè bān chūqu, děi dǎsǎo, zhěnglǐ fángjiān.
example.translation: I have to move out of the dorm, so I need to clean and tidy up the room.

打扫.definition: to clean up (a room, apartment or house)

example.cn: 下个周末也不行,我要从宿舍搬出去,得打扫、整理房间。
example.py: Xià ge zhōumò yě bù xíng, wǒ yào cóng sùshè bān chūqù, děi dǎsǎo, zhěnglǐ fángjiān.
example.translation: Next weekend won't work either. I have to move out of the dorm, so I need to clean and tidy up the room.

example.cn: 下个周末也不行,我要从宿舍搬出去,得打扫、整理房间。
example.py: xià ge zhōu mò yě bù xíng wǒ yào cóng sù shè bān chū qù děi dǎ sǎo zhěng lǐ fáng jiān
example.translation: Next weekend won't work either. I have to move out of the dorm, so I need to clean and tidy up the room.

example.cn: 下个周末也不行,我要从宿舍搬出去,得打扫、整理房间。
example.py: xià ge zhōu mò yě bù xíng wǒ yào cóng sù shè bān chū qù děi dǎ sǎo zhěng lǐ fáng jiān

example.cn: 下个周末也不行,我要从宿舍搬出去,得打扫、整理房间。
example.py: Xià ge zhōumò yě bù xíng, wǒ yào cóng sùshè bān chūqù, děi dǎsǎo, zhěnglǐ fángjiān.
example.translation: Next weekend won't work either. I have to move out of the dorm, so I need to clean and tidy up the room.

example.cn: 对不起,下下个周末更不行了,我要跟我的男朋友去纽约旅行。
example.py: duìbuqǐ xià xià gè zhōumò gèng bùxíng le wǒ yào gēn wǒ de nánpéngyou qù Niǔyuē lǚxíng
example.translation: Sorry, the weekend after next is even worse. I'm going to New York with my boyfriend for a trip.

example.cn: 他觉得宿舍太吵，睡不好觉。
example.py: Tā juéde sùshè tài chǎo, shuì bu hǎo jiào.
example.translation: He feels that the dormitory is too noisy and he can't sleep well.

example.cn: 房间太小，连电脑都放不下。
example.py: Fángjiān tài xiǎo, lián diànnǎo dōu fàng bu xià.
example.translation: The room is too small, he can't even fit a computer.

做饭.definition: to cook, to prepare a meal

example.cn: 再说也没有地方可以做饭，很不方便。
example.py: Zàishuō yě méiyǒu dìfang kěyǐ zuò fàn, hěn bù fāngbiàn.
example.translation: Besides, there's no place to cook, which is very inconvenient.

example.cn: 刚才他在报纸上看到了一个广告，说学校附近有一套公寓出租，离学校很近，走路只要五分钟，很方便。
example.py: Gāngcái tā zài bàozhǐ shàng kàndào le yí ge guǎnggào, shuō xuéxiào fùjìn yǒu yí tào gōngyù chūzū, lí xuéxiào hěn jìn, zǒulù zhǐyào wǔ fēnzhōng, hěn fāngbiàn.
example.translation: Just now, he saw an ad in the newspaper that says there is an apartment for rent near the school. It's very close to the school, only a five-minute walk, which is very convenient.

example.cn: 刚才他在报纸上看到了一个广告，说学校附近有一套公寓出租，离学校很近，走路只要五分钟，很方便。

example.translation: Just now, he saw an ad in the newspaper that says there is an apartment for rent near the school. It's very close to the school, only a five-minute walk, which is very convenient.

example.translation: Just now, he saw an ad in the newspaper that says there is an apartment for rent near the school. It's very close to the school, only a five-minute walk, which is very convenient.

example.translation: The apartment has one bedroom, one kitchen, one bathroom, one living room, and it's furnished.

example.translation: The apartment has one bedroom, one kitchen, one bathroom, one living room, and it's furnished.

example.cn: 王朋觉得这套公寓可能对他很合适。
example.py: Wáng Péng juéde zhè tào gōngyù kěnéng duì tā hěn héshì
example.translation: Wang Peng thinks this apartment might be very suitable for him.

一房一厅.definition: one bedroom and one living room

example.cn: 有啊,一房一厅,非常干净,还带家具。
example.py: Yǒu a, yì fáng yì tīng, fēicháng gānjìng, hái dài jiājù.
example.translation: Yes, we do. It's a one-bedroom, one-living room apartment. It's very clean and comes with furniture.

example.cn: 有啊,一房一厅,非常干净,还带家具。
example.py: Yǒu a, yì fáng yì tīng, fēicháng gānjìng, hái dài jiājù.
example.translation: Yes, we do. It's a one-bedroom, one-living room apartment. It's very clean and comes with furniture.

example.cn: 客厅里有一套沙发、一张饭桌跟四把椅子。
example.py: Kètīng lǐ yǒu yí tào shāfā, yì zhāng fànzhuō gēn sì bǎ yǐzi.
example.translation: In the living room, there is a sofa set, a dining table, and four chairs.

example.cn: 客厅里有一套沙发、一张饭桌跟四把椅子。
example.py: Kètīng lǐ yǒu yí tào shāfā, yì zhāng fànzhuō gēn sì bǎ yǐzi.
example.translation: In the living room, there is a sofa set, a dining table, and four chairs.

example.cn: 客厅里有一套沙发、一张饭桌跟四把椅子。
example.py: Kètīng lǐ yǒu yí tào shāfā, yì zhāng fànzhuō gēn sì bǎ yǐzi.
example.translation: In the living room, there is a sofa set, a dining table, and four chairs.

example.cn: 卧室里有一张床、一张书桌和一个书架。
example.py: Wòshì lǐ yǒu yì zhāng chuáng, yì zhāng shūzhuō hé yí ge shūjià.
example.translation: The bedroom has a bed, a desk, and a bookshelf.

example.cn: 卧室里有一张床、一张书桌和一个书架。
example.py: Wòshì lǐ yǒu yī zhāng chuáng, yī zhāng shūzhuō hé yī ge shūjià.
example.translation: The bedroom has a bed, a desk, and a bookshelf.

example.cn: 你们那里安静不安静?
example.py: Nǐmen nàli ānjìng bu ānjìng?
example.translation: Is it quiet over there?

example.cn: 非常安静。
example.py: Fēicháng ānjìng.
example.translation: Very quiet.

example.cn: 每个月房租多少钱？
example.py: Měi ge yuè fángzū duōshao qián?
example.translation: How much is the rent per month?

元.definition: (measure word for the basic Chinese monetary unit), yuan

example.cn: 八百五十元。
example.py: Bābǎi wǔshí yuán.
example.translation: Eight hundred and fifty yuan.

example.cn: 八百五十美元？人民币差不多是……有一点儿贵，能不能便宜点儿？
example.py: Bābǎi wǔshí Měiyuán? Rénmínbì chàbuduō shì… yǒu yìdiǎnr guì, néng bu néng piányi diǎnr?
example.translation: Eight hundred and fifty US dollars? In RMB that's about... That's a bit expensive. Can it be a little cheaper?

example.cn: 八百五十美元？人民币差不多是……有一点儿贵，能不能便宜点儿？
example.py: Bā bǎi wǔshí Měiyuán? Rénmínbì chàbuduō shì……yǒu yīdiǎnr guì, néng bu néng piányi diǎnr?
example.translation: Eight hundred and fifty US dollars? In RMB that's about... That's a bit expensive. Can it be a little cheaper?

example.cn: 八百五十美元？人民币差不多是……有一点儿贵，能不能便宜点儿？
example.py: bābǎi wǔshí měiyuán rénmínbì chàbuduō shì yǒu yìdiǎnr guì néng bù néng piányi diǎnr
example.translation: Eight hundred and fifty US dollars? In RMB that's about... That's a bit expensive. Can it be a little cheaper?

example.cn: 要多付一个月的房租当押金,搬出去的时候还给你。
example.py: Yào duō fù yí ge yuè de fángzū dāng yājīn, bān chūqù de shíhou huán gěi nǐ.
example.translation: You need to pay one extra month's rent as a security deposit, which will be returned to you when you move out.

example.cn: 要多付一个月的房租当押金,搬出去的时候还给你。另外,我们公寓不准养宠物。
example.py: yào duō fù yí ge yuè de fáng zū dāng yā jīn bān chū qù de shí hou huán gěi nǐ lìng wài wǒ men gōng yù bù zhǔn yǎng chǒng wù
example.translation: You need to pay one extra month's rent as a security deposit, which will be returned to you when you move out. Also, pets are not allowed in our apartment.

example.cn: 要多付一个月的房租当押金,搬出去的时候还给你。另外,我们公寓不准养宠物。
example.py: yào duō fù yí ge yuè de fáng zū dāng yā jīn bān chū qù de shí hou huán gěi nǐ lìng wài wǒ men gōng yù bù zhǔn yǎng chǒng wù
example.translation: You need to pay one extra month's rent as a security deposit, which will be returned to you when you move out. Also, pets are not allowed in our apartment.

example.cn: 另外,我们公寓不准养宠物。
example.py: Lìngwài, wǒmen gōngyù bù zhǔn yǎng chǒngwù.
example.translation: Also, pets are not allowed in our apartment.

example.cn: 要多付一个月的房租当押金,搬出去的时候还给你。另外,我们公寓不准养宠物。
example.py: yào duō fù yí ge yuè de fáng zū dāng yā jīn bān chū qù de shí hou huán gěi nǐ lìng wài wǒ men gōng yù bù zhǔn yǎng chǒng wù
example.translation: You need to pay one extra month's rent as a security deposit, which will be returned to you when you move out. Also, pets are not allowed in our apartment.

example.cn: 另外,我们公寓不准养宠物。
example.py: Lìngwài, wǒmen gōngyù bù zhǔn yǎng chǒngwù.
example.translation: Also, pets are not allowed in our apartment.

example.cn: 我对养宠物没有兴趣,什么宠物都不养。
example.py: Wǒ duì yǎng chǒngwù méiyǒu xìngqù, shénme chǒngwù dōu bù yǎng.
example.translation: I'm not interested in keeping pets. I don't keep any pets.

example.cn: 你平常吃得那么多,又不运动,当然越来越胖了。
example.py: Nǐ píngcháng chī de nàme duō, yòu bú yùndòng, dāngrán yuèláiyuè pàng le.
example.translation: You usually eat so much, and you don't exercise. Of course you're getting fatter and fatter.

example.cn: 如果怕胖,你一个星期运动两、三次,每次半个小时,肚子就会小了。
example.py: Rúguǒ pà pàng, nǐ yí ge xīngqī yùndòng liǎng, sān cì, měi cì bàn ge xiǎoshí, dùzi jiù huì xiǎo le.
example.translation: If you're afraid of getting fat, exercise two or three times a week, for half an hour each time, and your belly will get smaller.

怕.definition: to fear, to be afraid of

example.cn: 游泳?我怕水,太危险了,淹死了怎么办?
example.py: Yóuyǒng? Wǒ pà shuǐ, tài wēixiǎn le, yānsǐ le zěnmebàn?
example.translation: Swimming? I'm afraid of water. It's too dangerous. What if I drown?

example.cn: 最简单的运动是跑步。
example.py: Zuì jiǎndān de yùndòng shì pǎobù.
example.translation: The simplest exercise is jogging.

example.cn: 冬天那么冷,夏天那么热,跑步太难受了。
example.py: Dōngtiān nàme lěng, xiàtiān nàme rè, pǎobù tài nánshòu le.
example.translation: It's so cold in the winter and so hot in the summer. Jogging is too unbearable.

example.cn: 最简单的运动是跑步。
example.py: zuì jiǎndān de yùndòng shì pǎobù
example.translation: The simplest exercise is jogging.

example.cn: 冬天那么冷,夏天那么热,跑步太难受了。
example.py: Dōngtiān nàme lěng, xiàtiān nàme rè, pǎobù tài nánshòu le.
example.translation: It's so cold in the winter and so hot in the summer. Jogging is too unbearable.

example.cn: 你打网球吧。
example.py: Nǐ dǎ wǎngqiú ba.
example.translation: How about you play tennis?

example.cn: 打网球得买网球拍、网球鞋,你知道,网球拍、网球鞋贵极了!
example.py: Dǎ wǎngqiú děi mǎi wǎngqiúpāi, wǎngqiúxié, nǐ zhīdào, wǎngqiúpāi, wǎngqiúxié guì jí le!
example.translation: To play tennis, you have to buy a racket and tennis shoes. You know, rackets and tennis shoes are extremely expensive!

拍.definition: to take a picture, to shoot a film

example.cn: 历史的脚步声。来中国以前爸爸让我找他上的那个中学。一会儿我给他发微信,告诉他南京变化太大,那个中学已经找不到了,再把今天拍的照片发给他看看。
example.py: lì shǐ de jiǎo bù shēng lái zhōng guó yǐ qián bà ba ràng wǒ zhǎo tā shàng de nà ge zhōng xué yī huìr wǒ gěi tā fā wēi xìn gào su tā nán jīng biàn huà tài dà nà ge zhōng xué yǐ jīng zhǎo bu dào le zài bǎ jīn tiān pāi de zhào piàn fā gěi tā kàn kan
example.translation: The sound of history's footsteps. Before I came to China, my dad asked me to find the middle school he attended. In a bit, I'll send him a WeChat message, telling him Nanjing has changed so much that his school can't be found anymore, and I'll send him the photos I took today.

example.cn: 找几个人打篮球吧。
example.py: Zhǎo jǐ ge rén dǎ lánqiú ba.
example.translation: Then find a few people to play basketball.

example.cn: 你去游泳吧。
example.py: Nǐ qù yóuyǒng ba.
example.translation: Then go swimming.

example.cn: 游泳?我怕水,太危险了,淹死了怎么办?
example.py: Yóuyǒng? Wǒ pà shuǐ, tài wēixiǎn le, yān sǐ le zěnmebàn?
example.translation: Swimming? I'm afraid of water. It's too dangerous. What if I drown?

example.cn: 游泳?我怕水,太危险了,淹死了怎么办?
example.py: Yóuyǒng? Wǒ pà shuǐ, tài wēixiǎn le, yān sǐ le zěnme bàn?
example.translation: Swimming? I'm afraid of water. It's too dangerous. What if I drown?

example.cn: 你不愿意运动,那就胖下去吧。
example.py: Nǐ bù yuànyì yùndòng, nà jiù pàng xiàqù ba.
example.translation: If you're not willing to exercise, then just keep getting fatter.

example.cn: 王朋的妹妹王红刚从北京来,要在美国上大学,现在住在高小音家里学英文。
example.py: Wáng Péng de mèimei Wáng Hóng gāng cóng Běijīng lái, yào zài Měiguó shàng dàxué, xiànzài zhù zài Gāo Xiǎoyīn jiā lǐ xué Yīngwén.
example.translation: Wang Peng's younger sister, Wang Hong, just came from Beijing. She is going to attend college in the U.S. and is now living at Gao Xiaoyin's house to learn English.

example.cn: 王朋的妹妹王红刚从北京来,要在美国上大学,现在住在高小音家里学英文。为了提高英文水平,她每天都看两个小时的电视。
example.py: Wáng Péng de mèimei Wáng Hóng gāng cóng Běijīng lái yào zài Měiguó shàng dàxué xiànzài zhù zài Gāo Xiǎoyīn jiā li xué Yīngwén wèile tígāo Yīngwén shuǐpíng tā měitiān dōu kàn liǎng ge xiǎoshí de diànshì
example.translation: Wang Peng's younger sister, Wang Hong, just came from Beijing. She is going to attend college in the U.S. and is now living at Gao Xiaoyin's house to learn English. To improve her English, she watches two hours of TV every day.

提高.definition: to improve, to raise, to heighten

example.cn: 为了提高英文水平,她每天都看两个小时的电视。
example.py: Wèile tígāo Yīngwén shuǐpíng, tā měitiān dōu kàn liǎng ge xiǎoshí de diànshì.
example.translation: To improve her English, she watches two hours of TV every day.

example.cn: 王朋的妹妹王红刚从北京来,要在美国上大学,现在住在高小音家里学英文。为了提高英文水平,她每天都看两个小时的电视。
example.py: Wáng Péng de mèimei Wáng Hóng gāng cóng Běijīng lái yào zài Měiguó shàng dàxué xiànzài zhù zài Gāo Xiǎoyīn jiā li xué Yīngwén wèile tígāo Yīngwén shuǐpíng tā měitiān dōu kàn liǎng ge xiǎoshí de diànshì
example.translation: Wang Peng's younger sister, Wang Hong, just came from Beijing. She is going to attend college in the U.S. and is now living at Gao Xiaoyin's house to learn English. To improve her English, she watches two hours of TV every day.

example.cn: 这不是国际足球,这是美式足球。
example.py: Zhè bú shì guójì zúqiú, zhè shì Měishì zúqiú.
example.translation: This isn't international football; this is American football.

example.cn: 快把电视打开,足球比赛开始了。
example.py: Kuài bǎ diànshì dǎkāi, zúqiú bǐsài kāishǐ le.
example.translation: Quick, turn on the TV. The football game is starting.

example.cn: 这不是国际足球,这是美式足球。
example.py: Zhè bú shì guójì zúqiú, zhè shì Měishì zúqiú.
example.translation: This isn't international football; this is American football.

example.cn: 美式足球可以用手。
example.py: Měishì zúqiú kěyǐ yòng shǒu.
example.translation: You can use your hands in American football.

example.cn: 足球应该用脚踢,为什么那个人用手抱着跑呢?
example.py: Zúqiú yīnggāi yòng jiǎo tī, wèishénme nà ge rén yòng shǒu bào zhe pǎo ne?
example.translation: Soccer should be played by kicking with the feet. Why is that person running with the ball in his hands?

example.cn: 足球应该用脚踢,为什么那个人用手抱着跑呢?
example.py: zúqiú yīnggāi yòng jiǎo tī wèishénme nàge rén yòng shǒu bào zhe pǎo ne
example.translation: Soccer should be played by kicking with the feet. Why is that person running with the ball in his hands?

example.cn: 足球应该用脚踢,为什么那个人用手抱着跑呢?
example.py: Zúqiú yīnggāi yòng jiǎo tī, wèishénme nàge rén yòng shǒu bàozhe pǎo ne?
example.translation: Soccer should be played by kicking with the feet. Why is that person running with the ball in his hands?

example.cn: 美式足球可以用手。
example.py: Měishì zúqiú kěyǐ yòng shǒu.
example.translation: You can use your hands in American football.

抱.definition: to hold or carry in the arms

example.cn: 足球应该用脚踢,为什么那个人用手抱着跑呢?
example.py: zúqiú yīnggāi yòng jiǎo tī wèishénme nàge rén yòng shǒu bào zhe pǎo ne
example.translation: Soccer should be played by kicking with the feet. Why is that person running with the ball in his hands?

压.definition: to press, to hold down, to weigh down

example.cn: 你看,你看,那么多人都压在一起,下面的人不是要被压坏了吗?
example.py: nǐ kàn nǐ kàn nàme duō rén dōu yā zài yìqǐ xiàmiàn de rén bú shì yào bèi yā huài le ma
example.translation: Look, look! So many people are piled on top of each other. Won't the person at the bottom be crushed?

example.cn: 下面的人不是要被压坏了吗?
example.py: xiàmiàn de rén búshì yào bèi yā huài le ma?
example.translation: Won't the person at the bottom be crushed?

example.cn: 别担心,他们的身体都很棒,而且还穿特别的运动服,没问题。
example.py: Bié dānxīn, tāmen de shēntǐ dōu hěn bàng, érqiě hái chuān tèbié de yùndòngfú, méi wèntí.
example.translation: Don't worry. Their bodies are very strong, and they are wearing special sports uniforms. It's no problem.

example.cn: 别担心,他们的身体都很棒,而且还穿特别的运动服,没问题。
example.py: bié dānxīn tāmen de shēntǐ dōu hěn bàng érqiě hái chuān tèbié de yùndòngfú méi wèntí
example.translation: Don't worry. Their bodies are very strong, and they are wearing special sports uniforms. It's no problem.

example.cn: 别担心,他们的身体都很棒,而且还穿特别的运动服,没问题。
example.py: bié dānxīn tāmen de shēntǐ dōu hěn bàng érqiě hái chuān tèbié de yùndòngfú méi wèntí
example.translation: Don't worry. Their bodies are very strong, and they are wearing special sports uniforms. It's no problem.

半天.definition: half a day, a long time

example.cn: 我看了半天也看不懂。
example.py: Wǒ kànle bàntiān yě kàn bu dǒng.
example.translation: I've been watching for a long time and still don't get it.

example.cn: 那我马上给旅行社打电话订飞机票。
example.py: Nà wǒ mǎshàng gěi lǚxíngshè dǎ diànhuà dìng fēijīpiào.
example.translation: In that case, I'll call the travel agency right away to book the plane tickets.

放假.definition: go on vacation, have time off

example.cn: 马上就要放假了,我们的同学,有的去暑期班学习,有的去公司实习,有的回家打工,你有什么计划?
example.py: mǎshàng jiù yào fàng jià le, wǒmen de tóngxué, yǒude qù shǔqībān xuéxí, yǒude qù gōngsī shíxí, yǒude huí jiā dǎgōng, nǐ yǒu shénme jìhuà?
example.translation: We're about to start our vacation. Some of our classmates are going to summer school, some are interning at companies, and some are going home to work. What are your plans?

example.cn: 李友,时间过得真快,马上就要放假了,我们的同学,有的去暑期班学习,有的去公司实习,有的回家打工,你有什么计划?
example.py: Lǐ Yǒu, shíjiān guò de zhēn kuài, mǎshàng jiù yào fàngjià le, wǒmen de tóngxué, yǒude qù shǔqībān xuéxí, yǒude qù gōngsī shíxí, yǒude huí jiā dǎgōng, nǐ yǒu shénme jìhuà?
example.translation: Li You, time flies. We're about to start our vacation. Some of our classmates are going to summer school, some are interning at companies, and some are going home to work. What are your plans?

example.cn: 李友,时间过得真快,马上就要放假了,我们的同学,有的去暑期班学习,有的去公司实习,有的回家打工,你有什么计划?
example.py: lǐ yǒu shí jiān guò de zhēn kuài mǎ shàng jiù yào fàng jià le wǒ men de tóng xué yǒu de qù shǔ qī bān xué xí yǒu de qù gōng sī shí xí yǒu de huí jiā dǎ gōng nǐ yǒu shén me jì huà
example.translation: Li You, time flies. We're about to start our vacation. Some of our classmates are going to summer school, some are interning at companies, and some are going home to work. What are your plans?

example.cn: 李友,时间过得真快,马上就要放假了,我们的同学,有的去暑期班学习,有的去公司实习,有的回家打工,你有什么计划?
example.py: Lǐ Yǒu, shíjiān guò de zhēn kuài, mǎshàng jiù yào fàngjià le, wǒmen de tóngxué, yǒude qù shǔqībān xuéxí, yǒude qù gōngsī shíxí, yǒude huí jiā dǎgōng, nǐ yǒu shénme jìhuà?
example.translation: Li You, time flies. We're about to start our vacation. Some of our classmates are going to summer school, some are interning at companies, and some are going home to work. What are your plans?

打工.definition: to work at a temporary job (often part time)

example.cn: 我们的同学,有的去暑期班学习,有的去公司实习,有的回家打工,你有什么计划?
example.py: Wǒmen de tóngxué, yǒude qù shǔqībān xuéxí, yǒude qù gōngsī shíxí, yǒude huíjiā dǎgōng, nǐ yǒu shénme jìhuà?
example.translation: Some of our classmates are going to summer school, some are interning at companies, and some are going home to work. What are your plans?

example.cn: 你有什么计划?
example.py: Nǐ yǒu shénme jìhuà?
example.translation: What are your plans?

example.cn: 我暑假打算回北京去看父母。
example.py: Wǒ shǔjià dǎsuàn huí Běijīng qù kàn fùmǔ.
example.translation: I plan to go back to Beijing to see my parents during the summer break.

example.cn: 我暑假打算回北京去看父母。
example.py: Wǒ shǔjià dǎsuàn huí Běijīng qù kàn fùmǔ.
example.translation: I plan to go back to Beijing to see my parents during the summer break.

example.cn: 我暑假打算回北京去看父母。
example.py: Wǒ shǔjià dǎsuàn huí Běijīng qù kàn fùmǔ.
example.translation: I plan to go back to Beijing to see my parents during the summer break.

example.cn: 北京是中国的首都,也是中国的政治、文化中心,有很多名胜古迹。
example.py: Běijīng shì Zhōngguó de shǒudū, yěshì Zhōngguó de zhèngzhì, wénhuà zhōngxīn, yǒu hěnduō míngshèng gǔjì.
example.translation: Of course. Beijing is China's capital, and it's also China's political and cultural center, with many famous scenic spots and historical sites.

example.cn: 当然。北京是中国的首都,也是中国的政治、文化中心,有很多名胜古迹。
example.py: dāngrán Běijīng shì Zhōngguó de shǒudū yě shì Zhōngguó de zhèngzhì wénhuà zhōngxīn yǒu hěn duō míngshèng gǔjì
example.translation: Of course. Beijing is China's capital, and it's also China's political and cultural center, with many famous scenic spots and historical sites.

example.cn: 当然。北京是中国的首都,也是中国的政治、文化中心,有很多名胜古迹。
example.py: dāngrán Běijīng shì Zhōngguó de shǒudū yě shì Zhōngguó de zhèngzhì wénhuà zhōngxīn yǒu hěn duō míngshèng gǔjì
example.translation: Of course. Beijing is China's capital, and it's also China's political and cultural center, with many famous scenic spots and historical sites.

名胜古迹.definition: famous scenic spots and historic sites

example.cn: 北京是中国的首都,也是中国的政治、文化中心,有很多名胜古迹。
example.py: Běijīng shì Zhōngguó de shǒudū, yě shì Zhōngguó de zhèngzhì, wénhuà zhōngxīn, yǒu hěn duō míngshèng gǔjì.
example.translation: Of course. Beijing is China's capital, and it's also China's political and cultural center, with many famous scenic spots and historical sites.

example.cn: 对啊,长城很有名。
example.py: Duì a, Chángchéng hěn yǒumíng.
example.translation: That's right, the Great Wall is very famous.

example.cn: 那你跟我一起回去吧,我当你的导游。
example.py: Nà nǐ gēn wǒ yìqǐ huíqù ba, wǒ dāng nǐ de dǎoyóu.
example.translation: Then why don't you go back with me? I can be your tour guide.

example.cn: 护照我已经有了,我得赶快办签证。
example.py: Hùzhào wǒ yǐjīng yǒu le, wǒ děi gǎnkuài bàn qiānzhèng.
example.translation: I already have my passport, I need to hurry up and apply for a visa.

example.cn: 护照我已经有了,我得赶快办签证。
example.py: Hùzhào wǒ yǐjīng yǒule, wǒ děi gǎnkuài bàn qiānzhèng.
example.translation: I already have my passport, I need to hurry up and apply for a visa.

example.cn: 那我马上给旅行社打电话订飞机票。
example.py: Nà wǒ mǎshàng gěi lǚxíngshè dǎ diànhuà dìng fēijīpiào.
example.translation: In that case, I'll call the travel agency right away to book the plane tickets.

订.definition: to reserve, to book (a ticket, a hotel room, etc.)

example.cn: 那我马上给旅行社打电话订飞机票。
example.py: Nà wǒ mǎshàng gěi lǚxíngshè dǎ diànhuà dìng fēijīpiào.
example.translation: In that case, I'll call the travel agency right away to book the plane tickets.

example.cn: 对啊,长城很有名。
example.py: Duì a, Chángchéng hěn yǒumíng.
example.translation: That's right, the Great Wall is very famous.

example.cn: 真的?我去过香港、台北,还没去过北京,要是能去北京就好了。
example.py: Zhēn de? Wǒ qùguo Xiānggǎng, Táiběi, hái méi qùguo Běijīng, yàoshi néng qù Běijīng jiù hǎo le.
example.translation: Really? I've been to Hong Kong and Taipei, but I've never been to Beijing. It would be great if I could go to Beijing.

example.cn: 真的?我去过香港、台北,还没去过北京,要是能去北京就好了。
example.py: Zhēn de? Wǒ qùguo Xiānggǎng, Táiběi, hái méi qùguo Běijīng, yàoshi néng qù Běijīng jiù hǎo le.
example.translation: Really? I've been to Hong Kong and Taipei, but I've never been to Beijing. It would be great if I could go to Beijing.

example.cn: 你好。请问六月初到北京的机票多少钱?
example.py: nǐhǎo qǐngwèn liùyuè chū dào Běijīng de jīpiào duōshao qián
example.translation: Hello. How much is a plane ticket to Beijing for early June?

example.cn: 对。农历五月初五端午节…………
example.py: duì nónglì wǔyuè chūwǔ duānwǔjié
example.translation: Right. The Dragon Boat Festival is on the fifth day of the fifth lunar month...

example.cn: 您要买单程票还是往返票?
example.py: Nín yào mǎi dānchéng piào háishi wǎngfǎn piào?
example.translation: Would you like a one-way ticket or a round-trip ticket?

往返.definition: make a round trip, go there and back

example.cn: 我要买两张往返票。
example.py: Wǒ yào mǎi liǎng zhāng wǎngfǎn piào.
example.translation: I'd like to buy two round-trip tickets.

example.cn: 你想买哪家航空公司的?
example.py: nǐ xiǎng mǎi nǎ jiā hángkōng gōngsī de
example.translation: Which airline's tickets would you like to buy?

example.cn: 请等等,我查一下……
example.py: Qǐng děngděng, wǒ chá yíxià…
example.translation: Please wait, let me check...

example.cn: 好几家航空公司都有航班。
example.py: Hǎojǐ jiā hángkōng gōngsī dōu yǒu hángbān.
example.translation: Several airlines have flights.

example.cn: 请等等,我查一下……好几家航空公司都有航班。中国国际航空公司,一千五,直飞。西北航空公司正在打折,差不多一千四百六十,可是要转机。
example.py: qǐng děng deng wǒ chá yíxià hǎo jǐ jiā hángkōng gōngsī dōu yǒu hángbān zhōngguó guójì hángkōng gōngsī yì qiān wǔ zhí fēi xīběi hángkōng gōngsī zhèngzài dǎzhé chàbuduō yì qiān sì bǎi liù shí kěshì yào zhuǎnjī

靠.definition: to lean on, to lean against, to be next to

example.cn: 可以。你们喜欢靠窗户的还是靠走道的?
example.py: kěyǐ nǐmen xǐhuan kào chuānghu de háishi kào zǒudào de
example.translation: Yes, you can. Do you prefer window seats or aisle seats?

example.cn: 你们喜欢靠窗户的还是靠走道的?
example.py: Nǐmen xǐhuan kào chuānghu de háishì kào zǒudào de?
example.translation: Do you prefer window seats or aisle seats?

example.cn: 你们喜欢靠窗户的还是靠走道的?
example.py: Nǐmen xǐhuan kào chuānghu de háishi kào zǒudào de?
example.translation: Do you prefer window seats or aisle seats?

example.cn: 对了,我朋友吃素,麻烦帮她订一份素餐。
example.py: Duìle, wǒ péngyou chīsù, máfan bāng tā dìng yí fèn sùcān.
example.translation: Oh, right, my friend is a vegetarian. Could you please order a vegetarian meal for her?

example.cn: 对了,我朋友吃素,麻烦帮她订一份素餐。
example.py: Duìle, wǒ péngyou chīsù, máfan bāng tā dìng yí fèn sùcān.
example.translation: Oh, right, my friend is a vegetarian. Could you please order a vegetarian meal for her?

example.cn: 您在北京要订旅馆、租车吗?
example.py: Nín zài Běijīng yào dìng lǚguǎn, zūchē ma?
example.translation: Do you need to book a hotel or rent a car in Beijing?

example.cn: 中国国际航空公司,一千五,直飞。
example.py: Zhōngguó Guójì Hángkōng Gōngsī, yìqiān wǔ, zhí fēi.
example.translation: Air China is 1500, direct flight.

example.cn: 西北航空公司正在打折,差不多一千四百六十,可是要转机。
