tokens.py: yì qiān sì bǎi liù shí

example.translation: Northwest Airlines is having a sale, it's about 1460, but you have to transfer.

example.cn: 你们有几件行李要托运?
example.py: Nǐmen yǒu jǐ jiàn xíngli yào tuōyùn?
example.translation: How many pieces of luggage are you checking?

example.cn: 这个包不托运,我们带上飞机。
example.py: Zhège bāo bù tuōyùn, wǒmen dài shàng fēijī.
example.translation: We're not checking this bag; we're carrying it on the plane.

example.cn: 这个包不托运,我们带上飞机。
example.py: Zhège bāo bù tuōyùn, wǒmen dài shàng fēijī.
example.translation: We're not checking this bag; we're carrying it on the plane.

example.cn: 麻烦您把箱子拿上来。
example.py: Máfan nín bǎ xiāngzi ná shànglai.
example.translation: Could you please put the suitcases up here?

超重.definition: to be overweight (of luggage, freight, etc.)

example.cn: 小姐,没超重吧?
example.py: Xiǎojiě, méi chāozhòng ba?
example.translation: Miss, they aren't overweight, are they?

example.cn: 小姐,没超重吧?
example.py: xiǎojiě méi chāozhòng ba
example.translation: Miss, they aren't overweight, are they?

example.cn: 没有。这是你们的护照、机票,这是登机牌。请到五号登机口上飞机。
example.py: Méiyǒu. Zhè shì nǐmen de hùzhào, jīpiào, zhè shì dēngjīpái. Qǐng dào wǔ hào dēngjīkǒu shàng fēijī.
example.translation: No, they're not. Here are your passports, tickets, and boarding passes. Please go to Gate 5 to board.

example.cn: 没有。这是你们的护照、机票,这是登机牌。请到五号登机口上飞机。
example.py: méiyǒu zhè shì nǐmen de hùzhào jīpiào zhè shì dēngjīpái qǐng dào wǔ hào dēngjīkǒu shàng fēijī
example.translation: No, they're not. Here are your passports, tickets, and boarding passes. Please go to Gate 5 to board.

example.cn: 没有。这是你们的护照、机票,这是登机牌。请到五号登机口上飞机。
example.py: Méiyǒu. Zhè shì nǐmen de hùzhào, jīpiào, zhè shì dēngjīpái. Qǐng dào wǔ hào dēngjīkǒu shàng fēijī.
example.translation: No, they're not. Here are your passports, tickets, and boarding passes. Please go to Gate 5 to board.

example.cn: 小红,别哭,我们几个星期就回来,你好好儿地学英文,别乱跑。
example.py: Xiǎo Hóng, bié kū, wǒmen jǐ ge xīngqī jiù huílai, nǐ hǎohāor de xué Yīngwén, bié luàn pǎo.
example.translation: Xiao Hong, don't cry. We'll be back in a few weeks. Study English hard and don't run around.

example.cn: 小红,别哭,我们几个星期就回来,你好好儿地学英文,别乱跑。
example.py: Xiǎo Hóng bié kū wǒmen jǐ ge xīngqī jiù huílai nǐ hǎohāor de xué Yīngwén bié luàn pǎo
example.translation: Xiao Hong, don't cry. We'll be back in a few weeks. Study English hard and don't run around.

照顾.definition: to look after, to care for, to attend to

example.cn: 别担心,我姐姐小音会照顾你。
example.py: Bié dānxīn, wǒ jiějie Xiǎoyīn huì zhàogu nǐ.
example.translation: Don't worry, my older sister Xiaoyin will take care of you.

example.cn: 飞机几点起飞?
example.py: Fēijī jǐ diǎn qǐfēi?
example.translation: What time does the plane take off?

example.cn: 开车小心。
example.py: Kāichē xiǎoxīn.
example.translation: Drive carefully.

一路平安.definition: have a good trip, bon voyage

example.cn: 祝你们一路平安。到了北京以后,别忘了给我们发个电子邮件。
example.py: Zhù nǐmen yí lù píng'ān. Dàole Běijīng yǐhòu, bié wàngle gěi wǒmen fā ge diànzǐ yóujiàn.
example.translation: Have a safe trip. After you get to Beijing, don't forget to send us an email.

example.cn: 叔叔，阿姨，你们好。
example.py: Shūshu, āyí, nǐmen hǎo.
example.translation: Uncle, Auntie, hello.

example.cn: 叔叔，阿姨，你们好。
example.py: Shūshu, āyí, nǐmen hǎo.
example.translation: Uncle, Auntie, hello.

example.cn: 欢迎你来北京。
example.py: Huānyíng nǐ lái Běijīng.
example.translation: Welcome to Beijing.

example.cn: 小朋，你好像瘦了点儿。是不是打工太忙，没有时间吃饭？
example.py: Xiǎo Péng nǐ hǎoxiàng shòu le diǎnr shì bu shì dǎ gōng tài máng méiyǒu shíjiān chī fàn
example.translation: Xiao Peng, you seem to have lost some weight. Were you too busy with your part-time job to eat?

example.cn: 走吧，我们上车以后，再慢慢儿地聊吧。爷爷、奶奶在烤鸭店等我们呢！
example.py: zǒu ba wǒmen shàng chē yǐhòu zài mànmānr de liáo ba yéye nǎinai zài kǎoyādiàn děng wǒmen ne
example.translation: Let's go. We can chat slowly after we get in the car. Grandpa and Grandma are waiting for us at the roast duck restaurant!

example.cn: 走吧，我们上车以后，再慢慢儿地聊吧。爷爷、奶奶在烤鸭店等我们呢！
example.py: zǒu ba wǒmen shàng chē yǐhòu zài mànmānr de liáo ba yéye nǎinai zài kǎoyādiàn děng wǒmen ne
example.translation: Let's go. We can chat slowly after we get in the car. Grandpa and Grandma are waiting for us at the roast duck restaurant!

example.cn: 爷爷、奶奶在烤鸭店等我们呢！
example.py: Yéye, nǎinai zài kǎoyā diàn děng wǒmen ne!
example.translation: Grandpa and Grandma are waiting for us at the roast duck restaurant!

example.cn: （在北京首都机场……）
example.py: (Zài Běijīng Shǒudū Jīchǎng…)
example.translation: (At the Beijing Capital Airport...)

example.cn: 快开学了,他家离大学很远,得坐飞机去学校。
example.py: Kuài kāixué le, tā jiā lí dàxué hěn yuǎn, děi zuò fēijī qù xuéxiào.
example.translation: The semester is about to start. His home is far from the university, so he has to take a plane to school.

example.cn: 你是新生吧?
example.py: nǐ shì xīnshēng ba
example.translation: You must be a new student, right?

example.cn: 下飞机以后,马上叫了一辆出租汽车,很快就到了学校宿舍。
example.py: Xià fēijī yǐhòu, mǎshàng jiào le yī liàng chūzū qìchē, hěn kuài jiù dào le xuéxiào sùshè.
example.translation: He was on the plane for more than two hours. After getting off, he immediately hailed a taxi and quickly arrived at the school dormitory.

example.cn: 我是研究生。
example.py: Wǒ shì yánjiūshēng.
example.translation: I'm a graduate student.

example.cn: 可是我是美国出生,在美国长大的。
example.py: Kěshì wǒ shì Měiguó chūshēng, zài Měiguó zhǎngdà de.
example.translation: But I was born and grew up in the United States.

example.cn: 张是弓长张,就是一张纸的张,天是天气的天,明是明天的明。
example.py: Zhāng shì gōng cháng Zhāng, jiùshì yī zhāng zhǐ de zhāng, tiān shì tiānqì de tiān, míng shì míngtiān de míng.
example.translation: Zhang is 'gong-chang Zhang' (bow-long Zhang), as in a sheet of paper. Tian is 'tianqi de tian' (weather's tian). Ming is 'mingtian de ming' (tomorrow's ming).

example.cn: 不,这是新生宿舍,我住在校外。
example.py: Bù, zhè shì xīnshēng sùshè, wǒ zhù zài xiàowài.
example.translation: No, this is the freshman dorm. I live off campus.

example.cn: 你觉得住在校内好,还是住在校外好?
example.py: Nǐ juéde zhù zài xiàonèi hǎo, háishì zhù zài xiàowài hǎo?
example.translation: Do you think it's better to live on campus or off campus?

example.cn: 有的人喜欢住在学校宿舍,觉得又方便又安全,有的人喜欢住在校外,因为校外的房子比较便宜。
example.py: Yǒu de rén xǐhuan zhù zài xuéxiào sùshè, juéde yòu fāngbiàn yòu ānquán, yǒu de rén xǐhuan zhù zài xiàowài, yīnwèi xiàowài de fángzi bǐjiào piányi.
example.translation: Some people like to live in the school dorms; they think it's convenient and safe. Some people like to live off campus because off-campus housing is cheaper.

example.cn: 有的人喜欢住在学校宿舍,觉得又方便又安全,有的人喜欢住在校外,因为校外的房子比较便宜。我住在校外,除了想省点儿钱以外,还因为住在校外自由。再说,住在校内也不见得很方便。
example.py: yǒu de rén xǐ huan zhù zài xué xiào sù shè jué de yòu fāng biàn yòu ān quán yǒu de rén xǐ huan zhù zài xiào wài yīn wèi xiào wài de fáng zi bǐ jiào pián yi wǒ zhù zài xiào wài chú le xiǎng shěng diǎnr qián yǐ wài hái yīn wèi zhù zài xiào wài zì yóu zài shuō zhù zài xiào nèi yě bú jiàn dé hěn fāng biàn
example.translation: Some people like to live in the school dorms; they think it's convenient and safe. Some people like to live off campus because off-campus housing is cheaper. I live off campus. Besides wanting to save some money, it's also because of the freedom. On top of that, living on campus isn't necessarily very convenient.

example.cn: 我住在校外,除了想省点儿钱以外,还因为住在校外自由。
example.py: Wǒ zhù zài xiàowài, chúle xiǎng shěng diǎnr qián yǐwài, hái yīnwèi zhù zài xiàowài zìyóu.
example.translation: I live off campus. Besides wanting to save some money, it's also because of the freedom.

example.cn: 再说,住在校内也不见得很方便。
example.py: Zàishuō, zhù zài xiàonèi yě bújiànde hěn fāngbiàn.
example.translation: On top of that, living on campus isn't necessarily very convenient.

example.cn: 你刚来,在学校住对你有好处,可以适应一下学校的生活。要是你以后想搬家,我可以帮你找房子。
example.py: nǐ gāng lái zài xuéxiào zhù duì nǐ yǒu hǎochu kěyǐ shìyìng yíxià xuéxiào de shēnghuó yàoshi nǐ yǐhòu xiǎng bānjiā wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ zhǎo fángzi
example.translation: You just arrived. It's good for you to live on campus to get used to school life. If you want to move in the future, I can help you find a place.

适应.definition: to adapt, to become accustomed to

example.cn: 你刚来,在学校住对你有好处,可以适应一下学校的生活。要是你以后想搬家,我可以帮你找房子。
example.py: nǐ gāng lái zài xuéxiào zhù duì nǐ yǒu hǎochu kěyǐ shìyìng yíxià xuéxiào de shēnghuó yàoshi nǐ yǐhòu xiǎng bānjiā wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ zhǎo fángzi
example.translation: You just arrived. It's good for you to live on campus to get used to school life. If you want to move in the future, I can help you find a place.

example.cn: 你刚来,在学校住对你有好处,可以适应一下学校的生活。
example.py: Nǐ gāng lái, zài xuéxiào zhù duì nǐ yǒu hǎochu, kěyǐ shìyìng yīxià xuéxiào de shēnghuó.
example.translation: You just arrived. It's good for you to live on campus to get used to school life.

example.cn: 要是你以后想搬家,我可以帮你找房子。
example.py: Yàoshi nǐ yǐhòu xiǎng bānjiā, wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ zhǎo fángzi.
example.translation: If you want to move in the future, I can help you find a place.

example.cn: 好吧,我以后要是搬家,一定请你帮忙。
example.py: Hǎo ba, wǒ yǐhòu yàoshi bānjiā, yīdìng qǐng nǐ bāngmáng.
example.translation: Okay. If I move in the future, I'll definitely ask for your help.

example.cn: 好,谢谢。哎,我的电脑呢?……糟糕,电脑可能拉在出租车上了!
example.py: hǎo xièxie āi wǒ de diànnǎo ne zāogāo diànnǎo kěnéng là zài chūzūchē shàng le
example.translation: Okay, thank you. Oh, where's my computer? ...Oh no, I might have left my computer in the taxi!

example.cn: 我叫张天明。
example.py: wǒ jiào zhāng tiānmíng
example.translation: My name is Zhang Tianming.

example.cn: 我正在学中文,我的中文名字是柯林。
example.py: Wǒ zhèngzài xué Zhōngwén, wǒ de Zhōngwén míngzi shì Kē Lín.
example.translation: I'm learning Chinese. My Chinese name is Ke Lin.

example.cn: 他的同屋已经来了。
example.py: Tā de tóngwū yǐjīng lái le.
example.translation: His roommate has already arrived.

example.cn: 张天明宿舍的房间不太大,住两个人。他的同屋已经来了。房间里家具不多,靠窗户摆着两张书桌,每张桌子的前边有一把椅子。书桌的旁边是床,床上有被子和毯子。床旁边有两个衣柜,柜子里挂着一些衣服。门右边放着两个书架,书架还是空的。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng sùshè de fángjiān bú tài dà zhù liǎng ge rén tā de tóngwū yǐjīng lái le fángjiān lǐ jiājù bù duō kào chuānghu bǎi zhe liǎng zhāng shūzhuō měi zhāng zhuōzi de qiánbian yǒu yì bǎ yǐzi shūzhuō de pángbiān shì chuáng chuáng shàng yǒu bèizi hé tǎnzi chuáng pángbiān yǒu liǎng ge yīguì guìzi lǐ guà zhe yìxiē yīfu mén yòubian fàng zhe liǎng ge shūjià shūjià háishi kōng de
example.translation: Zhang Tianming's dorm room is not very big; two people live there. His roommate has already arrived. There isn't much furniture in the room. Against the window, there are two desks. In front of each desk, there is a chair. Next to the desks are beds, with quilts and blankets on them. Next to the beds are two wardrobes, with some clothes hanging inside. To the right of the door are two bookshelves, which are still empty.

example.cn: 床上有被子和毯子。
example.py: Chuáng shàng yǒu bèizi hé tǎnzi.
example.translation: Next to the desks are beds, with quilts and blankets on them.

example.cn: 床上有被子和毯子。
example.py: Chuáng shàng yǒu bèizi hé tǎnzi.
example.translation: ...with quilts and blankets on them.

example.cn: 床旁边有两个衣柜,柜子里挂着一些衣服。
example.py: Chuáng pángbiān yǒu liǎng ge yīguì, guìzi lǐ guàzhe yīxiē yīfu.
example.translation: Next to the beds are two wardrobes, with some clothes hanging inside.

example.cn: 张天明宿舍的房间不太大,住两个人。他的同屋已经来了。房间里家具不多,靠窗户摆着两张书桌,每张桌子的前边有一把椅子。书桌的旁边是床,床上有被子和毯子。床旁边有两个衣柜,柜子里挂着一些衣服。门右边放着两个书架,书架还是空的。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng sùshè de fángjiān bú tài dà zhù liǎng ge rén tā de tóngwū yǐjīng lái le fángjiān lǐ jiājù bù duō kào chuānghu bǎi zhe liǎng zhāng shūzhuō měi zhāng zhuōzi de qiánbian yǒu yì bǎ yǐzi shūzhuō de pángbiān shì chuáng chuáng shàng yǒu bèizi hé tǎnzi chuáng pángbiān yǒu liǎng ge yīguì guìzi lǐ guà zhe yìxiē yīfu mén yòubian fàng zhe liǎng ge shūjià shūjià háishi kōng de
example.translation: Zhang Tianming's dorm room is not very big; two people live there. His roommate has already arrived. There isn't much furniture in the room. Against the window, there are two desks. In front of each desk, there is a chair. Next to the desks are beds, with quilts and blankets on them. Next to the beds are two wardrobes, with some clothes hanging inside. To the right of the door are two bookshelves, which are still empty.

example.cn: 柜子里挂着一些衣服。
example.py: Guìzi lǐ guàzhe yīxiē yīfu.
example.translation: with some clothes hanging inside.

example.cn: 门右边放着两个书架,书架还是空的。
example.py: Mén yòubian fàngzhe liǎng ge shūjià, shūjià háishi kōng de.
example.translation: To the right of the door are two bookshelves, which are still empty.

example.cn: 张天明这个学期选了四门课：世界历史、电脑、政治学和中文。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng zhège xuéqī xuǎn le sì mén kè: shìjiè lìshǐ, diànnǎo, zhèngzhìxué hé Zhōngwén.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming took four courses this semester: world history, computer science, political science, and Chinese.

example.cn: 书架还是空的。
example.py: Shūjià háishi kōng de.
example.translation: which are still empty.

example.cn: 房间里怎么没有空调？
example.py: Fángjiān lǐ zěnme méiyǒu kōngtiáo?
example.translation: How come there's no air conditioning in the room?

example.cn: 这栋楼比较旧,我大一的时候在这儿住过。
example.py: zhè dòng lóu bǐjiào jiù wǒ dàyī de shíhou zài zhèr zhù guo
example.translation: This building is relatively old. I lived here when I was a freshman.

example.cn: 这栋楼比较旧。
example.py: Zhè dòng lóu bǐjiào jiù.
example.translation: This building is relatively old.

恐怕.definition: I'm afraid that, I think perhaps, probably

example.cn: 住在这儿恐怕很不方便吧?
example.py: Zhù zài zhèr kǒngpà hěn bù fāngbiàn ba?
example.translation: I'm afraid it's not very convenient to live here, is it?

example.cn: 餐厅旁边有一个小商店,卖日用品和文具。
example.py: Cāntīng pángbiān yǒu yí ge xiǎo shāngdiàn, mài rìyòngpǐn hé wénjù.
example.translation: Next to the cafeteria, there is a small store that sells daily necessities and stationery.

example.cn: 餐厅旁边有一个小商店,卖日用品和文具。
example.py: Cāntīng pángbiān yǒu yí ge xiǎo shāngdiàn, mài rìyòngpǐn hé wénjù.
example.translation: Next to the cafeteria, there is a small store that sells daily necessities and stationery.

example.cn: 方便得很。这层楼有三台洗衣机和三台干衣机。
example.py: fāngbiàn de hěn zhè céng lóu yǒu sān tái xǐyījī hé sān tái gānyījī
example.translation: Extremely convenient. This floor has three washing machines and three dryers.

层.definition: (measure word for stories of a building)

example.cn: 方便得很。这层楼有三台洗衣机和三台干衣机。
example.py: fāngbiàn de hěn zhè céng lóu yǒu sān tái xǐyījī hé sān tái gānyījī
example.translation: Extremely convenient. This floor has three washing machines and three dryers.

example.cn: 这层楼有三台洗衣机和三台干衣机。
example.py: Zhè céng lóu yǒu sān tái xǐyījī hé sān tái gānyījī.
example.translation: This floor has three washing machines and three dryers.

example.cn: 这层楼有三台洗衣机和三台干衣机。
example.py: Zhè céng lóu yǒu sān tái xǐyījī hé sān tái gānyīji.
example.translation: This floor has three washing machines and three dryers.

example.cn: 这层楼有三台洗衣机和三台干衣机。
example.py: Zhè céng lóu yǒu sān tái xǐyījī hé sān tái gānyīji.
example.translation: This floor has three washing machines and three dryers.

example.cn: 不吵,这儿离大马路很远,很安静。
example.py: Bù chǎo, zhèr lí dà mǎlù hěn yuǎn, hěn ānjìng.
example.translation: Not noisy. It's far from the main road here, very quiet.

example.cn: 听说学校餐厅的饭一般都不太好。
example.py: Tīngshuō xuéxiào cāntīng de fàn yìbān dōu bú tài hǎo.
example.translation: I hear the food in the school cafeteria is generally not very good.

example.cn: 你说对了,餐厅的饭真的不怎么样。
example.py: Nǐ shuō duì le, cāntīng de fàn zhēn de bù zěnmeyàng.
example.translation: You're right. The cafeteria's food is really not that great.

example.cn: 你别着急。
example.py: Nǐ bié zháojí.
example.translation: Don't worry.

example.cn: 附近有很多饭馆儿，还有一家中国餐馆儿呢。
example.py: Fùjìn yǒu hěn duō fànguǎnr, hái yǒu yī jiā Zhōngguó cānguǎnr ne.
example.translation: There are many restaurants nearby, and there's also a Chinese restaurant.

example.cn: 附近那家中国餐馆儿的菜就很地道。
example.py: Fùjìn nà jiā Zhōngguó cānguǎnr de cài jiù hěn dìdao.
example.translation: The dishes at that Chinese restaurant nearby are very authentic.

example.cn: 那么过几天你带我去那儿看看，好吗？
example.py: Nàme guò jǐ tiān nǐ dài wǒ qù nàr kànkan, hǎo ma?
example.translation: Then in a few days, could you take me there to have a look, okay?

example.cn: 今天是周末,功课也做完了,张天明就给柯林发微信,说他和他的女朋友丽莎想吃中国饭,问他想不想去。柯林说正好他也想吃中国饭,就让张天明和丽莎在宿舍门口等着,他开车来接他们。
example.py: jīntiān shì zhōumò gōngkè yě zuò wán le Zhāng Tiānmíng jiù gěi Kē Lín fā wēixìn shuō tā hé tā de nǚpéngyou Lìshā xiǎng chī Zhōngguó fàn wèn tā xiǎng bu xiǎng qù Kē Lín shuō zhènghǎo tā yě xiǎng chī Zhōngguó fàn jiù ràng Zhāng Tiānmíng hé Lìshā zài sùshè ménkǒu děng zhe tā kāi chē lái jiē tāmen
example.translation: Today is the weekend, and the homework is also done. Zhang Tianming sent Ke Lin a WeChat message, saying that he and his girlfriend Lisa wanted to eat Chinese food, and asked if he wanted to go. Ke Lin said he happened to want to eat Chinese food too, so he told Zhang Tianming and Lisa to wait at the dorm entrance, and he would drive to pick them up.

example.cn: 就让张天明和丽莎在宿舍门口等着,他开车来接他们。
example.py: jiù ràng Zhāng Tiānmíng hé Lìshā zài sùshè ménkǒu děng zhe, tā kāi chē lái jiē tāmen.
example.translation: so he told Zhang Tianming and Lisa to wait at the dorm entrance, and he would drive to pick them up.

example.cn: 她是从中国来的留学生,叫林雪梅。
example.py: tā shì cóng Zhōngguó lái de liúxuéshēng, jiào Lín Xuěméi.
example.translation: she is an international student from China named Lin Xuemei.

example.cn: 这是菜单。
example.py: Zhè shì càidān.
example.translation: Here is the menu.

example.cn: 这儿鸡做得不错,鱼也很好,特别是清蒸鱼,味道好极了。
example.py: Zhèr jī zuò de búcuò, yú yě hěn hǎo, tèbié shì qīngzhēng yú, wèidào hǎo jí le.
example.translation: The chicken here is made well, and the fish is also very good, especially the steamed fish. The flavor is excellent.

example.cn: 这儿鸡做得不错,鱼也很好,特别是清蒸鱼,味道好极了。
example.py: Zhèr jī zuò de búcuò, yú yě hěn hǎo, tèbié shì qīngzhēng yú, wèidào hǎo jí le.
example.translation: The chicken here is made well, and the fish is also very good, especially the steamed fish. The flavor is excellent.

example.cn: 特别是清蒸鱼,味道好极了。
example.py: Tèbié shì qīngzhēng yú, wèidao hǎo jí le.
example.translation: especially the steamed fish. The flavor is excellent.

example.cn: 芥兰牛肉也挺好,又嫩又香。
example.py: Jièlán niúròu yě tǐng hǎo, yòu nèn yòu xiāng.
example.translation: The Chinese broccoli beef is also quite good; it's both tender and fragrant.

example.cn: 芥兰牛肉也挺好,又嫩又香。
example.py: Jièlán niúròu yě tǐng hǎo, yòu nèn yòu xiāng.
example.translation: The Chinese broccoli beef is also quite good; it's both tender and fragrant.

example.cn: 芥兰牛肉也挺好,又嫩又香。
example.py: Jièlán niúròu yě tǐng hǎo, yòu nèn yòu xiāng.
example.translation: The Chinese broccoli beef is also quite good; it's both tender and fragrant.

example.cn: 当然可以,这儿的菠菜豆腐汤做得很好,叫一个吧。
example.py: Dāngrán kěyǐ, zhèr de bōcài dòufu tāng zuò de hěn hǎo, jiào yí ge ba.
example.translation: Of course. The spinach tofu soup here is very good. Let's order one.

example.cn: 今天你们有什么新鲜的青菜?
example.py: Jīntiān nǐmen yǒu shénme xīnxiān de qīngcài?
example.translation: What fresh vegetables do you have today?

example.cn: 是有机的吗?
example.py: Shì yǒujī de ma?
example.translation: Is it organic?

example.cn: 服务员,菜要清淡一点儿,别太咸,少放油,别放味精。
example.py: Fúwùyuán, cài yào qīngdàn yìdiǎnr, bié tài xián, shǎo fàng yóu, bié fàng wèijīng.
example.translation: Waiter, we'd like the food to be light, not too salty, with less oil, and no MSG.

example.cn: 服务员,菜要清淡一点儿,别太咸,少放油,别放味精。
example.py: Fúwùyuán, cài yào qīngdàn yīdiǎnr, bié tài xián, shǎo fàng yóu, bié fàng wèijīng.
example.translation: Waiter, we'd like the food to be light, not too salty, with less oil, and no MSG.

example.cn: 服务员,菜要清淡一点儿,别太咸,少放油,别放味精。
example.py: Fúwùyuán, cài yào qīngdàn yīdiǎnr, bié tài xián, shǎo fàng yóu, bié fàng wèijīng.
example.translation: Waiter, we'd like the food to be light, not too salty, with less oil, and no MSG.

example.cn: 麻烦你先来四杯冰水,给我们四双筷子,再多给我们一些餐巾纸。
example.py: Máfan nǐ xiān lái sì bēi bīng shuǐ, gěi wǒmen sì shuāng kuàizi, zài duō gěi wǒmen yīxiē cānjīnzhǐ.
example.translation: Could you please bring us four glasses of ice water first, give us four pairs of chopsticks, and some more napkins.

example.cn: 麻烦你先来四杯冰水,给我们四双筷子,再多给我们一些餐巾纸。
example.py: Máfan nǐ xiān lái sì bēi bīng shuǐ, gěi wǒmen sì shuāng kuàizi, zài duō gěi wǒmen yīxiē cānjīzhǐ.
example.translation: Could you please bring us four glasses of ice water first, give us four pairs of chopsticks, and some more napkins.

开玩笑.definition: to crack a joke, to joke

example.cn: 对不起,和你开玩笑。
example.py: duìbuqǐ hé nǐ kāi wánxiào
example.translation: Sorry, just kidding with you.

example.cn: 我听我父母说中国各个地方的菜不一样,哪儿的菜最好吃?
example.py: wǒ tīng wǒ fùmǔ shuō Zhōngguó gège dìfang de cài bù yíyàng nǎr de cài zuì hǎochī
example.translation: I heard from my parents that dishes from different parts of China are not the same. Which region's food is the best?

example.cn: 这就要看你的口味了。
example.py: Zhè jiù yào kàn nǐ de kǒuwèi le.
example.translation: That depends on your taste.

example.cn: 比方说我爱吃甜的,就喜欢上海菜;柯林爱吃辣的,就喜欢四川菜、湖南菜。
example.py: Bǐfāng shuō wǒ ài chī tián de, jiù xǐhuan Shànghǎi cài; Kē Lín ài chī là de, jiù xǐhuan Sìchuān cài, Húnán cài.
example.translation: For example, I like sweet food, so I like Shanghai cuisine; Ke Lin likes spicy food, so he likes Sichuan and Hunan cuisine.

example.cn: 去中国旅行,吃中国菜?可以考虑。
example.py: Qù Zhōngguó lǚxíng, chī Zhōngguó cài? Kěyǐ kǎolǜ.
example.translation: Travel to China and eat Chinese food? That's worth considering.

example.cn: 这个主意不错,我也可以考虑。
example.py: Zhège zhúyi búcuò, wǒ yě kěyǐ kǎolǜ.
example.translation: That's not a bad idea, I can consider it too.

example.cn: 今天是周末,功课也做完了,张天明就给柯林发微信,说他和他的女朋友丽莎想吃中国饭,问他想不想去。
example.py: Jīntiān shì zhōumò, gōngkè yě zuò wán le, Zhāng Tiānmíng jiù gěi Kē Lín fā wēixìn, shuō tā hé tā de nǚpéngyou Lìshā xiǎng chī Zhōngguó fàn, wèn tā xiǎng bu xiǎng qù.
example.translation: Today is the weekend, and the homework is also done. Zhang Tianming sent Ke Lin a WeChat message, saying that he and his girlfriend Lisa wanted to eat Chinese food, and asked if he wanted to go.

example.cn: 半个钟头以后,柯林的汽车到了。张天明和丽莎上车一看,车里还有一个女孩儿,柯林介绍说,她是从中国来的留学生,叫林雪梅。几分钟以后,他们四个人到了那家中国饭馆儿。
example.py: bàn ge zhōngtóu yǐhòu Kē Lín de qìchē dào le Zhāng Tiānmíng hé Lìshā shàng chē yí kàn chē lǐ hái yǒu yí ge nǚháir Kē Lín jièshào shuō tā shì cóng Zhōngguó lái de liúxuéshēng jiào Lín Xuěméi jǐ fēnzhōng yǐhòu tāmen sì ge rén dào le nà jiā Zhōngguó fànguǎnr
example.translation: Half an hour later, Ke Lin's car arrived. Zhang Tianming and Lisa got in the car and saw there was another girl inside. Ke Lin introduced her, saying she is an international student from China named Lin Xuemei. A few minutes later, the four of them arrived at that Chinese restaurant.

example.cn: 柯林介绍说,她是从中国来的留学生,叫林雪梅。
example.py: Kē Lín jièshào shuō, tā shì cóng Zhōngguó lái de liúxuéshēng, jiào Lín Xuěméi.
example.translation: Ke Lin introduced her, saying she is an international student from China named Lin Xuemei.

example.cn: 这个饭馆儿的菜是不错,但是没有我们杭州的饭馆儿好。
example.py: Zhège fànguǎnr de cài shì búcuò, dànshì méiyǒu wǒmen Hángzhōu de fànguǎnr hǎo.
example.translation: The food at this restaurant is good, but not as good as the restaurants in our Hangzhou.

example.cn: 柯林爱吃辣的,就喜欢四川菜、湖南菜。
example.py: Kē Lín ài chī là de, jiù xǐhuan Sìchuān cài, Húnán cài.
example.translation: Ke Lin likes spicy food, so he likes Sichuan and Hunan cuisine.

example.cn: 柯林爱吃辣的,就喜欢四川菜、湖南菜。
example.py: Kē Lín ài chī là de, jiù xǐhuan Sìchuān cài, Húnán cài.
example.translation: Ke Lin likes spicy food, so he likes Sichuan and Hunan cuisine.

example.cn: 这就要看你的口味了。比方说我爱吃甜的,就喜欢上海菜;柯林爱吃辣的,就喜欢四川菜、湖南菜。要是喜欢比较清淡的,就吃广东菜……
example.py: zhè jiù yào kàn nǐ de kǒuwèi le bǐfāng shuō wǒ ài chī tián de jiù xǐhuan Shànghǎi cài Kē Lín ài chī là de jiù xǐhuan Sìchuān cài Húnán cài yàoshi xǐhuan bǐjiào qīngdàn de jiù chī Guǎngdōng cài
example.translation: That depends on your taste. For example, I like sweet food, so I like Shanghai cuisine; Ke Lin likes spicy food, so he likes Sichuan and Hunan cuisine. If you prefer something lighter, you should eat Cantonese food...

example.cn: 张天明从家里来的时候,妈妈给他买了一些衣服,像T恤衫、毛衣、牛仔裤什么的,可是他觉得无论是样子还是颜色都不太好。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng cóng jiāli lái de shíhou, māma gěi tā mǎi le yìxiē yīfu, xiàng Tīxùshān, máoyī, niúzǎikù shénme de, kěshì tā juéde wúlùn shì yàngzi háishì yánsè dōu bú tài hǎo.
example.translation: When Zhang Tianming came from home, his mom bought him some clothes, like T-shirts, sweaters, jeans, and so on, but he felt that neither the style nor the color was very good.

example.cn: 张天明从家里来的时候,妈妈给他买了一些衣服,像T恤衫、毛衣、牛仔裤什么的,可是他觉得无论是样子还是颜色都不太好。

example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng cóng jiā lǐ lái de shí hou mā ma gěi tā mǎi le yì xiē yī fu xiàng T-xùshān máo yī niú zǎi kù shén me de kě shì tā jué de wú lùn shì yàng zi hái shi yán sè dōu bú tài hǎo jīn tiān shì xīng qī rì zhèng hǎo Lín Xuěméi hé Lìshā yě xū yào mǎi wèi shēng zhǐ yá gāo máo jīn xǐ yī fěn zhè xiē rì yòng pǐn Kē Lín jiù dài tā men lái dào fù jìn yì jiā zuì dà de gòu wù zhōng xīn
example.translation: When Zhang Tianming came from home, his mom bought him some clothes, like T-shirts, sweaters, jeans, and so on, but he felt that neither the style nor the color was very good. Today is Sunday, and it happens that Lin Xuemei and Lisha also need to buy daily necessities like toilet paper, toothpaste, towels, and laundry detergent, so Ke Lin took them to the biggest shopping center nearby.

example.cn: 是什么牌子的？
example.py: Shì shénme páizi de?
example.translation: What brand is it?

example.cn: 价钱不贵。
example.py: Jiàqian bù guì.
example.translation: The price is not expensive.

example.cn: 不过,是纯棉的。
example.py: Bùguò, shì chúnmián de.
example.translation: However, it's pure cotton.

example.cn: 牌子不好不行,我想买名牌的。
example.py: Páizi bù hǎo bùxíng, wǒ xiǎng mǎi míngpái de.
example.translation: If it's not a good brand, it won't do. I want to buy a name brand.

example.cn: 你真时髦!穿名牌!
example.py: Nǐ zhēn shímáo! Chuān míngpái!
example.translation: You're so fashionable! Wearing name brands!

哎呀.definition: gosh, ah (an exclamation to express surprise)

example.cn: 你真时髦!穿名牌!那件好像是名牌的……哎呀,太贵了!
example.py: nǐ zhēn shí máo chuān míng pái nà jiàn hǎo xiàng shì míng pái de āi yā tài guì le
example.translation: You're so fashionable! Wearing name brands! That one looks like a name brand... Oh my, it's too expensive!

example.cn: 因为名牌的衣服质量好。
example.py: Yīnwèi míngpái de yīfu zhìliàng hǎo.
example.translation: because name-brand clothes are better quality.

只好.definition: to be forced to, to have no choice but

example.cn: 有的衣服便宜是便宜,可是牌子不好,穿一、两次就不想穿了,只好再买一件。
example.py: Yǒude yīfu piányi shì piányi, kěshì páizi bù hǎo, chuān yī, liǎng cì jiù bù xiǎng chuān le, zhǐhǎo zài mǎi yī jiàn.
example.translation: Some clothes are cheap, but the brand is not good. After wearing them once or twice, you don't want to wear them anymore, so you have to buy another one.

example.cn: 你说的有道理。
example.py: Nǐ shuō de yǒu dàoli.
example.translation: What you said makes sense.

非…不可.definition: have to, nothing but... would do
have to, nothing but . . . would do

example.cn: 买衣服只考虑便宜当然不好,但是也不一定非买名牌的不可。我买衣服的标准,第一是看穿着舒服不舒服,第二是质量好不好,第三是价钱合适不合适。是什么牌子的,样子时髦不时髦,我都不在乎。因为穿衣服是为了自己,不是为了给别人看。
example.py: mǎi yīfu zhǐ kǎolǜ piányi dāngrán bù hǎo dànshì yě bù yídìng fēi mǎi míngpái de bùkě wǒ mǎi yīfu de biāozhǔn dìyī shì kàn chuānzhe shūfu bù shūfu dì'èr shì zhìliàng hǎo bù hǎo dìsān shì jiàqian héshì bù héshì shì shénme páizi de yàngzi shímáo bù shímáo wǒ dōu bú zàihu yīnwèi chuān yīfu shì wèile zìjǐ bú shì wèile gěi biérén kàn
example.translation: Of course it's not good to only consider price when buying clothes, but you don't necessarily have to buy name brands. My criteria for buying clothes are, first, whether they are comfortable to wear; second, whether the quality is good; and third, whether the price is suitable. I don't care what brand it is, or whether the style is fashionable or not. Because you wear clothes for yourself, not for others to see.

example.cn: 是什么牌子的,样子时髦不时髦,我都不在乎。
example.py: Shì shénme páizi de, yàngzi shímáo bu shímáo, wǒ dōu bù zàihu.
example.translation: I don't care what brand it is, or whether the style is fashionable or not.

example.cn: 我不同意。
example.py: Wǒ bù tóngyì.
example.translation: I don't agree.

example.cn: 雪梅穿什么衣服都好看,对不对？
example.py: Xuěméi chuān shénme yīfu dōu hǎokàn, duì bu duì?
example.translation: Xuemei looks good in whatever she wears, right?

一会儿.definition: in a moment, a little while

example.cn: 你们去吧,我先去付钱,我们一会儿见。
example.py: nǐmen qù ba wǒ xiān qù fù qián wǒmen yīhuìr jiàn
example.translation: You guys go ahead. I'll go pay first. We'll meet in a bit.

example.cn: 先生,付现金,还是用信用卡？
example.py: Xiānsheng, fù xiànjīn, háishì yòng xìnyòngkǎ?
example.translation: Sir, are you paying with cash or credit card?

example.cn: 先生,加上税一共是一百八十六块四。
example.py: xiānsheng jiāshang shuì yígòng shì yì bǎi bā shí liù kuài sì
example.translation: Sir, with tax, the total is one hundred eighty-six dollars and forty cents.

example.cn: 先生,加上税一共是一百八十六块四。
example.py: Xiānsheng, jiāshang shuì yīgòng shì yībǎi bāshíliù kuài sì.
example.translation: Sir, with tax, the total is one hundred eighty-six dollars and forty cents.

example.cn: 张天明这个学期选了四门课：世界历史、电脑、政治学和中文。这几门课都很有意思，他也学到了不少东西。因为张天明在家的时候常常跟父母说中文，所以一年级的中文课，对他来说，听和说很容易，只是写汉字有点儿难。除了中文课以外，其他几门课都得花很多时间准备，还常常要写文章，所以他觉得有点儿受不了。这个学期已经过了一半，马上又得选下学期的课了，张天明希望下个学期能轻松点儿。后天要去见教授，讨论选课的事，他想先找别的同学聊聊，听听他们的意见。这一天下午，他在篮球场上正好碰见大四的李哲，就一边和李哲打球，一边聊了起来。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng zhè ge xuéqī xuǎn le sì mén kè shìjiè lìshǐ diànnǎo zhèngzhìxué hé zhōngwén zhè jǐ mén kè dōu hěn yǒu yìsi tā yě xuédào le bù shǎo dōngxi yīnwèi Zhāng Tiānmíng zài jiā de shíhou chángcháng gēn fùmǔ shuō zhōngwén suǒyǐ yì niánjí de zhōngwén kè duì tā lái shuō tīng hé shuō hěn róngyì zhǐshì xiě hànzì yǒudiǎnr nán chúle zhōngwén kè yǐwài qítā jǐ mén kè dōu děi huā hěn duō shíjiān zhǔnbèi hái chángcháng yào xiě wénzhāng suǒyǐ tā juéde yǒudiǎnr shòubuliǎo zhè ge xuéqī yǐjīng guò le yíbàn mǎshàng yòu děi xuǎn xià xuéqī de kè le Zhāng Tiānmíng xīwàng xià ge xuéqī néng qīngsōng diǎnr hòutiān yào qù jiàn jiàoshòu tǎolùn xuǎnkè de shì tā xiǎng xiān zhǎo biéde tóngxué liáoliao tīngting tāmen de yìjiàn zhè yì tiān xiàwǔ tā zài lánqiúchǎng shang zhènghǎo pèngjiàn dàsì de Lǐ Zhé jiù yìbiān hé Lǐ Zhé dǎ qiú yìbiān liáo le qǐlai
example.translation: Zhang Tianming took four courses this semester: world history, computer science, political science, and Chinese. These courses are all very interesting, and he has learned a lot. Because Zhang Tianming often speaks Chinese with his parents at home, first-year Chinese class, for him, is very easy to listen to and speak, but writing Chinese characters is a bit difficult. Besides the Chinese class, the other courses require a lot of preparation time and he often has to write essays, so he feels a bit overwhelmed. This semester is already half over, and it's time to choose next semester's classes. Zhang Tianming hopes next semester can be a bit more relaxed. He is going to see his professor the day after tomorrow to discuss course selection, but he wants to chat with other students first and listen to their opinions. This afternoon, he happened to run into Li Zhe, a senior, on the basketball court, so they started chatting while playing basketball.

example.cn: 张天明这个学期选了四门课：世界历史、电脑、政治学和中文。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng zhège xuéqī xuǎn le sì mén kè: shìjiè lìshǐ, diànnǎo, zhèngzhìxué hé Zhōngwén.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming took four courses this semester: world history, computer science, political science, and Chinese.

example.cn: 张天明这个学期选了四门课：世界历史、电脑、政治学和中文。

example.translation: Zhang Tianming took four courses this semester: world history, computer science, political science, and Chinese.

example.cn: 除了中文课以外，其他几门课都得花很多时间准备，还常常要写文章，所以他觉得有点儿受不了。
example.py: Chúle Zhōngwén kè yǐwài, qítā jǐ mén kè dōu děi huā hěn duō shíjiān zhǔnbèi, hái chángcháng yào xiě wénzhāng, suǒyǐ tā juéde yǒudiǎnr shòu bu liǎo.
example.translation: Besides the Chinese class, the other courses require a lot of preparation time and he often has to write essays, so he feels a bit overwhelmed.

example.cn: 除了中文课以外，其他几门课都得花很多时间准备，还常常要写文章，所以他觉得有点儿受不了。

He is going to see his professor the day after tomorrow to discuss course selection, but he wants to chat with other students first and listen to their opinions. This afternoon, he happened to run into Li Zhe, a senior, on the basketball court, so they started chatting while playing basketball.

example.cn: 张天明希望下个学期能轻松点儿。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng xīwàng xià ge xuéqī néng qīngsōng diǎnr.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming hopes next semester can be a bit more relaxed.

example.cn: 后天要去见教授，讨论选课的事。
example.py: Hòutiān yào qù jiàn jiàoshòu, tǎolùn xuǎnkè de shì.
example.translation: He is going to see his professor the day after tomorrow to discuss course selection.

example.cn: 后天要去见教授，讨论选课的事，他想先找别的同学聊聊，听听他们的意见。
example.py: Hòutiān yào qù jiàn jiàoshòu, tǎolùn xuǎnkè de shì, tā xiǎng xiān zhǎo biéde tóngxué liáoliao, tīngting tāmen de yìjiàn.
example.translation: He is going to see his professor the day after tomorrow to discuss course selection, but he wants to chat with other students first and listen to their opinions.

example.cn: 后天要去见教授，讨论选课的事，他想先找别的同学聊聊，听听他们的意见。
example.py: Hòutiān yào qù jiàn jiàoshòu, tǎolùn xuǎnkè de shì, tā xiǎng xiān zhǎo biéde tóngxué liáoliao, tīngting tāmen de yìjiàn.
example.translation: He is going to see his professor the day after tomorrow to discuss course selection, but he wants to chat with other students first and listen to their opinions.

碰见.definition: to run into (a person by chance)

example.cn: 这一天下午，他在篮球场上正好碰见大四的李哲，就一边和李哲打球，一边聊了起来。
example.py: Zhè yī tiān xiàwǔ, tā zài lánqiúchǎng shang zhènghǎo pèng jiàn dà sì de Lǐ Zhé, jiù yībiān hé Lǐ Zhé dǎ qiú, yībiān liáo le qǐlái.
example.translation: This afternoon, he happened to run into Li Zhe, a senior, on the basketball court, so they started chatting while playing basketball.

example.cn: 对了，你还得再上几门课才能毕业？
example.py: Duìle, nǐ hái děi zài shàng jǐ mén kè cáinéng bì yè?
example.translation: By the way, how many more classes do you have to take before you can graduate?

example.cn: 我想拿双学位，还得上四门课。我想再选一门化学、一门经济，另外再选两门电脑系的课，这样学分就够了。
example.py: wǒ xiǎng ná shuāng xuéwèi hái děi shàng sì mén kè wǒ xiǎng zài xuǎn yī mén huàxué yī mén jīngjì lìngwài zài xuǎn liǎng mén diànnǎo xì de kè zhèyàng xuéfēn jiù gòu le
example.translation: I want to get a double major, so I still have to take four more classes. I'm thinking of taking one chemistry, one economics, and two more computer science classes. That will be enough credits.

example.cn: 我想再选一门化学、一门经济，另外再选两门电脑系的课，这样学分就够了。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng zài xuǎn yī mén huàxué, yī mén jīngjì, lìngwài zài xuǎn liǎng mén diànnǎo xì de kè, zhèyàng xuéfēn jiù gòu le.
example.translation: I'm thinking of taking one chemistry, one economics, and two more computer science classes. That will be enough credits.

example.cn: 我想再选一门化学、一门经济，另外再选两门电脑系的课，这样学分就够了。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng zài xuǎn yī mén huàxué, yī mén jīngjì, lìngwài zài xuǎn liǎng mén diànnǎo xì de kè, zhèyàng xuéfēn jiù gòu le.
example.translation: I'm thinking of taking one chemistry, one economics, and two more computer science classes. That will be enough credits.

系.definition: academic department (of a college or university)

example.cn: 我想拿双学位，还得上四门课。我想再选一门化学、一门经济，另外再选两门电脑系的课，这样学分就够了。
example.py: wǒ xiǎng ná shuāng xuéwèi hái děi shàng sì mén kè wǒ xiǎng zài xuǎn yī mén huàxué yī mén jīngjì lìngwài zài xuǎn liǎng mén diànnǎo xì de kè zhèyàng xuéfēn jiù gòu le
example.translation: I want to get a double major, so I still have to take four more classes. I'm thinking of taking one chemistry, one economics, and two more computer science classes. That will be enough credits.

example.cn: 我想再选一门化学、一门经济，另外再选两门电脑系的课，这样学分就够了。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng zài xuǎn yī mén huàxué, yī mén jīngjì, lìngwài zài xuǎn liǎng mén diànnǎo xì de kè, zhèyàng xuéfēn jiù gòu le.
example.translation: I'm thinking of taking one chemistry, one economics, and two more computer science classes. That will be enough credits.

example.cn: 对，我决定了，也选经济和电脑！
example.py: Duì, wǒ juédìng le, yě xuǎn jīngjì hé diànnǎo!
example.translation: You're right, I've decided, I'll take economics and computer science too!

example.cn: 我的问题解决了，太好了！
example.py: Wǒ de wèntí jiějué le, tài hǎo le!
example.translation: My problem is solved, that's great!

example.cn: 我后天就去见我的教授，听听他的建议。
example.py: Wǒ hòutiān jiù qù jiàn wǒ de jiàoshòu, tīngting tā de jiànyì.
example.translation: I'll go see my professor the day after tomorrow and listen to his suggestions.

要么..., 要么....definition: if it's not... it's..., either ... or ...

example.cn: 我想念研究生，要么上工学院，要么上管理学院，我还没跟我的教授谈。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng niàn yánjiūshēng, yàome shàng gōng xuéyuàn, yàome shàng guǎnlǐ xuéyuàn, wǒ hái méi gēn wǒ de jiàoshòu tán.
example.translation: I want to go to graduate school, either to the school of engineering or the school of management. I haven't talked to my professor yet.

example.cn: 我想念研究生，要么上工学院，要么上管理学院，我还没跟我的教授谈。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng niàn yánjiūshēng, yàome shàng gōng xuéyuàn, yàome shàng guǎnlǐ xuéyuàn, wǒ hái méi gēn wǒ de jiàoshòu tán.
example.translation: I want to go to graduate school, either to the school of engineering or the school of management. I haven't talked to my professor yet.

example.cn: 我还没跟我的教授谈。
example.py: Wǒ hái méi gēn wǒ de jiàoshòu tán.
example.translation: I haven't talked to my professor yet.

example.cn: 我想学文学。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng xué wénxué.
example.translation: I want to study literature.

example.cn: 可是我妈妈说，学文学将来找工作不容易，而且挣钱也少，她希望我念金融。
example.py: Kěshì wǒ māma shuō, xué wénxué jiānglái zhǎo gōngzuò bù róngyì, érqiě zhèng qián yě shǎo, tā xīwàng wǒ niàn jīnróng.
example.translation: But my mom says it's not easy to find a job with a literature degree in the future, and you don't make much money. She wants me to study finance.

example.cn: 学文学将来找工作不容易，而且挣钱也少，她希望我念金融。
example.py: Xué wénxué jiānglái zhǎo gōngzuò bù róngyì, érqiě zhèng qián yě shǎo, tā xīwàng wǒ niàn jīnróng.
example.translation: But my mom says it's not easy to find a job with a literature degree in the future, and you don't make much money. She wants me to study finance.

example.cn: 但是我对金融没有兴趣，整天跟数字打交道，多没意思。
example.py: Dànshì wǒ duì jīnróng méiyǒu xìngqù, zhěng tiān gēn shùzì dǎ jiāodào, duō méi yìsi.
example.translation: But I'm not interested in finance, dealing with numbers all day, how boring.

example.cn: 但是我对金融没有兴趣，整天跟数字打交道，多没意思。
example.py: Dànshì wǒ duì jīnróng méiyǒu xìngqù, zhěng tiān gēn shùzì dǎ jiāodào, duō méi yìsi.
example.translation: But I'm not interested in finance, dealing with numbers all day, how boring.

example.cn: 我想学文学。可是我妈妈说，学文学将来找工作不容易，而且挣钱也少，她希望我念金融。但是我对金融没有兴趣，整天跟数字打交道，多没意思。
example.py: wǒ xiǎng xué wénxué kěshì wǒ māma shuō xué wénxué jiānglái zhǎo gōngzuò bù róngyì érqiě zhèng qián yě shǎo tā xīwàng wǒ niàn jīnróng dànshì wǒ duì jīnróng méiyǒu xìngqù zhěngtiān gēn shùzì dǎ jiādao duō méi yìsi
example.translation: I want to study literature. But my mom says it's not easy to find a job with a literature degree in the future, and you don't make much money. She wants me to study finance. But I'm not interested in finance, dealing with numbers all day, how boring.

example.cn: 但是我对金融没有兴趣，整天跟数字打交道，多没意思。
example.py: Dànshì wǒ duì jīnróng méiyǒu xìngqù, zhěngtiān gēn shùzì dǎ jiāodào, duō méi yìsi.
example.translation: But I'm not interested in finance, dealing with numbers all day, how boring.

example.cn: 如果让我自己选专业，我选哲学，因为我喜欢想问题。
example.py: Rúguǒ ràng wǒ zìjǐ xuǎn zhuānyè, wǒ xuǎn zhéxué, yīnwèi wǒ xǐhuān xiǎng wèntí.
example.translation: If I could choose my own major, I'd choose philosophy, because I like to think about problems.

管.definition: to control, to manage, to mind, to care about

example.cn: 他们的父母不太管孩子选什么专业。
example.py: Tāmen de fùmǔ bú tài guǎn háizi xuǎn shénme zhuānyè.
example.translation: their parents don't really control what major their children choose.

申请.definition: to apply (to a school or job)

example.cn: 你要申请哪些学校？
example.py: Nǐ yào shēnqǐng nǎxiē xuéxiào?
example.translation: Which schools are you going to apply to?

example.cn: 这样我就可以搬到她家去住，把房租跟饭钱省下来。
example.py: Zhèyàng wǒ jiù kěyǐ bān dào tā jiā qù zhù, bǎ fángzū gēn fànqián shěng xia lai.
example.translation: That way I can move in with her and save on rent and food money.

example.cn: 张天明这个学期选了四门课：世界历史、电脑、政治学和中文。这几门课都很有意思，他也学到了不少东西。因为张天明在家的时候常常跟父母说中文，所以一年级的中文课，对他来说，听和说很容易，只是写汉字有点儿难。除了中文课以外，其他几门课都得花很多时间准备，还常常要写文章，所以他觉得有点儿受不了。这个学期已经过了一半，马上又得选下学期的课了，张天明希望下个学期能轻松点儿。后天要去见教授，讨论选课的事，他想先找别的同学聊聊，听听他们的意见。这一天下午，他在篮球场上正好碰见大四的李哲，就一边和李哲打球，一边聊了起来。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng zhè ge xuéqī xuǎn le sì mén kè shìjiè lìshǐ diànnǎo zhèngzhìxué hé zhōngwén zhè jǐ mén kè dōu hěn yǒu yìsi tā yě xuédào le bù shǎo dōngxi yīnwèi Zhāng Tiānmíng zài jiā de shíhou chángcháng gēn fùmǔ shuō zhōngwén suǒyǐ yì niánjí de zhōngwén kè duì tā lái shuō tīng hé shuō hěn róngyì zhǐshì xiě hànzì yǒudiǎnr nán chúle zhōngwén kè yǐwài qítā jǐ mén kè dōu děi huā hěn duō shíjiān zhǔnbèi hái chángcháng yào xiě wénzhāng suǒyǐ tā juéde yǒudiǎnr shòubuliǎo zhè ge xuéqī yǐjīng guò le yíbàn mǎshàng yòu děi xuǎn xià xuéqī de kè le Zhāng Tiānmíng xīwàng xià ge xuéqī néng qīngsōng diǎnr hòutiān yào qù jiàn jiàoshòu tǎolùn xuǎnkè de shì tā xiǎng xiān zhǎo biéde tóngxué liáoliao tīngting tāmen de yìjiàn zhè yì tiān xiàwǔ tā zài lánqiúchǎng shang zhènghǎo pèngjiàn dàsì de Lǐ Zhé jiù yìbiān hé Lǐ Zhé dǎ qiú yìbiān liáo le qǐlai
example.translation: Zhang Tianming took four courses this semester: world history, computer science, political science, and Chinese. These courses are all very interesting, and he has learned a lot. Because Zhang Tianming often speaks Chinese with his parents at home, first-year Chinese class, for him, is very easy to listen to and speak, but writing Chinese characters is a bit difficult. Besides the Chinese class, the other courses require a lot of preparation time and he often has to write essays, so he feels a bit overwhelmed. This semester is already half over, and it's time to choose next semester's classes. Zhang Tianming hopes next semester can be a bit more relaxed. He is going to see his professor the day after tomorrow to discuss course selection, but he wants to chat with other students first and listen to their opinions. This afternoon, he happened to run into Li Zhe, a senior, on the basketball court, so they started chatting while playing basketball.

心事.definition: something that weighs on one's mind

example.cn: 丽莎这几天好像有什么心事。
example.py: Lìshā zhè jǐ tiān hǎoxiàng yǒu shénme xīnshì.
example.translation: Lisa seems to have something on her mind these past few days.

example.cn: 她才说她跟张天明吵架了。
example.py: tā cái shuō tā gēn Zhāng Tiānmíng chǎo jià le.
example.translation: she finally said that she had quarreled with Zhang Tianming.

example.cn: 她和张天明在高中就是同学。
example.py: Tā hé Zhāng Tiānmíng zài gāozhōng jiù shì tóngxué.
example.translation: she and Zhang Tianming were classmates in high school.

开朗.definition: extroverted, open and sunny in disposition

example.cn: 雪梅刚认识丽莎的时候，听丽莎说，她和张天明在高中就是同学。天明人很好，很开朗，学习也不错。在兴趣上她跟天明不太一样，天明是个球迷，电视里一有球赛，他就非看不可，丽莎是个歌迷，一有演唱会就去听。丽莎说，他们的兴趣爱好虽然不同，但是一直相处得很好。
example.py: xuě méi gāng rèn shi lì shā de shí hou tīng lì shā shuō tā hé zhāng tiān míng zài gāo zhōng jiù shì tóng xué tiān míng rén hěn hǎo hěn kāi lǎng xué xí yě bú cuò zài xìng qù shàng tā gēn tiān míng bú tài yí yàng tiān míng shì ge qiú mí diàn shì lǐ yī yǒu qiú sài tā jiù fēi kàn bù kě lì shā shì ge gē mí yī yǒu yǎn chàng huì jiù qù tīng lì shā shuō tā men de xìng qù ài hào suī rán bù tóng dàn shì yì zhí xiāng chǔ de hěn hǎo
example.translation: When Xuemei first met Lisa, she heard Lisa say that she and Zhang Tianming were classmates in high school. Tianming is a great guy, very outgoing, and a good student. In terms of interests, she and Tianming are not quite the same. Tianming is a soccer fan; whenever there's a game on TV, he has to watch it. Lisa is a music fan; whenever there's a concert, she goes to listen. Lisa said that although their interests and hobbies are different, they have always gotten along very well.

example.cn: 天明是个球迷，电视里一有球赛，他就非看不可。
example.py: Tiānmíng shì gè qiúmí, diànshì lǐ yī yǒu qiúsài, tā jiù fēi kàn bùkě.
example.translation: Tianming is a soccer fan; whenever there's a game on TV, he has to watch it.

example.cn: 两个星期前我跟他约好去看一个演唱会，没想到他那天晚上一直玩儿电脑，把演唱会的事儿忘得一干二净。
example.py: Liǎng ge xīngqīqián wǒ gēn tā yuēhǎo qù kàn yí ge yǎnchànghuì, méi xiǎngdào tā nà tiān wǎnshang yìzhí wánr diànnǎo, bǎ yǎnchànghuì de shìr wàng de yìgān'èrjìng.
example.translation: Two weeks ago, I arranged with him to go to a concert. Unexpectedly, he spent the whole evening playing on his computer and completely forgot about the concert.

example.cn: 他们的兴趣爱好虽然不同，但是一直相处得很好。
example.py: Tāmen de xìngqù àihào suīrán bù tóng, dànshì yīzhí xiāngchǔ dé hěn hǎo.
example.translation: although their interests and hobbies are different, they have always gotten along very well.

example.cn: 马虎跟心里没有你根本不同。
example.py: Mǎhu gēn xīnlǐ méiyǒu nǐ gēnběn bù tóng.
example.translation: Being careless is completely different from not having you in his heart.

example.cn: 他们的兴趣爱好虽然不同，但是一直相处得很好。
example.py: Tāmen de xìngqù àihào suīrán bù tóng, dànshì yīzhí xiāngchǔ dé hěn hǎo.
example.translation: although their interests and hobbies are different, they have always gotten along very well.

到底.definition: what on earth, what in the world, in the end

example.cn: 到底是怎么了？
example.py: Dàodǐ shì zěnme le?
example.translation: What on earth happened?

发生.definition: to happen, to occur, to take place

example.cn: 林雪梅想来想去，想不出他们到底发生了什么事儿。
example.py: Lín Xuěméi xiǎngláixiǎngqù, xiǎng bu chū tāmen dàodǐ fāshēngle shénme shìr.
example.translation: Lin Xuemei thought it over and over, but couldn't figure out what on earth had happened between them.

example.cn: 是因为文化背景不同吗？
example.py: Shì yīnwèi wénhuà bèijǐng bùtóng ma?
example.translation: Is it because of their different cultural backgrounds?

example.cn: 别提了，他心里根本没有我。
example.py: Bié tí le, tā xīnlǐ gēnběn méiyǒu wǒ.
example.translation: Don't mention it. I'm not in his heart at all.

example.cn: 这让我觉得他心里还是有我。
example.py: Zhè ràng wǒ juéde tā xīnlǐ háishì yǒu wǒ.
example.translation: That made me feel that I am still in his heart.

example.cn: 别提了，他心里根本没有我。
example.py: bié tí le tā xīnlǐ gēnběn méiyǒu wǒ
example.translation: Don't mention it. I'm not in his heart at all.

example.cn: 没想到他那天晚上一直玩儿电脑，把演唱会的事儿忘得一干二净。
example.py: méi xiǎngdào tā nà tiān wǎnshang yìzhí wánr diànnǎo, bǎ yǎnchànghuì de shìr wàng de yì gān èr jìng.
example.translation: Unexpectedly, he spent the whole evening playing on his computer and completely forgot about the concert.

example.cn: 你说我能不生气吗？
example.py: Nǐ shuō wǒ néng bù shēng qì ma?
example.translation: Tell me, how could I not be angry?

example.cn: 还有更叫人生气的呢。上个星期六我找他陪我去看电影，他很高兴地答应了，可是八点的电影，我等到八点一刻他还没到。打他手机，才知道他跑到另一家电影院去了。这些虽然都是小事儿，但是叫我非常生气，觉得他根本不在乎我。真想跟他分手。
example.py: hái yǒu gèng jiào rén shēngqì de ne shàng ge xīngqīliù wǒ zhǎo tā péi wǒ qù kàn diànyǐng tā hěn gāoxìng de dāying le kěshì bā diǎn de diànyǐng wǒ děng dào bā diǎn yí kè tā hái méi dào dǎ tā shǒujī cái zhīdào tā pǎo dào lìng yì jiā diànyǐngyuàn qù le zhèxiē suīrán dōu shì xiǎoshìr dànshì jiào wǒ fēicháng shēngqì juéde tā gēnběn bù zàihu wǒ zhēn xiǎng gēn tā fēnshǒu
example.translation: There's something even more infuriating. Last Saturday, I asked him to go to a movie with me. He happily agreed. But for the 8:00 movie, I waited until 8:15 and he still hadn't arrived. I called his cell phone, only to find out he had gone to another movie theater. Although these are all small things, they make me very angry. I feel like he doesn't care about me at all. I really want to break up with him.

答应.definition: to agree (to do something), to promise, to answer

example.cn: 上个星期六我找他陪我去看电影，他很高兴地答应了，可是八点的电影，我等到八点一刻他还没到。
example.py: Shàng ge xīngqīliù wǒ zhǎo tā péi wǒ qù kàn diànyǐng, tā hěn gāoxìng de dāying le, kěshì bā diǎn de diànyǐng, wǒ děngdào bā diǎn yí kè tā hái méi dào.
example.translation: Last Saturday, I asked him to go to a movie with me. He happily agreed. But for the 8:00 movie, I waited until 8:15 and he still hadn't arrived.

example.cn: 打他手机，才知道他跑到另一家电影院去了。
example.py: Dǎ tā shǒujī, cái zhīdào tā pǎo dào lìng yì jiā diànyǐngyuàn qù le.
example.translation: I called his cell phone, only to find out he had gone to another movie theater.

分手.definition: to break up, to part company

example.cn: 真想跟他分手。
example.py: Zhēn xiǎng gēn tā fēnshǒu.
example.translation: I really want to break up with him.

原来.definition: as a matter of fact; original, former

example.cn: 原来是这样。这个天明，怎么这么马虎！后来呢？
example.py: yuánlái shì zhèyàng zhège Tiānmíng zěnme zhème mǎhu hòulái ne
example.translation: Oh, so that's what happened. This Tianming, how can he be so careless! What happened later?

example.cn: 这个天明，怎么这么马虎！
example.py: Zhège Tiānmíng, zěnme zhème mǎhu!
example.translation: This Tianming, how can he be so careless!

example.cn: 后来他见到我，不停地给我道歉，说对不起，态度特别好。这让我觉得他心里还是有我。
example.py: hòulái tā jiàndào wǒ bùtíng de gěi wǒ dàoqiàn shuō duìbuqǐ tàidu tèbié hǎo zhè ràng wǒ juéde tā xīnlǐ háishi yǒu wǒ
example.translation: Later when he saw me, he apologized to me nonstop, saying he was sorry. His attitude was especially good. That made me feel that I am still in his heart.

example.cn: 后来他见到我，不停地给我道歉，说对不起，态度特别好。
example.py: Hòulái tā jiàn dào wǒ, bùtíng de gěi wǒ dàoqiàn, shuō duìbuqǐ, tàidu tèbié hǎo.
example.translation: Later when he saw me, he apologized to me nonstop, saying he was sorry. His attitude was especially good.

example.cn: 后来他见到我，不停地给我道歉，说对不起，态度特别好。
example.py: Hòulái tā jiàn dào wǒ, bùtíng de gěi wǒ dàoqiàn, shuō duìbuqǐ, tàidu tèbié hǎo.
example.translation: Later when he saw me, he apologized to me nonstop, saying he was sorry. His attitude was especially good.

example.cn: 如果有一天不吵了，说不定你们就真的会分手。
example.py: Rúguǒ yǒu yì tiān bù chǎo le, shuōbudìng nǐmen jiù zhēn de huì fēnshǒu.
example.translation: If one day you two stop arguing, maybe you'll really break up.

example.cn: 实际上，柯林跟天明差不多，常常忘这忘那、丢三拉四的。
example.py: Shíjìshang, Kē Lín gēn Tiānmíng chàbuduō, chángcháng wàng zhè wàng nà, diū sān là sì de.
example.translation: In fact, Ke Lin is not much different from Tianming. He's always forgetting this or that, very scatterbrained.

example.cn: 他常常忘这忘那、丢三拉四的。
example.py: Tā chángcháng wàng zhè wàng nà, diū sān là sì de.
example.translation: He's always forgetting this or that, very scatterbrained.

example.cn: 他一会儿忘了我的生日，一会儿找不到钥匙，一会儿又……有的时候真让人着急。
example.py: Tā yīhuìr wàngle wǒ de shēngrì, yīhuìr zhǎo bu dào yàoshi, yīhuìr yòu… yǒu de shíhou zhēn ràng rén zhāojí.
example.translation: One minute he forgets my birthday, the next he can't find his keys, and then... Sometimes it's really frustrating.

example.cn: 现在是网络时代，当然离不开电脑。
example.py: Xiànzài shì wǎngluò shídài, dāngrán líbukāi diànnǎo.
example.translation: This is the internet age; of course, we can't do without computers.

example.cn: 他在网上看新闻、查资料、玩儿游戏，有时候还在自己的网站上写博客，一会儿都离不开电脑。
example.py: Tā zài wǎngshàng kàn xīnwén, chá zīliào, wánr yóuxì, yǒushíhou hái zài zìjǐ de wǎngzhàn shàng xiě bókè, yíhuìr dōu líbukāi diànnǎo.
example.translation: He reads news, looks up information, and plays games online. Sometimes he even writes on his own blog; he can't tear himself away from the computer for a moment.

example.cn: 张天明是个电脑迷，他的电脑从早到晚都开着。他在网上看新闻、查资料、玩儿游戏，有时候还在自己的网站上写博客，一会儿都离不开电脑。他常常一上网，就忘了时间。昨天，丽莎、柯林、雪梅和他约好今天一起去唱卡拉OK，时间到了他也没来，打他的手机，也不接，就给他发了一个电子邮件。十分钟以后，才看见天明急急忙忙地跑过来。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng shì gè diànnǎomí tā de diànnǎo cóng zǎo dào wǎn dōu kāi zhe tā zài wǎngshàng kàn xīnwén chá zīliào wánr yóuxì yǒushíhou hái zài zìjǐ de wǎngzhàn shàng xiě bókè yīhuìr dōu líbukāi diànnǎo tā chángcháng yī shàngwǎng jiù wàng le shíjiān zuótiān Lìshā Kē Lín Xuěméi hé tā yuēhǎo jīntiān yìqǐ qù chàng kǎlā'ōukēi shíjiān dào le tā yě méi lái dǎ tā de shǒujī yě bù jiē jiù gěi tā fā le yí ge diànzǐ yóujiàn shí fēnzhōng yǐhòu cái kànjiàn Tiānmíng jíjímángmáng de pǎo guòlai
example.translation: Zhang Tianming is a computer geek; his computer is on from morning till night. He reads news, looks up information, and plays games online. Sometimes he even writes on his own blog; he can't tear himself away from the computer for a moment. He often loses track of time as soon as he goes online. Yesterday, Lisa, Ke Lin, Xuemei, and he had agreed to go to karaoke together today. When the time came, he didn't show up. They called his cell phone, but he didn't answer, so they sent him an email. Ten minutes later, they saw Tianming running over in a hurry.

example.cn: 他在网上看新闻、查资料、玩儿游戏，有时候还在自己的网站上写博客，一会儿都离不开电脑。
example.py: Tā zài wǎngshàng kàn xīnwén, chá zīliào, wánr yóuxì, yǒushíhou hái zài zìjǐ de wǎngzhàn shàng xiě bókè, yīhuìr dōu lí bù kāi diànnǎo.
example.translation: He reads news, looks up information, and plays games online. Sometimes he even writes on his own blog; he can't tear himself away from the computer for a moment.

example.cn: 张天明是个电脑迷，他的电脑从早到晚都开着。他在网上看新闻、查资料、玩儿游戏，有时候还在自己的网站上写博客，一会儿都离不开电脑。他常常一上网，就忘了时间。昨天，丽莎、柯林、雪梅和他约好今天一起去唱卡拉OK，时间到了他也没来，打他的手机，也不接，就给他发了一个电子邮件。十分钟以后，才看见天明急急忙忙地跑过来。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng shì gè diànnǎomí tā de diànnǎo cóng zǎo dào wǎn dōu kāi zhe tā zài wǎngshàng kàn xīnwén chá zīliào wánr yóuxì yǒushíhou hái zài zìjǐ de wǎngzhàn shàng xiě bókè yīhuìr dōu líbukāi diànnǎo tā chángcháng yī shàngwǎng jiù wàng le shíjiān zuótiān Lìshā Kē Lín Xuěméi hé tā yuēhǎo jīntiān yìqǐ qù chàng kǎlā'ōukēi shíjiān dào le tā yě méi lái dǎ tā de shǒujī yě bù jiē jiù gěi tā fā le yí ge diànzǐ yóujiàn shí fēnzhōng yǐhòu cái kànjiàn Tiānmíng jíjímángmáng de pǎo guòlai
example.translation: Zhang Tianming is a computer geek; his computer is on from morning till night. He reads news, looks up information, and plays games online. Sometimes he even writes on his own blog; he can't tear himself away from the computer for a moment. He often loses track of time as soon as he goes online. Yesterday, Lisa, Ke Lin, Xuemei, and he had agreed to go to karaoke together today. When the time came, he didn't show up. They called his cell phone, but he didn't answer, so they sent him an email. Ten minutes later, they saw Tianming running over in a hurry.

example.cn: 他在网上看新闻、查资料、玩儿游戏，有时候还在自己的网站上写博客，一会儿都离不开电脑。
example.py: Tā zài wǎngshàng kàn xīnwén, chá zīliào, wánr yóuxì, yǒushíhou hái zài zìjǐ de wǎngzhàn shàng xiě bókè, yīhuìr dōu lí bù kāi diànnǎo.
example.translation: He reads news, looks up information, and plays games online. Sometimes he even writes on his own blog; he can't tear himself away from the computer for a moment.

example.cn: 昨天，丽莎、柯林、雪梅和他约好今天一起去唱卡拉OK，时间到了他也没来，打他的手机，也不接，就给他发了一个电子邮件。
example.py: Zuótiān, Lìshā, Kē Lín, Xuěméi hé tā yuēhǎo jīntiān yīqǐ qù chàng kǎlā'ōukēi, shíjiān dào le tā yě méi lái, dǎ tā de shǒujī, yě bù jiē, jiù gěi tā fā le yí ge diànzǐ yóujiàn.
example.translation: Yesterday, Lisa, Ke Lin, Xuemei, and he had agreed to go to karaoke together today. When the time came, he didn't show up. They called his cell phone, but he didn't answer, so they sent him an email.

example.cn: 十分钟以后，才看见天明急急忙忙地跑过来。
example.py: Shí fēnzhōng yǐhòu, cái kànjiàn Tiānmíng jíjímángmáng de pǎo guòlai.
example.translation: Ten minutes later, they saw Tianming running over in a hurry.

example.cn: 我在网上下载了一个软件，又查了一点儿东西，结果忘了时间了。
example.py: Wǒ zài wǎngshàng xiàzài le yí ge ruǎnjiàn, yòu chá le yìdiǎnr dōngxi, jiéguǒ wàng le shíjiān le.
example.translation: I was downloading a piece of software online and looked up a few things. As a result, I forgot the time.

example.cn: 我在网上下载了一个软件，又查了一点儿东西，结果忘了时间了。
example.py: Wǒ zài wǎngshàng xiàzài le yí ge ruǎnjiàn, yòu chá le yìdiǎnr dōngxi, jiéguǒ wàng le shíjiān le.
example.translation: I was downloading a piece of software online and looked up a few things. As a result, I forgot the time.

example.cn: 我在网上下载了一个软件，又查了一点儿东西，结果忘了时间了。
example.py: Wǒ zài wǎngshàng xiàzài le yí ge ruǎnjiàn, yòu chá le yìdiǎnr dōngxi, jiéguǒ wàng le shíjiān le.
example.translation: I was downloading a piece of software online and looked up a few things. As a result, I forgot the time.

example.cn: 我们的教授不让我们用网上的东西，一定要用书或者杂志。
example.py: Wǒmen de jiàoshòu bù ràng wǒmen yòng wǎngshàng de dōngxi, yīdìng yào yòng shū huòzhě zázhì.
example.translation: Our professor doesn't let us use things from the internet. We have to use books or magazines.

example.cn: 他说网上的垃圾太多了。
example.py: Tā shuō wǎngshàng de lājī tài duō le.
example.translation: He says there's too much trash on the internet.

落伍.definition: to lag behind, to be outdated

example.cn: 你的教授太落伍了，网上有很多资料很可靠很有用啊。
example.py: Nǐ de jiàoshòu tài luòwǔ le, wǎngshàng yǒu hěn duō zīliào hěn kěkào hěn yǒuyòng a.
example.translation: Your professor is too outdated. There's a lot of reliable and useful information online.

example.cn: 你的教授太落伍了，网上有很多资料很可靠很有用啊。网络世界又大又方便，你可以叫外卖、购物，你可以租房子、买车，衣食住行，什么都查得到。
example.py: nǐ de jiàoshòu tài luòwǔ le wǎngshàng yǒu hěn duō zīliào hěn kěkào hěn yǒuyòng a wǎngluò shìjiè yòu dà yòu fāngbiàn nǐ kěyǐ jiào wàimài gòuwù nǐ kěyǐ zū fángzi mǎi chē yī shí zhù xíng shénme dōu chá dédào
example.translation: Your professor is too outdated. There's a lot of reliable and useful information online. The internet world is so big and convenient. You can order takeout, go shopping, rent an apartment, buy a car... you can find anything related to food, clothing, housing, and transportation.

example.cn: 网上有很多资料很可靠很有用啊。
example.py: Wǎngshàng yǒu hěn duō zīliào hěn kěkào hěn yǒuyòng a.
example.translation: There's a lot of reliable and useful information online.

example.cn: 你可以叫外卖、购物，你可以租房子、买车，衣食住行，什么都查得到。
example.py: Nǐ kěyǐ jiào wàimài, gòuwù, nǐ kěyǐ zū fángzi, mǎi chē, yī shí zhù xíng, shénme dōu chá de dào.
example.translation: You can order takeout, go shopping, rent an apartment, buy a car... you can find anything related to food, clothing, housing, and transportation.

衣食住行.definition: basic necessities of life (lit. food, clothing, shelter, and transportation)

example.cn: 衣食住行，什么都查得到。
example.py: yī shí zhù xíng, shénme dōu chá de dào.
example.translation: ...you can find anything related to food, clothing, housing, and transportation.

example.cn: 你每次都迟到，老是害得大家等你。
example.py: Nǐ měi cì dōu chídào, lǎoshì hài de dàjiā děng nǐ.
example.translation: You're late every time, always making everyone wait for you.

example.cn: 你每次都迟到，老是害得大家等你。
example.py: Nǐ měi cì dōu chídào, lǎoshì hài de dàjiā děng nǐ.
example.translation: You're late every time, always making everyone wait for you.

example.cn: 你说我该不该生气？你每次都迟到，老是害得大家等你。
example.py: nǐ shuō wǒ gāi bù gāi shēngqì nǐ měi cì dōu chídào lǎoshì hài de dàjiā děng nǐ
example.translation: You tell me if I should be angry or not. You're late every time, always making everyone wait for you.

example.cn: 下次不敢了。
example.py: Xià cì bù gǎn le.
example.translation: I won't dare to do it again.

example.cn: 天明，你整天待在屋子里玩儿电脑，看起来真是玩儿上瘾了。
example.py: Tiānmíng, nǐ zhěngtiān dāi zài wūzi lǐ wánr diànnǎo, kàn qǐlái zhēnshi wánr shàngyǐn le.
example.translation: Tianming, you stay in your room all day playing on the computer. It really looks like you're addicted.

example.cn: 天明，你整天待在屋子里玩儿电脑，看起来真是玩儿上瘾了。
example.py: Tiānmíng, nǐ zhěngtiān dāi zài wūzi lǐ wánr diànnǎo, kàn qǐlái zhēnshi wánr shàngyǐn le.
example.translation: Tianming, you stay in your room all day playing on the computer. It really looks like you're addicted.

example.cn: 天明，你整天待在屋子里玩儿电脑，看起来真是玩儿上瘾了。
example.py: Tiānmíng, nǐ zhěngtiān dāi zài wūzi lǐ wánr diànnǎo, kàn qǐlái zhēnshi wánr shàngyǐn le.
example.translation: Tianming, you stay in your room all day playing on the computer. It really looks like you're addicted.

example.cn: 上瘾？没那么严重吧？
example.py: Shàngyǐn? Méi nàme yánzhòng ba?
example.translation: Addicted? It's not that serious, is it?

example.cn: 现在是网络时代，当然离不开电脑。
example.py: Xiànzài shì wǎngluò shídài, dāngrán lí bù kāi diànnǎo.
example.translation: This is the internet age; of course, we can't do without computers.

example.cn: 我知道电脑和网络在我们的生活中越来越重要。
example.py: Wǒ zhīdào diànnǎo hé wǎngluò zài wǒmen de shēnghuó zhōng yuèláiyuè zhòngyào.
example.translation: I know computers and the internet are becoming more and more important in our lives.

example.cn: 我也用电脑帮助我做翻译练习。
example.py: Wǒ yě yòng diànnǎo bāngzhù wǒ zuò fānyì liànxí.
example.translation: I also use the computer to help me with translation exercises.

example.cn: 我也用电脑帮助我做翻译练习，也上网比较价钱，可是不像你，常常忘了时间，忘了朋友。
example.py: Wǒ yě yòng diànnǎo bāngzhù wǒ zuò fānyì liànxí, yě shàng wǎng bǐjiào jiàqián, kěshì bù xiàng nǐ, chángcháng wàng le shíjiān, wàng le péngyou.
example.translation: I also use the computer to help me with translation exercises and to compare prices online. But I'm not like you, always forgetting the time and your friends.

免费.definition: free of charge (lit. exempt from paying the fee)

example.cn: 没错！免费，又快又方便。
example.py: Méi cuò! Miǎnfèi, yòu kuài yòu fāngbiàn.
example.translation: That's right! They're free, and also fast and convenient.

感觉.definition: feeling, sense perception; to feel, to perceive

example.cn: 可是有的时候，看微信、看电邮没有打电话感觉好。
example.py: Kěshì yǒu de shíhou, kàn wēixìn, kàn diànyóu méiyǒu dǎ diànhuà gǎnjué hǎo.
example.translation: But sometimes, reading WeChat messages and emails doesn't feel as good as talking on the phone.

example.cn: 张天明的父母希望孩子们能受到良好的教育，所以孩子一生下来就开始给他们存教育费。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng de fùmǔ xīwàng háizimen néng shòudào liánghǎo de jiàoyù, suǒyǐ háizi yī shēng xiàlái jiù kāishǐ gěi tāmen cún jiàoyù fèi.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming's parents hope their children can receive a good education, so they started saving for their education fund as soon as they were born.

example.cn: 张天明的父母希望孩子们能受到良好的教育，所以孩子一生下来就开始给他们存教育费。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng de fùmǔ xīwàng háizimen néng shòudào liánghǎo de jiàoyù, suǒyǐ háizi yī shēng xiàlái jiù kāishǐ gěi tāmen cún jiàoyù fèi.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming's parents hope their children can receive a good education, so they started saving for their education fund as soon as they were born.

example.cn: 张天明的父母希望孩子们能受到良好的教育，所以孩子一生下来就开始给他们存教育费。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng de fùmǔ xīwàng háizimen néng shòudào liánghǎo de jiàoyù, suǒyǐ háizi yī shēng xiàlái jiù kāishǐ gěi tāmen cún jiàoyù fèi.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming's parents hope their children can receive a good education, so they started saving for their education fund as soon as they were born.

example.cn: 张天明的父母希望孩子们能受到良好的教育，所以孩子一生下来就开始给他们存教育费。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng de fùmǔ xīwàng háizi men néng shòudào liánghǎo de jiàoyù suǒyǐ háizi yī shēng xialai jiù kāishǐ gěi tāmen cún jiàoyù fèi
example.translation: Zhang Tianming's parents hope their children can receive a good education, so they started saving for their education fund as soon as they were born.

example.cn: 虽然张天明父母的收入不少，但是供天明和姐姐上大学，经济上还是有些压力。
example.py: Suīrán Zhāng Tiānmíng fùmǔ de shōurù bù shǎo, dànshì gōng Tiānmíng hé jiějie shàng dàxué, jīngjì shang háishì yǒuxiē yālì.
example.translation: Although Zhang Tianming's parents' income is not low, supporting him and his older sister through college still puts some financial pressure on them.

example.cn: 虽然张天明父母的收入不少，但是供天明和姐姐上大学，经济上还是有些压力。
example.py: Suīrán Zhāng Tiānmíng fùmǔ de shōurù bù shǎo, dànshì gōng Tiānmíng hé jiějie shàng dàxué, jīngjì shang háishì yǒuxiē yālì.
example.translation: Although Zhang Tianming's parents' income is not low, supporting him and his older sister through college still puts some financial pressure on them.

example.cn: 虽然张天明父母的收入不少，但是供天明和姐姐上大学，经济上还是有些压力。
example.py: Suīrán Zhāng Tiānmíng fùmǔ de shōurù bù shǎo, dànshì gōng Tiānmíng hé jiějie shàng dàxué, jīngjì shàng háishì yǒuxiē yālì.
example.translation: Although Zhang Tianming's parents' income is not low, supporting him and his older sister through college still puts some financial pressure on them.

example.cn: 张天明觉得自己已经是大人了，应该找工作挣钱来减轻父母的负担，所以就上网看看有没有适合自己的工作。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng juéde zìjǐ yǐjīng shì dàren le, yīnggāi zhǎo gōngzuò zhèng qián lái jiǎnqīng fùmǔ de fùdān, suǒyǐ jiù shàngwǎng kàn kan yǒu méiyǒu shìhé zìjǐ de gōngzuò.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming feels that he is already an adult and should find a job to earn money to lessen his parents' burden, so he went online to see if there were any suitable jobs.

example.cn: 张天明觉得自己已经是大人了，应该找工作挣钱来减轻父母的负担，所以就上网看看有没有适合自己的工作。

影响.definition: to influence, to have an impact; influence

example.cn: 打工会不会影响学习？
example.py: dǎ gōng huì bù huì yǐng xiǎng xué xí
example.translation: Will working part-time affect your studies?

取得.definition: to obtain, to gain, to acquire

example.cn: 我想打工是想取得一些工作经验。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng dǎgōng shì xiǎng qǔdé yīxiē gōngzuò jīngyàn.
example.translation: I want to work to gain some work experience.

example.cn: 我想打工是想取得一些工作经验。
example.py: Wǒ xiǎng dǎgōng shì xiǎng qǔdé yīxiē gōngzuò jīngyàn.
example.translation: I want to work to gain some work experience.

example.cn: 我也想打工挣点儿零用钱。
example.py: Wǒ yě xiǎng dǎgōng zhèng diǎnr língyòngqián.
example.translation: I also want to get a part-time job to earn some pocket money.

example.cn: 奖学金不够交学费，我还申请了政府的学生贷款。
example.py: Jiǎngxuéjīn búgòu jiāo xuéfèi, wǒ hái shēnqǐng le zhèngfǔ de xuésheng dàikuǎn.
example.translation: The scholarship isn't enough to pay for tuition, so I also applied for a government student loan.

交.definition: to hand over, to turn in

example.cn: 奖学金不够交学费，我还申请了政府的学生贷款。
example.py: Jiǎngxuéjīn búgòu jiāo xuéfèi, wǒ hái shēnqǐng le zhèngfǔ de xuésheng dàikuǎn.
example.translation: The scholarship isn't enough to pay for tuition, so I also applied for a government student loan.

example.cn: 奖学金不够交学费，我还申请了政府的学生贷款。
example.py: Jiǎngxuéjīn bùgòu jiāo xuéfèi, wǒ hái shēnqǐngle zhèngfǔ de xuéshēng dàikuǎn.
example.translation: The scholarship isn't enough to pay for tuition, so I also applied for a government student loan.

example.cn: 奖学金不够交学费，我还申请了政府的学生贷款。
example.py: Jiǎngxuéjīn bùgòu jiāo xuéfèi, wǒ hái shēnqǐngle zhèngfǔ de xuéshēng dàikuǎn.
example.translation: The scholarship isn't enough to pay for tuition, so I also applied for a government student loan.

example.cn: 中国城市里有很多从农村出来找工作的人，饭馆儿喜欢找他们，因为工资比较低。
example.py: Zhōngguó chéngshì lǐ yǒu hěnduō cóng nóngcūn chūlái zhǎo gōngzuò de rén, fànguǎnr xǐhuān zhǎo tāmen, yīnwèi gōngzī bǐjiào dī.
example.translation: In Chinese cities, there are many people from rural areas looking for work. Restaurants like to hire them because their wages are lower.

example.cn: 饭馆儿喜欢找他们，因为工资比较低。
example.py: Fànguǎnr xǐhuan zhǎo tāmen, yīnwèi gōngzī bǐjiào dī.
example.translation: Restaurants like to hire them because their wages are lower.

example.cn: 饭馆儿喜欢找他们，因为工资比较低。
example.py: Fànguǎnr xǐhuan zhǎo tāmen, yīnwèi gōngzī bǐjiào dī.
example.translation: Restaurants like to hire them because their wages are lower.

example.cn: 我做过家教，教英文。
example.py: Wǒ zuòguo jiājiào, jiāo Yīngwén.
example.translation: I've been a tutor, teaching English.

example.cn: 我的同学有的做翻译，有的管理电脑，也有的帮人遛狗或者喂猫。
example.py: Wǒ de tóngxué yǒude zuò fānyì, yǒude guǎnlǐ diànnǎo, yěyǒude bāng rén liù gǒu huòzhě wèi māo.
example.translation: Some of my classmates work as translators, some manage computers, and some help people walk their dogs or feed their cats.

example.cn: 我的同学有的做翻译，有的管理电脑，也有的帮人遛狗或者喂猫。
example.py: Wǒ de tóngxué yǒude zuò fānyì, yǒude guǎnlǐ diànnǎo, yěyǒude bāng rén liù gǒu huòzhě wèi māo.
example.translation: Some of my classmates work as translators, some manage computers, and some help people walk their dogs or feed their cats.

读书.definition: to attend school, to study, to read aloud

example.cn: 看起来不少学生都是一边读书一边打工挣钱。
example.py: Kàn qǐlái bu shǎo xuéshēng dōu shì yībiān dúshū yībiān dǎgōng zhèngqián.
example.translation: It seems many students are working part-time to earn money while studying.

example.cn: 说到钱，我的同屋今天跟我借钱。
example.py: Shuō dào qián, wǒ de tóng wū jīntiān gēn wǒ jièqián.
example.translation: Speaking of money, my roommate borrowed money from me today.

example.cn: 她父母把她这个学期的饭钱都交了，可是她不是叫外卖，就是跟同学去饭馆儿，还常常乱买东西，乱花钱，欠了银行和信用卡公司很多钱。
example.py: Tā fùmǔ bǎ tā zhège xuéqí de fàn qián dōu jiāole, kěshì tā bùshì jiào wàimài, jiùshì gēn tóngxué qù fànguǎn er, hái chángcháng luàn mǎi dōngxī, luàn huā qián, qiànle yínháng hé xìnyòngkǎ gōngsī hěnduō qián.
example.translation: Her parents already paid for her meal plan for this semester, but she either orders takeout or goes to restaurants with her classmates. She also often buys things impulsively, spends money recklessly, and owes a lot of money to the bank and credit card companies.

example.cn: 欠了银行和信用卡公司很多钱。
example.py: Qiànle yínháng hé xìnyòngkǎ gōngsī hěn duō qián.
example.translation: She... owes a lot of money to the bank and credit card companies.

example.cn: 难怪她妈妈生气。
example.py: Nánguài tā māma shēngqì.
example.translation: No wonder her mom is angry.

example.cn: 谁不知道你是父母的乖孩子！好吧，你慢慢儿找工作，我们走了。
example.py: shéi bù zhīdào nǐ shì fùmǔ de guāi háizi hǎo ba nǐ mànmànr zhǎo gōngzuò wǒmen zǒu le
example.translation: Everyone knows you're your parents' good kid! Alright, you take your time looking for a job. We're leaving now.

example.cn: 李哲的父母是墨西哥移民。
example.py: Lǐ Zhé de fùmǔ shì Mòxīgē yímín.
example.translation: Li Zhe's parents are Mexican immigrants.

example.cn: 李哲的父母是墨西哥移民,他和他哥哥都是在加州出生、长大的。哥哥是电脑博士,设计软件、管理网站。李哲的嫂子十五年前从香港来美国留学,拿到硕士学位以后找到工作,就在美国住了下来。哥哥和嫂子结婚十年了,生活一直很幸福。可是最近两年在女儿的教育问题上,意见常常不同,有时吵得很厉害。一天,李哲正在电话上跟侄女聊天儿,看见丽莎走了进来。
example.py: Lǐ Zhé de fùmǔ shì Mòxīgē yímín tā hé tā gēge dōu shì zài Jiāzhōu chūshēng zhǎngdà de gēge shì diànnǎo bóshì shèjì ruǎnjiàn guǎnlǐ wǎngzhàn Lǐ Zhé de sǎozi shíwǔ nián qián cóng Xiānggǎng lái Měiguó liúxué nádào shuòshì xuéwèi yǐhòu zhǎodào gōngzuò jiù zài Měiguó zhù le xiàlai gēge hé sǎozi jiéhūn shí nián le shēnghuó yìzhí hěn xìngfú kěshì zuìjìn liǎng nián zài nǚ'ér de jiàoyù wèntí shàng yìjiàn chángcháng bùtóng yǒushí chǎo de hěn lìhai yìtiān Lǐ Zhé zhèngzài diànhuà shàng gēn zhínǚ liáotiānr kànjiàn Lìshā zǒu le jìnlái
example.translation: Li Zhe's parents are Mexican immigrants. He and his older brother were both born and raised in California. His brother is a computer Ph.D. who designs software and manages websites. Li Zhe's sister-in-law came to the U.S. from Hong Kong to study abroad fifteen years ago. After getting her master's degree, she found a job and settled down in the U.S. His brother and sister-in-law have been married for ten years and have always had a happy life. However, in the last two years, they have often had different opinions on their daughter's education, sometimes arguing fiercely. One day, Li Zhe was chatting with his niece on the phone when he saw Lisa walk in.

example.cn: 学习的事儿。我侄女才小学三年级,我嫂子就安排她:星期一学钢琴,星期二学画画儿,星期三学游泳,星期四学滑冰,只有星期五休息一天,星期六又叫她去上中文学校。她不喜欢学中文,所以就打电话到我这儿来,一边哭一边抱怨。
example.py: xuéxí de shìr wǒ zhínǚ cái xiǎoxué sān niánjí wǒ sǎozi jiù ānpái tā xīngqīyī xué gāngqín xīngqīèr xué huà huàr xīngqīsān xué yóuyǒng xīngqīsì xué huá bīng zhǐyǒu xīngqīwǔ xiūxi yì tiān xīngqīliù yòu jiào tā qù shàng zhōngwén xuéxiào tā bù xǐhuan xué zhōngwén suǒyǐ jiù dǎ diànhuà dào wǒ zhèr lái yìbiān kū yìbiān bàoyuàn
example.translation: About studying. My niece is only in the third grade, but my sister-in-law has already arranged for her: piano on Monday, painting on Tuesday, swimming on Wednesday, ice skating on Thursday, with only Friday off. On Saturday, she's told to go to Chinese school again. She doesn't like learning Chinese, so she called me, crying and complaining.

example.cn: 我嫂子就安排她：星期一学钢琴，星期二学画画儿，星期三学游泳，星期四学滑冰。
example.py: Wǒ sǎozi jiù ānpái tā: xīngqīyī xué gāngqín, xīngqī'èr xué huàhuàr, xīngqīsān xué yóuyǒng, xīngqīsì xué huábīng.
example.translation: my sister-in-law has already arranged for her: piano on Monday, painting on Tuesday, swimming on Wednesday, ice skating on Thursday.

example.cn: 我侄女才小学三年级，我嫂子就安排她：星期一学钢琴，星期二学画画儿，星期三学游泳，星期四学滑冰，只有星期五休息一天，星期六又叫她去上中文学校。
example.py: Wǒ zhínǚ cái xiǎoxué sān niánjí, wǒ sǎozi jiù ānpái tā: xīngqīyī xué gāngqín, xīngqī'èr xué huàhuàr, xīngqīsān xué yóuyǒng, xīngqīsì xué huábīng, zhǐyǒu xīngqīwǔ xiūxi yī tiān, xīngqīliù yòu jiào tā qù shàng Zhōngwén xuéxiào.
example.translation: My niece is only in the third grade, but my sister-in-law has already arranged for her: piano on Monday, painting on Tuesday, swimming on Wednesday, ice skating on Thursday, with only Friday off. On Saturday, she's told to go to Chinese school again.

example.cn: 我侄女才小学三年级，我嫂子就安排她：星期一学钢琴，星期二学画画儿，星期三学游泳，星期四学滑冰，只有星期五休息一天，星期六又叫她去上中文学校。
example.py: Wǒ zhínǚ cái xiǎoxué sān niánjí, wǒ sǎozi jiù ānpái tā: xīngqīyī xué gāngqín, xīngqī'èr xué huàhuàr, xīngqīsān xué yóuyǒng, xīngqīsì xué huábīng, zhǐyǒu xīngqīwǔ xiūxi yī tiān, xīngqīliù yòu jiào tā qù shàng Zhōngwén xuéxiào.
example.translation: My niece is only in the third grade, but my sister-in-law has already arranged for her: piano on Monday, painting on Tuesday, swimming on Wednesday, ice skating on Thursday, with only Friday off. On Saturday, she's told to go to Chinese school again.

example.cn: 她不喜欢学中文，所以就打电话到我这儿来，一边哭一边抱怨。
example.py: Tā bù xǐhuan xué Zhōngwén, suǒyǐ jiù dǎ diànhuà dào wǒ zhèr lái, yībiān kū yībiān bàoyuàn.
example.translation: She doesn't like learning Chinese, so she called me, crying and complaining.

example.cn: 父母应该尊重孩子自己的选择。
example.py: Fùmǔ yīnggāi zūnzhòng háizi zìjǐ de xuǎnzé.
example.translation: parents should respect their children's own choices.

example.cn: 父母应该尊重孩子自己的选择。
example.py: Fùmǔ yīnggāi zūnzhòng háizi zìjǐ de xuǎnzé.
example.translation: parents should respect their children's own choices.

example.cn: 这些话一定是跟我哥哥学的。我嫂子整天让她学这学那,我哥哥反对给孩子太大的压力,他认为对孩子来说,最重要的是有一个快乐的童年。
example.py: zhèxiē huà yídìng shì gēn wǒ gēge xué de wǒ sǎozi zhěngtiān ràng tā xué zhè xué nà wǒ gēge fǎnduì gěi háizi tài dà de yālì tā rènwéi duì háizi lái shuō zuì zhòngyào de shì yǒu yí gè kuàilè de tóngnián
example.translation: She must have learned these words from my brother. My sister-in-law makes her learn this and that all day, but my brother is against putting too much pressure on the child. He thinks that for a child, the most important thing is to have a happy childhood.

example.cn: 他认为对孩子来说,最重要的是有一个快乐的童年。
example.py: Tā rènwéi duì háizi lái shuō, zuì zhòngyào de shì yǒu yí ge kuàilè de tóngnián.
example.translation: He thinks that for a child, the most important thing is to have a happy childhood.

example.cn: 我的童年很快乐。
example.py: Wǒ de tóngnián hěn kuàilè.
example.translation: My childhood was very happy.

example.cn: 我的看法是两个都重要。
example.py: Wǒ de kànfǎ shì liǎng ge dōu zhòngyào.
example.translation: My view is that both are important.

做法.definition: way of doing things, course of action

example.cn: 没想到你跟我嫂子的看法一样!你同意我嫂子的做法?
example.py: méi xiǎngdào nǐ gēn wǒ sǎozi de kànfǎ yíyàng nǐ tóngyì wǒ sǎozi de zuòfǎ
example.translation: I didn't expect you to see eye to eye with my sister-in-law! Do you agree with her approach?

example.cn: 我不完全同意,但我能理解。
example.py: Wǒ bù wánquán tóngyì, dàn wǒ néng lǐjiě.
example.translation: I don't completely agree, but I can understand.

example.cn: 我不完全同意,但我能理解。
example.py: Wǒ bù wánquán tóngyì, dàn wǒ néng lǐjiě.
example.translation: I don't completely agree, but I can understand.

望子成龙.definition: to hope that one's son will become successful (lit. to hope that one's son will become a dragon)

example.cn: 很多父母望子成龙,望女成凤,希望自己的孩子小时候好好儿学习,将来能做出一番大事业。
example.py: Hěn duō fùmǔ wàng zǐ chéng lóng, wàng nǚ chéng fèng, xīwàng zìjǐ de háizi xiǎoshíhou hǎohāor xuéxí, jiānglái néng zuòchū yī fān dà shìyè.
example.translation: Many parents hope their sons will become dragons and their daughters will become phoenixes, hoping their children study hard when they are young so they can have a great career in the future.

望女成凤.definition: to hope that one's daughter will become successful (lit. to hope that one's daughter will become a phoenix)

example.cn: 很多父母望子成龙,望女成凤,希望自己的孩子小时候好好儿学习,将来能做出一番大事业。
example.py: Hěn duō fùmǔ wàng zǐ chéng lóng, wàng nǚ chéng fèng, xīwàng zìjǐ de háizi xiǎoshíhou hǎohāor xuéxí, jiānglái néng zuòchū yī fān dà shìyè.
example.translation: Many parents hope their sons will become dragons and their daughters will become phoenixes, hoping their children study hard when they are young so they can have a great career in the future.

example.cn: 很多父母望子成龙,望女成凤,希望自己的孩子小时候好好儿学习,将来能做出一番大事业。可是到现在我也想不清楚,孩子到底是将来“成龙”“成凤”好,还是有一个快乐的童年好?
example.py: hěn duō fù mǔ wàng zǐ chéng lóng wàng nǚ chéng fèng xī wàng zì jǐ de hái zi xiǎo shí hou hǎo hāor xué xí jiāng lái néng zuò chū yì fān dà shì yè kě shì dào xiàn zài wǒ yě xiǎng bù qīng chu hái zi dào dǐ shì jiāng lái chéng lóng chéng fèng hǎo hái shì yǒu yí gè kuài lè de tóng nián hǎo
example.translation: Many parents hope their sons will become dragons and their daughters will become phoenixes, hoping their children study hard when they are young so they can have a great career in the future. But even now, I'm still not sure whether it's better for a child to become a 'dragon' or 'phoenix' in the future, or to have a happy childhood.

example.cn: 很多父母望子成龙,望女成凤,希望自己的孩子小时候好好儿学习,将来能做出一番大事业。
example.py: Hěnduō fùmǔ wàng zǐ chéng lóng, wàng nǚ chéng fèng, xīwàng zìjǐ de háizi xiǎoshíhou hǎohāor xuéxí, jiānglái néng zuòchū yī fān dà shìyè.
example.translation: Many parents hope their sons will become dragons and their daughters will become phoenixes, hoping their children study hard when they are young so they can have a great career in the future.

example.cn: 可是你别忘了,有些知识不是从书上学的,而是从社会、从生活中学的。
example.py: Kěshì nǐ bié wàng le, yǒuxiē zhīshi búshì cóng shū shàng xué de, érshì cóng shèhuì, cóng shēnghuó zhōng xué de.
example.translation: But don't forget, some knowledge isn't learned from books, but from society and from life.

example.cn: 所以孩子最好还是在学校多学一些知识。
example.py: Suǒyǐ háizi zuìhǎo háishì zài xuéxiào duō xué yīxiē zhīshi.
example.translation: So it's best for children to learn more knowledge in school.

example.cn: 李哲的父母是墨西哥移民,他和他哥哥都是在加州出生、长大的。哥哥是电脑博士,设计软件、管理网站。李哲的嫂子十五年前从香港来美国留学,拿到硕士学位以后找到工作,就在美国住了下来。哥哥和嫂子结婚十年了,生活一直很幸福。可是最近两年在女儿的教育问题上,意见常常不同,有时吵得很厉害。一天,李哲正在电话上跟侄女聊天儿,看见丽莎走了进来。
example.py: Lǐ Zhé de fùmǔ shì Mòxīgē yímín tā hé tā gēge dōu shì zài Jiāzhōu chūshēng zhǎngdà de gēge shì diànnǎo bóshì shèjì ruǎnjiàn guǎnlǐ wǎngzhàn Lǐ Zhé de sǎozi shíwǔ nián qián cóng Xiānggǎng lái Měiguó liúxué nádào shuòshì xuéwèi yǐhòu zhǎodào gōngzuò jiù zài Měiguó zhù le xiàlai gēge hé sǎozi jiéhūn shí nián le shēnghuó yìzhí hěn xìngfú kěshì zuìjìn liǎng nián zài nǚ'ér de jiàoyù wèntí shàng yìjiàn chángcháng bùtóng yǒushí chǎo de hěn lìhai yìtiān Lǐ Zhé zhèngzài diànhuà shàng gēn zhínǚ liáotiānr kànjiàn Lìshā zǒu le jìnlái
example.translation: Li Zhe's parents are Mexican immigrants. He and his older brother were both born and raised in California. His brother is a computer Ph.D. who designs software and manages websites. Li Zhe's sister-in-law came to the U.S. from Hong Kong to study abroad fifteen years ago. After getting her master's degree, she found a job and settled down in the U.S. His brother and sister-in-law have been married for ten years and have always had a happy life. However, in the last two years, they have often had different opinions on their daughter's education, sometimes arguing fiercely. One day, Li Zhe was chatting with his niece on the phone when he saw Lisa walk in.

example.cn: 我也正想学学中国地理呢。
example.py: Wǒ yě zhèng xiǎng xuéxue Zhōngguó dìlǐ ne.
example.translation: I was just thinking of studying Chinese geography.

example.cn: 他的父母希望他去他们的家乡南京看看。
example.py: Tā de fùmǔ xīwàng tā qù tāmen de jiāxiāng Nánjīng kànkan.
example.translation: His parents hoped he would visit their hometown, Nanjing.

example.cn: 为了决定旅行的路线，张天明拿出一张中国地图，看了起来。
example.py: Wèile juédìng lǚxíng de lùxiàn, Zhāng Tiānmíng ná chū yī zhāng Zhōngguó dìtú, kàn le qǐlái.
