example.py: Wǒ tīngshuō Zhōngguó zhèngfǔ guīdìng bàngōngshì hé gōnggòng chǎngsuǒ, dōngtiān nuǎnqì de wēndù bùnéng gāoyú Shèshì 20 dù, xiàtiān kōngtiáo de wēndù bùnéng dīyú 26 dù.
example.translation: I heard the Chinese government stipulates that in offices and public places, the heat cannot be set higher than 20 degrees Celsius in winter, and the air conditioning cannot be set lower than 26 degrees in summer.

example.cn: 中国老百姓一般都比较节俭，所以不少家庭有存款。
example.py: Zhōngguó lǎobǎixìng yībān dōu bǐjiào jiéjiǎn, suǒyǐ bù shǎo jiātíng yǒu cúnkuǎn.
example.translation: Chinese people are generally quite frugal, so many families have savings.

存款.definition: bank savings; to deposit money at a bank

example.cn: 中国老百姓一般都比较节俭，所以不少家庭有存款。
example.py: Zhōngguó lǎobǎixìng yībān dōu bǐjiào jiéjiǎn, suǒyǐ bù shǎo jiātíng yǒu cúnkuǎn.
example.translation: Chinese people are generally quite frugal, so many families have savings.

example.cn: 再说，买房子也是一种不错的投资啊。
example.py: Zàishuō, mǎi fángzi yěshì yī zhǒng bùcuò de tóuzī a.
example.translation: Besides, buying a house is also a good investment.

投资.definition: to invest capital; investment (financial) (lit. to throw or cast capital)

example.cn: 他们觉得让子女受到最好的教育，将来事业成功、生活幸福，才是最好的投资。
example.py: Tāmen juéde ràng zǐnǚ shòudào zuì hǎo de jiàoyù, jiānglái shìyè chénggōng, shēnghuó xìngfú, cái shì zuì hǎo de tóuzī.
example.translation: They feel that providing their children with the best education, so they can have successful careers and happy lives in the future, is the best investment.

example.cn: 改革开放以后，他们中间不少人开始考虑投资理财的问题。
example.py: Gǎigé kāifàng yǐhòu, tāmen zhōngjiān bùshǎo rén kāishǐ kǎolǜ tóuzī lǐcái de wèntí.
example.translation: After the reform and opening-up, many of them began to consider investment and wealth management.

涨.definition: to rise, to surge, to go up

example.cn: 最近一些年，中国的房价涨得很快，买房子成为一些人投资的选择。
example.py: Zuìjìn yīxiē nián, Zhōngguó de fángjià zhǎng de hěn kuài, mǎi fángzi chéngwéi yīxiē rén tóuzī de xuǎnzé.
example.translation: In recent years, China's housing prices have risen rapidly, and buying a house has become an investment choice for some people.

涨.definition: to rise, to surge, to go up (of water, prices, etc.)

example.cn: 最近一些年，中国的房价涨得很快，买房子成为一些人投资的选择。
example.py: Zuìjìn yīxiē nián, Zhōngguó de fángjià zhǎng de hěn kuài, mǎi fángzi chéngwéi yīxiē rén tóuzī de xuǎnzé.
example.translation: In recent years, China's housing prices have risen rapidly, and buying a house has become an investment choice for some people.

example.cn: 前几天姑妈听说有几个人这两年只要炒股就赚钱，所以变主意了，不想买房子了。
example.py: Qián jǐ tiān gūmā tīngshuō yǒu jǐ ge rén zhè liǎng nián zhǐyào chǎo gǔ jiù zhuànqián, suǒyǐ biàn zhǔyi le, bù xiǎng mǎi fángzi le.
example.translation: A few days ago, my aunt heard that a few people have been making money just by flipping stocks these past two years, so she changed her mind and doesn't want to buy a house anymore.

引起.definition: to give rise to, to lead to

example.cn: 张天明平常不大考虑投资理财的事，今天他表哥跟他在网上聊了半天这个问题，才引起他的思考。他吃完晚饭，就跟丽莎聊了起来。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng píngcháng bú dà kǎolǜ tóuzī lǐcái de shì jīntiān tā biǎogē gēn tā zài wǎngshàng liáo le bàntiān zhège wèntí cái yǐnqǐ tā de sīkǎo tā chī wán wǎnfàn jiù gēn Lìshā liáo le qǐlái
example.translation: Zhang Tianming usually doesn't think much about investment and wealth management. Today, his cousin chatted with him online about this issue for a long time, which sparked his thoughts. After dinner, he started chatting with Lisa.

思考.definition: to think deeply, to ponder over; contemplation, cogitation

example.cn: 张天明平常不大考虑投资理财的事，今天他表哥跟他在网上聊了半天这个问题，才引起他的思考。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng píngcháng bù dà kǎolǜ tóuzī lǐcái de shì, jīntiān tā biǎogē gēn tā zài wǎngshàng liáo le bàntiān zhège wèntí, cái yǐnqǐ tā de sīkǎo.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming usually doesn't think much about investment and wealth management. Today, his cousin chatted with him online about this issue for a long time, which sparked his thoughts.

example.cn: 最近姑妈跟表哥有点儿矛盾，表哥好像有点儿郁闷。
example.py: Zuìjìn gūmā gēn biǎogē yǒudiǎnr máodùn, biǎogē hǎoxiàng yǒudiǎnr yùmèn.
example.translation: Recently, my aunt and my cousin have had a bit of a conflict, and my cousin seems a little depressed.

example.cn: 最近姑妈跟表哥有点儿矛盾，表哥好像有点儿郁闷。
example.py: Zuìjìn gūmā gēn biǎogē yǒudiǎnr máodùn, biǎogē hǎoxiàng yǒudiǎnr yùmèn.
example.translation: Recently, my aunt and my cousin have had a bit of a conflict, and my cousin seems a little depressed.

example.cn: 最近姑妈跟表哥有点儿矛盾，表哥好像有点儿郁闷。
example.py: Zuìjìn gūmā gēn biǎogē yǒudiǎnr máodùn, biǎogē hǎoxiàng yǒudiǎnr yùmèn.
example.translation: Recently, my aunt and my cousin have had a bit of a conflict, and my cousin seems a little depressed.

省吃俭用.definition: to be frugal (with food and other living expenses)

example.cn: 姑妈退休前省吃俭用存了一笔钱，要留给孙子孙女上大学用。
example.py: Gūmā tuìxiū qián shěng chī jiǎn yòng cúnle yī bǐ qián, yào liú gěi sūnzi sūnnǚ shàng dàxué yòng.
example.translation: Before she retired, my aunt saved a sum of money by being frugal, intending to leave it for her grandchildren to use for college.

example.cn: 姑妈退休前省吃俭用存了一笔钱，要留给孙子孙女上大学用。
example.py: gūmā tuìxiū qián shěng chī jiǎn yòng cún le yì bǐ qián yào liú gěi sūnzi sūnnǚ shàng dàxué yòng
example.translation: Before she retired, my aunt saved a sum of money by being frugal, intending to leave it for her grandchildren to use for college.

example.cn: 姑妈退休前省吃俭用存了一笔钱，要留给孙子孙女上大学用。
example.py: gūmā tuìxiū qián shěng chī jiǎn yòng cún le yì bǐ qián yào liú gěi sūnzi sūnnǚ shàng dàxué yòng
example.translation: Before she retired, my aunt saved a sum of money by being frugal, intending to leave it for her grandchildren to use for college.

example.cn: 姑妈要给表哥的未婚妻买一辆新车，算是结婚礼物。
example.py: Gūmā yào gěi biǎogē de wèihūnqī mǎi yí liàng xīn chē, suàn shì jiéhūn lǐwù.
example.translation: My aunt wants to buy a new car for my cousin's fiancée as a wedding gift.

算.definition: to count as, to be considered as

example.cn: 表哥不是计划明年结婚吗？姑妈要给表哥的未婚妻买一辆新车，算是结婚礼物。
example.py: biǎo gē bú shì jì huà míng nián jié hūn ma gū mā yào gěi biǎo gē de wèi hūn qī mǎi yí liàng xīn chē suàn shì jié hūn lǐ wù
example.translation: Isn't my cousin planning to get married next year? My aunt wants to buy a new car for my cousin's fiancée as a wedding gift.

example.cn: 可是表哥他们不同意买车。他们俩上班的地方很近，合用一辆车就行了。他们劝姑妈买房子，说姑妈辛苦了几十年，应该住一套大一些的房子，舒舒服服地享受退休生活。
example.py: kěshì biǎogē tāmen bù tóngyì mǎi chē tāmen liǎ shàngbān de dìfang hěn jìn héyòng yì liàng chē jiù xíng le tāmen quàn gūmā mǎi fángzi shuō gūmā xīnkǔ le jǐ shí nián yīnggāi zhù yí tào dà yīxiē de fángzi shūshūfúfú de xiǎngshòu tuìxiū shēnghuó
example.translation: But my cousin and his fiancée don't agree to buying a car. Their workplaces are very close, so sharing one car is enough. They persuaded my aunt to buy a house, saying she has worked hard for decades and should live in a bigger house and enjoy her retirement life comfortably.

劝.definition: to persuade, to advise, to urge

example.cn: 他们劝姑妈买房子，说姑妈辛苦了几十年，应该住一套大一些的房子，舒舒服服地享受退休生活。
example.py: Tāmen quàn gūmā mǎi fángzi, shuō gūmā xīnkǔle jǐ shí nián, yīnggāi zhù yí tào dà yìxiē de fángzi, shūshūfúfú de xiǎngshòu tuìxiū shēnghuó.
example.translation: They persuaded my aunt to buy a house, saying she has worked hard for decades and should live in a bigger house and enjoy her retirement life comfortably.

example.cn: 他们劝姑妈买房子，说姑妈辛苦了几十年，应该住一套大一些的房子，舒舒服服地享受退休生活。
example.py: Tāmen quàn gūmā mǎi fángzi, shuō gūmā xīnkǔle jǐ shí nián, yīnggāi zhù yí tào dà yìxiē de fángzi, shūshūfúfú de xiǎngshòu tuìxiū shēnghuó.
example.translation: They persuaded my aunt to buy a house, saying she has worked hard for decades and should live in a bigger house and enjoy her retirement life comfortably.

example.cn: 他们劝姑妈买房子，说姑妈辛苦了几十年，应该住一套大一些的房子，舒舒服服地享受退休生活。
example.py: Tāmen quàn gūmā mǎi fángzi, shuō gūmā xīnkǔle jǐ shí nián, yīnggāi zhù yí tào dà yìxiē de fángzi, shūshūfúfú de xiǎngshòu tuìxiū shēnghuó.
example.translation: They persuaded my aunt to buy a house, saying she has worked hard for decades and should live in a bigger house and enjoy her retirement life comfortably.

example.cn: 另外一个老太太，三十年前就贷款买房子住进去了。
example.py: Lìngwài yí ge lǎotàitai, sānshí nián qián jiù dàikuǎn mǎi fángzi zhù jìnqù le.
example.translation: Another elderly lady got a loan to buy a house and moved in thirty years ago.

example.cn: 说的是，有一个老太太存了三十年钱，利息很少，钱增加得很慢，到了老年才买到一套房子，住了进去。
example.py: Shuō de shì, yǒu yí ge lǎotàitai cúnle sānshí nián qián, lìxī hěn shǎo, qián zēngjiā de hěn màn, dàole lǎonián cái mǎidào yí tào fángzi, zhùle jìnqù.
example.translation: It's about one elderly lady who saved money for thirty years. The interest was very low, and the money grew very slowly. She was only able to buy a house and move in when she was old.

example.cn: 这个故事我以前也听说过。说的是，有一个老太太存了三十年钱，利息很少，钱增加得很慢，到了老年才买到一套房子，住了进去。另外一个老太太，三十年前就贷款买房子住进去了。比一比，哪个老太太更会生活？
example.py: zhè ge gù shi wǒ yǐ qián yě tīng shuō guo shuō de shì yǒu yí ge lǎo tài tai cún le sān shí nián qián lì xī hěn shǎo qián zēng jiā de hěn màn dào le lǎo nián cái mǎi dào yí tào fáng zi zhù le jìn qù lìng wài yí ge lǎo tài tai sān shí nián qián jiù dài kuǎn mǎi fáng zi zhù jìn qù le bǐ yi bǐ nǎ ge lǎo tài tai gèng huì shēng huó
example.translation: I've heard this story before. It's about one elderly lady who saved money for thirty years. The interest was very low, and the money grew very slowly. She was only able to buy a house and move in when she was old. Another elderly lady got a loan to buy a house and moved in thirty years ago. Comparing the two, which lady knows how to live better?

example.cn: 有一个老太太存了三十年钱，利息很少，钱增加得很慢，到了老年才买到一套房子，住了进去。
example.py: Yǒu yī gè lǎotàitai cún le sānshí nián qián, lìxī hěn shǎo, qián zēngjiā de hěn màn, dào le lǎonián cái mǎi dào yī tào fángzi, zhù le jìnqù.
example.translation: It's about one elderly lady who saved money for thirty years. The interest was very low, and the money grew very slowly. She was only able to buy a house and move in when she was old.

example.cn: 对，表哥就用这个故事说服了姑妈，姑妈最后同意买房子了。
example.py: Duì, biǎogē jiù yòng zhè ge gùshi shuōfú le gūmā, gūmā zuìhòu tóngyì mǎi fángzi le.
example.translation: Right. My cousin used this story to persuade my aunt, and she finally agreed to buy a house.

example.cn: 两个星期前，他们觉得有一套三室一厅两卫的房子不错，原来后天就要去签购房合同了，没想到姑妈的想法突然变了。
example.py: Liǎng ge xīngqī qián, tāmen juéde yǒu yī tào sān shì yī tīng liǎng wèi de fángzi bùcuò, yuánlái hòutiān jiù yào qù qiān gòufáng hétong le, méi xiǎngdào gūmā de xiǎngfǎ tūrán biàn le.
example.translation: Two weeks ago, they found a nice apartment with three bedrooms, one living room, and two bathrooms. They were supposed to sign the purchase contract the day after tomorrow, but unexpectedly, my aunt's idea suddenly changed.

example.cn: 原来后天就要去签购房合同了，没想到姑妈的想法突然变了。
example.py: yuánlái hòutiān jiù yào qù qiān gòufáng hétong le, méi xiǎngdào gūmā de xiǎngfǎ tūrán biàn le.
example.translation: They were supposed to sign the purchase contract the day after tomorrow, but unexpectedly, my aunt's idea suddenly changed.

example.cn: 没想到姑妈的想法突然变了。
example.py: méi xiǎngdào gūmā de xiǎngfǎ tūrán biàn le.
example.translation: Unexpectedly, my aunt's idea suddenly changed.

example.cn: 没想到姑妈的想法突然变了。
example.py: méi xiǎngdào gūmā de xiǎngfǎ tūrán biàn le.
example.translation: Unexpectedly, my aunt's idea suddenly changed.

example.cn: 姑妈退休以后常跟在一起做义工的朋友们打打麻将，聊聊天儿。
example.py: Gūmā tuìxiū yǐhòu cháng gēn zài yìqǐ zuò yìgōng de péngyoumen dǎda májiàng, liáoliao tiānr.
example.translation: After retiring, my aunt often plays mahjong and chats with her friends who do volunteer work together.

example.cn: 姑妈退休以后常跟在一起做义工的朋友们打打麻将，聊聊天儿。
example.py: Gūmā tuìxiū yǐhòu cháng gēn zài yīqǐ zuò yìgōng de péngyoumen dǎ dǎ májiàng, liáo liáo tiānr.
example.translation: After retiring, my aunt often plays mahjong and chats with her friends who do volunteer work together.

example.cn: 姑妈退休以后常跟在一起做义工的朋友们打打麻将，聊聊天儿。
example.py: Gūmā tuìxiū yǐhòu cháng gēn zài yìqǐ zuò yìgōng de péngyoumen dǎda májiàng, liáoliao tiānr.
example.translation: After retiring, my aunt often plays mahjong and chats with her friends who do volunteer work together.

example.cn: 姑妈退休以后常跟在一起做义工的朋友们打打麻将，聊聊天儿。前几天姑妈听说有几个人这两年只要炒股就赚钱，所以变主意了，不想买房子了。
example.py: gūmā tuìxiū yǐhòu cháng gēn zài yìqǐ zuò yìgōng de péngyou men dǎda májiàng liáoliao tiānr qián jǐ tiān gūmā tīngshuō yǒu jǐ ge rén zhè liǎng nián zhǐyào chǎogǔ jiù zhuànqián suǒyǐ biàn zhúyi le bù xiǎng mǎi fángzi le
example.translation: After retiring, my aunt often plays mahjong and chats with her friends who do volunteer work together. A few days ago, my aunt heard that a few people have been making money just by flipping stocks these past two years, so she changed her mind and doesn't want to buy a house anymore.

example.cn: 她想投资股市？
example.py: Tā xiǎng tóuzī gǔshì?
example.translation: She wants to invest in the stock market?

example.cn: 可是姑妈不知道炒股有风险吗？
example.py: Kěshì gūmā bù zhīdào chǎogǔ yǒu fēngxiǎn ma?
example.translation: But doesn't your aunt know that flipping stocks is risky?

example.cn: 跟李文父母一起打太极拳的一位老先生，把房子抵押给银行，然后把钱都买了股票，没想到股市一直跌，不到三个月，赔了一半。
example.py: Gēn Lǐ Wén fùmǔ yìqǐ dǎ tàijíquán de yí wèi lǎo xiānsheng, bǎ fángzi dǐyā gěi yínháng, ránhòu bǎ qián dōu mǎi le gǔpiào, méi xiǎngdào gǔshì yìzhí diē, bú dào sān ge yuè, péi le yíbàn.
example.translation: An old gentleman who practices Tai Chi with Li Wen's parents mortgaged his house to the bank, then used all the money to buy stocks. Unexpectedly, the stock market kept falling, and in less than three months, he lost half of it.

example.cn: 跟李文父母一起打太极拳的一位老先生，把房子抵押给银行，然后把钱都买了股票，没想到股市一直跌，不到三个月，赔了一半。
example.py: Gēn Lǐ Wén fùmǔ yìqǐ dǎ tàijíquán de yí wèi lǎoxiānsheng, bǎ fángzi dǐyā gěi yínháng, ránhòu bǎ qián dōu mǎi le gǔpiào, méi xiǎngdào gǔshì yìzhí diē, bú dào sān ge yuè, péi le yí bàn.
example.translation: An old gentleman who practices Tai Chi with Li Wen's parents mortgaged his house to the bank, then used all the money to buy stocks. Unexpectedly, the stock market kept falling, and in less than three months, he lost half of it.

example.cn: 把房子抵押给银行，然后把钱都买了股票，没想到股市一直跌，不到三个月，赔了一半。
example.py: Bǎ fángzi dǐyā gěi yínháng, ránhòu bǎ qián dōu mǎi le gǔpiào, méi xiǎngdào gǔshì yìzhí diē, bú dào sān ge yuè, péi le yí bàn.
example.translation: mortgaged his house to the bank, then bought stocks with all the money. Unexpectedly, the stock market kept falling, and in less than three months, he lost half of it.

example.cn: 没想到股市一直跌，不到三个月，赔了一半。
example.py: méi xiǎngdào gǔshì yìzhí diē, bú dào sān ge yuè, péi le yí bàn.
example.translation: Unexpectedly, the stock market kept falling, and in less than three months, he lost half of it.

赔.definition: to lose (money, etc.), to suffer a loss in a deal

example.cn: 可是姑妈不知道炒股有风险吗？跟李文父母一起打太极拳的一位老先生，把房子抵押给银行，然后把钱都买了股票，没想到股市一直跌，不到三个月，赔了一半。
example.py: kěshì gūmā bù zhīdào chǎogǔ yǒu fēngxiǎn ma gēn Lǐ Wén fùmǔ yìqǐ dǎ tàijíquán de yí wèi lǎo xiānsheng bǎ fángzi dǐyā gěi yínháng ránhòu bǎ qián dōu mǎi le gǔpiào méi xiǎngdào gǔshì yìzhí diē bú dào sān ge yuè péi le yíbàn
example.translation: But doesn't your aunt know that flipping stocks is risky? An old gentleman who practices Tai Chi with Li Wen's parents mortgaged his house to the bank, then used all the money to buy stocks. Unexpectedly, the stock market kept falling, and in less than three months, he lost half of it.

example.cn: 中国是世界文明古国之一，有文字记载的历史就有四千多年。
example.py: Zhōngguó shì shìjiè wénmíng gǔguó zhīyī, yǒu wénzì jìzǎi de lìshǐ jiù yǒu sìqiān duō nián.
example.translation: China is one of the world's ancient civilizations, with a recorded history of over four thousand years.

example.cn: 丽莎这个学期除了中文课以外还选了一门中国历史课。中国是世界文明古国之一，有文字记载的历史就有四千多年。为了对中国历史有更多的了解，她请李文带她去中国国家博物馆参观。张天明和柯林对中国历史也有兴趣，听说丽莎要参观博物馆，也要跟着一起去。李文很高兴地答应了。
example.py: Lìshā zhè ge xuéqī chúle Zhōngwén kè yǐwài hái xuǎn le yī mén Zhōngguó lìshǐ kè Zhōngguó shì shìjiè wénmíng gǔguó zhī yī yǒu wénzì jìzǎi de lìshǐ jiù yǒu sì qiān duō nián wèile duì Zhōngguó lìshǐ yǒu gèng duō de liǎojiě tā qǐng Lǐ Wén dài tā qù Zhōngguó guójiā bówùguǎn cānguān Zhāng Tiānmíng hé Kē Lín duì Zhōngguó lìshǐ yě yǒu xìngqù tīngshuō Lìshā yào cānguān bówùguǎn yě yào gēnzhe yīqǐ qù Lǐ Wén hěn gāoxìng de dāying le
example.translation: This semester, besides Chinese, Lisa also took a course on Chinese history. China is one of the world's ancient civilizations, with a recorded history of over four thousand years. To understand Chinese history better, she asked Li Wen to take her to the National Museum of China. Zhang Tianming and Ke Lin are also interested in Chinese history. Hearing that Lisa was going to visit the museum, they wanted to go along, too. Li Wen happily agreed.

文字.definition: characters, written form of a language

example.cn: 对，他还统一了文字。
example.py: Duì, tā hái tǒngyīle wénzì.
example.translation: That's right. He also standardized the written script.

记载.definition: to put down in writing, to record; record, account

example.cn: 中国是世界文明古国之一，有文字记载的历史就有四千多年。
example.py: Zhōngguó shì shìjiè wénmíng gǔguó zhī yī, yǒu wénzì jìzǎi de lìshǐ jiù yǒu sìqiān duō nián.
example.translation: China is one of the world's ancient civilizations, with a recorded history of over four thousand years.

example.cn: 丽莎这个学期除了中文课以外还选了一门中国历史课。中国是世界文明古国之一，有文字记载的历史就有四千多年。为了对中国历史有更多的了解，她请李文带她去中国国家博物馆参观。张天明和柯林对中国历史也有兴趣，听说丽莎要参观博物馆，也要跟着一起去。李文很高兴地答应了。
example.py: Lìshā zhè ge xuéqī chúle Zhōngwén kè yǐwài hái xuǎn le yī mén Zhōngguó lìshǐ kè Zhōngguó shì shìjiè wénmíng gǔguó zhī yī yǒu wénzì jìzǎi de lìshǐ jiù yǒu sì qiān duō nián wèile duì Zhōngguó lìshǐ yǒu gèng duō de liǎojiě tā qǐng Lǐ Wén dài tā qù Zhōngguó guójiā bówùguǎn cānguān Zhāng Tiānmíng hé Kē Lín duì Zhōngguó lìshǐ yě yǒu xìngqù tīngshuō Lìshā yào cānguān bówùguǎn yě yào gēnzhe yīqǐ qù Lǐ Wén hěn gāoxìng de dāying le
example.translation: This semester, besides Chinese, Lisa also took a course on Chinese history. China is one of the world's ancient civilizations, with a recorded history of over four thousand years. To understand Chinese history better, she asked Li Wen to take her to the National Museum of China. Zhang Tianming and Ke Lin are also interested in Chinese history. Hearing that Lisa was going to visit the museum, they wanted to go along, too. Li Wen happily agreed.

其中.definition: among which/whom, in which/whom, of which/whom

example.cn: 中国国家博物馆很大，中国历史只是其中的一部分。李文建议今天只看几个朝代，以后再慢慢参观。丽莎他们觉得这个建议很好。
example.py: zhōng guó guó jiā bó wù guǎn hěn dà zhōng guó lì shǐ zhǐ shì qí zhōng de yī bù fen lǐ wén jiàn yì jīn tiān zhǐ kàn jǐ ge cháo dài yǐ hòu zài màn màn cān guān lì shā tā men jué de zhè ge jiàn yì hěn hǎo
example.translation: The National Museum of China is very large, and the exhibit of Chinese history is only one part of it. Li Wen suggested that they only look at a few dynasties today and visit the rest slowly later. Lisa and the others thought this was a great suggestion.

example.cn: 中国国家博物馆很大，中国历史只是其中的一部分。
example.py: Zhōngguó guójiā bówùguǎn hěn dà, Zhōngguó lìshǐ zhǐshì qízhōng de yí bùfen.
example.translation: The National Museum of China is very large, and the exhibit of Chinese history is only one part of it.

example.cn: 秦朝时间不长，下一个重要的朝代是汉朝。汉朝在政治、经济各个方面都有很大的发展。汉族这个名字就是从汉朝来的。
example.py: qín cháo shíjiān bù cháng xià yí ge zhòngyào de cháodài shì hàn cháo hàn cháo zài zhèngzhì jīngjì gège fāngmiàn dōu yǒu hěn dà de fāzhǎn hànzú zhège míngzi jiù shì cóng hàn cháo lái de
example.translation: The Qin dynasty was not long. The next important dynasty is the Han dynasty. The Han dynasty made great advances in politics, economics, and in every other field. The name of the Han ethnic group comes from the Han dynasty.

example.cn: 孔子是中国历史上最伟大的教育家和思想家，到现在对中国教育还有很大的影响。
example.py: Kǒngzǐ shì Zhōngguó lìshǐ shang zuì wěidà de jiàoyùjiā hé sīxiǎngjiā, dào xiànzài duì Zhōngguó jiàoyù háiyǒu hěn dà de yǐngxiǎng.
example.translation: Confucius is the greatest educator and thinker in Chinese history. He still has a great influence on Chinese education today.

example.cn: 对。孔子是中国历史上最伟大的教育家和思想家，到现在对中国教育还有很大的影响。
example.py: duì kǒng zǐ shì zhōng guó lì shǐ shàng zuì wěi dà de jiào yù jiā hé sī xiǎng jiā dào xiàn zài duì zhōng guó jiào yù hái yǒu hěn dà de yǐng xiǎng
example.translation: Correct. Confucius is the greatest educator and thinker in Chinese history. He still has a great influence on Chinese education today.

example.cn: 现在我们来到了秦朝的展厅。
example.py: Xiànzài wǒmen lái dào le Qíncháo de zhǎntīng.
example.translation: We are now in the Qin dynasty exhibition hall.

example.cn: 秦始皇是中国的第一个皇帝。
example.py: Qínshǐhuáng shì Zhōngguó de dì yī ge huángdì.
example.translation: Qin Shihuang was the first emperor of China.

统一.definition: to unify, to unite; unified, centralized

example.cn: 我的历史老师说秦始皇对统一中国有很大的贡献。
example.py: wǒ de lìshǐ lǎoshī shuō Qínshǐhuáng duì tǒngyī Zhōngguó yǒu hěn dà de gòngxiàn
example.translation: My history teacher said that Qin Shihuang made a great contribution to the unification of China.

example.cn: 我的历史老师说秦始皇对统一中国有很大的贡献。
example.py: Wǒ de lìshǐ lǎoshī shuō Qín Shǐhuáng duì tǒngyī Zhōngguó yǒu hěn dà de gòngxiàn.
example.translation: My history teacher said that Qin Shihuang made a great contribution to the unification of China.

example.cn: 还让老百姓修长城。
example.py: Hái ràng lǎobǎixìng xiū Chángchéng.
example.translation: He also made the common people build the Great Wall.

example.cn: 他杀了几百个读书人，烧了很多古书，是吗？
example.py: Tā shā le jǐ bǎi gè dú shū rén, shāo le hěn duō gǔ shū, shì ma?
example.translation: He killed several hundred scholars and burned many ancient books, right?

烧.definition: to burn, to set fire to, to cook

example.cn: 他杀了几百个读书人，烧了很多古书，是吗？
example.py: Tā shā le jǐ bǎi gè dú shū rén, shāo le hěn duō gǔ shū, shì ma?
example.translation: He killed several hundred scholars and burned many ancient books, right?

example.cn: 他还让很多很多人给他修宫殿、修坟墓。
example.py: Tā hái ràng hěn duō hěn duō rén gěi tā xiū gōngdiàn, xiū fénmù.
example.translation: He also made many, many people build palaces and his tomb for him.

example.cn: 他还让很多很多人给他修宫殿、修坟墓。
example.py: Tā hái ràng hěn duō hěn duō rén gěi tā xiū gōngdiàn, xiū fénmù.
example.translation: He also made many, many people build palaces and his tomb for him.

example.cn: 你们看，这就是秦始皇的兵马俑，他死了以后还让这么多“兵马”保护他。
example.py: Nǐmen kàn, zhè jiùshì Qínshǐhuáng de bīngmǎyǒng, tā sǐle yǐhòu hái ràng zhème duō “bīngmǎ” bǎohù tā.
example.translation: Look, these are the terracotta warriors of the First Emperor of Qin. After he died, he still had this many “soldiers and horses” protect him.

example.cn: 对，造纸、火药发明得较早。活字印刷是宋朝发明的，指南针也在宋朝发展到了很高的水平。
example.py: duì zào zhǐ huǒ yào fā míng de jiào zǎo huó zì yìn shuā shì sòng cháo fā míng de zhǐ nán zhēn yě zài sòng cháo fā zhǎn dào le hěn gāo de shuǐ píng
example.translation: Right. Papermaking and gunpowder were invented relatively early. Movable-type printing was invented in the Song dynasty, and the compass also reached a very advanced stage of development during the Song.

example.cn: “丝绸之路”也跟汉朝有关系吧？
example.py: “Sīchóu zhī Lù” yě gēn Hàncháo yǒu guānxì ba?
example.translation: The “Silk Road” is also related to the Han dynasty, right?

example.cn: “丝绸之路”也跟汉朝有关系吧？
example.py: sī chóu zhī lù yě gēn hàn cháo yǒu guānxi ba
example.translation: The “Silk Road” is also related to the Han dynasty, right?

进行.definition: to carry on, to carry out, to conduct

example.cn: 对，跟西方进行贸易是从汉朝开始的。
example.py: duì gēn xīfāng jìnxíng màoyì shì cóng hàncháo kāishǐ de
example.translation: That's right. Trade with the West began in the Han dynasty.

example.cn: 跟西方进行贸易是从汉朝开始的。
example.py: Gēn Xīfāng jìnxíng màoyì shì cóng Hàncháo kāishǐ de.
example.translation: Trade with the West began in the Han dynasty.

example.cn: 我学过李白的诗。
example.py: Wǒ xuéguo Lǐ Bái de shī.
example.translation: I've studied Li Bai's poems.

example.cn: 李白是唐朝最有名的诗人之一。
example.py: Lǐ Bái shì Tángcháo zuì yǒumíng de shīrén zhī yī.
example.translation: Li Bai is one of the most famous poets of the Tang dynasty.

example.cn: 那时因为唐朝经济、文化非常发达，所以很多外国留学生来留学。
example.py: nàshí yīnwèi Tángcháo jīngjì, wénhuà fēicháng fādá, suǒyǐ hěn duō wàiguó liúxuéshēng lái liúxué.
example.translation: because the Tang dynasty's economy and culture were very developed at that time, many international students came to study.

example.cn: 在历史上，中国科学技术曾经是很先进的。
example.py: zài lìshǐ shang, Zhōngguó kēxué jìshù céngjīng shì hěn xiānjìn de.
example.translation: historically, China's science and technology were once very advanced.

曾经.definition: once; at some time in the past

example.cn: 在历史上，中国科学技术曾经是很先进的。
example.py: zài lìshǐ shang, Zhōngguó kēxué jìshù céngjīng shì hěn xiānjìn de.
example.translation: historically, China's science and technology were once very advanced.

example.cn: 在历史上，中国科学技术曾经是很先进的。
example.py: Zài lìshǐ shang, Zhōngguó kēxué jìshù céngjīng shì hěn xiānjìn de.
example.translation: Did you know that, historically, China's science and technology were once very advanced?

example.cn: 你是说四大发明吗？
example.py: Nǐ shì shuō sì dà fāmíng ma?
example.translation: Are you talking about the Four Great Inventions?

example.cn: 我知道，是造纸、火药、指南针、活字印刷。
example.py: Wǒ zhīdào, shì zàozhǐ, huǒyào, zhǐnánzhēn, huózì yìnshuā.
example.translation: I know. They are papermaking, gunpowder, the compass, and movable-type printing.

example.cn: 对，造纸、火药发明得较早。
example.py: Duì, zàozhǐ, huǒyào fāmíng de jiào zǎo.
example.translation: Right. Papermaking and gunpowder were invented relatively early.

example.cn: 活字印刷是宋朝发明的，指南针也在宋朝发展到了很高的水平。
example.py: Huózì yìnshuā shì Sòngcháo fāmíng de, zhǐnánzhēn yě zài Sòngcháo fāzhǎn dào le hěn gāo de shuǐpíng.
example.translation: Movable-type printing was invented in the Song dynasty, and the compass also reached a very advanced stage of development during the Song.

example.cn: 活字印刷是宋朝发明的，指南针也在宋朝发展到了很高的水平。
example.py: Huózì yìnshuā shì Sòngcháo fāmíng de, zhǐnánzhēn yě zài Sòngcháo fāzhǎn dào le hěn gāo de shuǐpíng.
example.translation: Movable-type printing was invented in the Song dynasty, and the compass also reached a very advanced stage of development during the Song.

领导.definition: to lead; leadership, leader (lit. to lead and guide)

example.cn: 因为一九一一年孙中山领导革命，一九一二年建立了中华民国，就再也没有皇帝了。
example.py: yīnwèi yī jiǔ yī yī nián Sūn Zhōngshān lǐngdǎo gémìng yī jiǔ yī èr nián jiànlì le Zhōnghuá Mínguó jiù zàiyě méiyǒu huángdì le
example.translation: Because Sun Yat-sen led the revolution in 1911, and the Republic of China was established in 1912, so there were no more emperors.

example.cn: 因为一九一一年孙中山领导革命，一九一二年建立了中华民国，就再也没有皇帝了。
example.py: Yīnwèi yījiǔyīyī nián Sūn Zhōngshān lǐngdǎo gémìng, yījiǔyī'èr nián jiànlìle Zhōnghuá Mínguó, jiù zài yě méiyǒu huángdì le.
example.translation: Because Sun Yat-sen led the revolution in 1911, and the Republic of China was established in 1912, so there were no more emperors.

example.cn: 因为一九一一年孙中山领导革命，一九一二年建立了中华民国，就再也没有皇帝了。
example.py: Yīnwèi yījiǔyīyī nián Sūn Zhōngshān lǐngdǎo gémìng, yījiǔyī'èr nián jiànlìle Zhōnghuá Mínguó, jiù zài yě méiyǒu huángdì le.
example.translation: Because Sun Yat-sen led the revolution in 1911, and the Republic of China was established in 1912, so there were no more emperors.

example.cn: 孔子是中国历史上最伟大的教育家和思想家，到现在对中国教育还有很大的影响。
example.py: Kǒngzǐ shì Zhōngguó lìshǐ shang zuì wěidà de jiàoyùjiā hé sīxiǎngjiā, dào xiànzài duì Zhōngguó jiàoyù hái yǒu hěn dà de yǐngxiǎng.
example.translation: Confucius is the greatest educator and thinker in Chinese history. He still has a great influence on Chinese education today.

example.cn: 现在我们来到了秦朝的展厅。
example.py: Xiànzài wǒmen láidào le Qíncháo de zhǎntīng.
example.translation: We are now in the Qin dynasty exhibition hall.

秦始皇.definition: First Emperor of the Qin dynasty

example.cn: 秦始皇是中国的第一个皇帝。
example.py: Qínshǐhuáng shì Zhōngguó de dì yī ge huángdì.
example.translation: Qin Shihuang was the first emperor of China.

example.cn: 秦朝时间不长，下一个重要的朝代是汉朝。
example.py: Qíncháo shíjiān bù cháng, xià yí ge zhòngyào de cháodài shì Hàncháo.
example.translation: The Qin dynasty was not long. The next important dynasty is the Han dynasty.

example.cn: 对，跟西方进行贸易是从汉朝开始的。
example.py: Duì, gēn Xīfāng jìnxíng màoyì shì cóng Hàncháo kāishǐ de.
example.translation: That's right. Trade with the West began in the Han dynasty.

example.cn: 你们看，我们来到唐朝了。
example.py: Nǐmen kàn, wǒmen láidào Tángcháo le.
example.translation: Look, we've come to the Tang dynasty.

example.cn: 李白是唐朝最有名的诗人之一。
example.py: Lǐ Bái shì Tángcháo zuì yǒumíng de shīrén zhī yī.
example.translation: Li Bai is one of the most famous poets of the Tang dynasty.

example.cn: 活字印刷是宋朝发明的，指南针也在宋朝发展到了很高的水平。
example.py: Huózì yìnshuā shì Sòngcháo fāmíng de, zhǐnánzhēn yě zài Sòngcháo fāzhǎn dàole hěn gāo de shuǐpíng.
example.translation: Movable-type printing was invented in the Song dynasty, and the compass also reached a very advanced stage of development during the Song.

example.cn: 我们现在来到中国最后一个朝代：清朝。
example.py: Wǒmen xiànzài láidào Zhōngguó zuìhòu yí ge cháodài: Qīngcháo.
example.translation: We've now come to China's last dynasty: the Qing dynasty.

example.cn: 因为一九一一年孙中山领导革命，一九一二年建立了中华民国，就再也没有皇帝了。
example.py: Yīnwèi yījiǔyīyī nián Sūn Zhōngshān lǐngdǎo gémìng, yījiǔyī'èr nián jiànlìle Zhōnghuá Mínguó, jiù zài yě méiyǒu huángdìle.
example.translation: Because Sun Yat-sen led the revolution in 1911, and the Republic of China was established in 1912, so there were no more emperors.

example.cn: 因为一九一一年孙中山领导革命，一九一二年建立了中华民国，就再也没有皇帝了。
example.py: Yīnwèi yījiǔyīyī nián Sūn Zhōngshān lǐngdǎo gémìng, yījiǔyī'èr nián jiànlìle Zhōnghuá Mínguó, jiù zài yě méiyǒu huángdìle.
example.translation: Because Sun Yat-sen led the revolution in 1911, and the Republic of China was established in 1912, so there were no more emperors.

example.cn: 21世纪初以来,中国的经济有了很大的发展,不少跨国公司进入中国。
example.py: 21 Shìjì chū yǐlái, Zhōngguó de jīngjì yǒule hěn dà de fāzhǎn, bùshǎo kuàguó gōngsī jìnrù Zhōngguó.
example.translation: Since the beginning of the 21st century, China's economy has developed greatly, and many multinational corporations have entered China.

example.cn: 21世纪初以来,中国的经济有了很大的发展,不少跨国公司进入中国。
example.py: 21 Shìjì chū yǐlái, Zhōngguó de jīngjì yǒule hěn dà de fāzhǎn, bùshǎo kuàguó gōngsī jìnrù Zhōngguó.
example.translation: Since the beginning of the 21st century, China's economy has developed greatly, and many multinational corporations have entered China.

example.cn: 21世纪初以来,中国的经济有了很大的发展,不少跨国公司进入中国。
example.py: 21 Shìjì chū yǐlái, Zhōngguó de jīngjì yǒule hěn dà de fāzhǎn, bùshǎo kuàguó gōngsī jìnrù Zhōngguó.
example.translation: Since the beginning of the 21st century, China's economy has developed greatly, and many multinational corporations have entered China.

吸引.definition: to attract, to draw, to fascinate

example.cn: 这些大公司吸引了世界各地不少的人材,包括一些在国外学习毕业的中国留学生。
example.py: Zhèxiē dà gōngsī xīyǐnle shìjiè gèdì bùshǎo de réncái, bāokuò yīxiē zài guówài xuéxí bìyè de Zhōngguó liúxuéshēng.
example.translation: These large companies have attracted a lot of talent from all over the world, including some Chinese students who graduated from their studies abroad.

example.cn: 这些大公司吸引了世界各地不少的人材,包括一些在国外学习毕业的中国留学生。
example.py: Zhèxiē dà gōngsī xīyǐnle shìjiè gèdì bùshǎo de réncái, bāokuò yīxiē zài guówài xuéxí bìyè de Zhōngguó liúxuéshēng.
example.translation: These large companies have attracted a lot of talent from all over the world, including some Chinese students who graduated from their studies abroad.

example.cn: 这些大公司吸引了世界各地不少的人材,包括一些在国外学习毕业的中国留学生。
example.py: Zhèxiē dà gōngsī xīyǐnle shìjiè gèdì bùshǎo de réncái, bāokuò yīxiē zài guówài xuéxí bìyè de Zhōngguó liúxuéshēng.
example.translation: These large companies have attracted a lot of talent from all over the world, including some Chinese students who graduated from their studies abroad.

example.cn: 他们从海外归来,被叫做“海归”。
example.py: Tāmen cóng hǎiwài guīlái, bèi jiàozuò “hǎiguī”.
example.translation: They return from overseas and are called 'haigui' (returnees).

example.cn: 他们从海外归来,被叫做“海归”。
example.py: Tāmen cóng hǎiwài guīlái, bèi jiàozuò “hǎiguī”.
example.translation: They return from overseas and are called 'haigui' (returnees).

叫做.definition: to be called, to be known as

example.cn: 他们从海外归来,被叫做“海归”。
example.py: Tāmen cóng hǎiwài guīlái, bèi jiàozuò “hǎiguī”.
example.translation: They return from overseas and are called 'haigui' (returnees).

example.cn: 有的人还开玩笑地把他们叫做“海龟”。
example.py: Yǒu de rén hái kāiwánxiào de bǎ tāmen jiàozuò “hǎiguī”.
example.translation: Some people even jokingly call them 'haigui' (sea turtles).

满意.definition: to be satisfied, to be pleased

example.cn: 她去过几家公司实习,但是都不太满意。
example.py: Tā qùguo jǐ jiā gōngsī shíxí, dànshì dōu bú tài mǎnyì.
example.translation: She had interned at several companies but was not very satisfied.

example.cn: 雪梅回到中国以后不久,就开始上网查资料、找工作。她去过几家公司实习,但是都不太满意。昨天有一家她非常喜欢的大公司叫她今天上午去面试销售经理的工作。面试以后,刚回到家里就接到丽莎的电话。
example.py: xuě méi huí dào zhōng guó yǐ hòu bù jiǔ jiù kāi shǐ shàng wǎng chá zī liào zhǎo gōng zuò tā qù guo jǐ jiā gōng sī shí xí dàn shì dōu bú tài mǎn yì zuó tiān yǒu yì jiā tā fēi cháng xǐ huan de dà gōng sī jiào tā jīn tiān shàng wǔ qù miàn shì xiāo shòu jīng lǐ de gōng zuò miàn shì yǐ hòu gāng huí dào jiā lǐ jiù jiē dào lì shā de diàn huà
example.translation: Not long after Xuemei returned to China, she started searching for information and looking for a job online. She had interned at several companies but was not very satisfied. Yesterday, a large company she really liked called her to interview for a sales manager position this morning. After the interview, she had just gotten home when she received a call from Lisha.

example.cn: 昨天有一家她非常喜欢的大公司叫她今天上午去面试销售经理的工作。
example.py: Zuótiān yǒu yī jiā tā fēicháng xǐhuān de dà gōngsī jiào tā jīntiān shàngwǔ qù miànshì xiāoshòu jīnglǐ de gōngzuò.
example.translation: Yesterday, a large company she really liked called her to interview for a sales manager position this morning.

套装.definition: suit, a set of matching outer garments

example.cn: 哈,开始有些紧张,出了好多汗,套装的上衣都快湿了。
example.py: Hā, kāishǐ yǒuxiē jǐnzhāng, chūle hǎoduō hàn, tàozhuāng de shàngyī dōu kuài shī le.
example.translation: Ha, I was a bit nervous at the beginning. I sweated so much that the top of my suit was almost wet.

example.cn: 哈,开始有些紧张,出了好多汗,套装的上衣都快湿了。
example.py: hā kāishǐ yǒuxiē jǐnzhāng chū le hǎoduō hàn tàozhuāng de shàngyī dōu kuài shī le
example.translation: Ha, I was a bit nervous at the beginning. I sweated so much that the top of my suit was almost wet.

example.cn: 套装的上衣都快湿了。
example.py: Tàozhuāng de shàngyī dōu kuài shī le.
example.translation: the top of my suit was almost wet.

干吗.definition: why, why on earth, whatever for

example.cn: 你已经不是第一次面试了,干吗那么紧张?
example.py: Nǐ yǐjīng bú shì dì yī cì miànshì le, gànmá nàme jǐnzhāng?
example.translation: This isn't your first interview, why were you so nervous?

example.cn: 给我面试的是他们公司的总经理,挺严肃的。
example.py: Gěi wǒ miànshì de shì tāmen gōngsī de zǒngjīnglǐ, tǐng yánsù de.
example.translation: The person who interviewed me was the company's general manager. He was quite stern.

example.cn: 给我面试的是他们公司的总经理,挺严肃的。
example.py: Gěi wǒ miànshì de shì tāmen gōngsī de zǒngjīnglǐ, tǐng yánsù de.
example.translation: The person who interviewed me was the company's general manager. He was quite stern.

example.cn: 这个总经理可真的挺吓人的!
example.py: Zhège zǒngjīnglǐ kě zhēnde tǐng xiàrén de!
example.translation: This general manager is really scary!

example.cn: 我越紧张就越解释不清楚。
example.py: Wǒ yuè jǐnzhāng jiù yuè jiěshì bù qīngchu.
example.translation: The more nervous I got, the less clearly I explained myself.

example.cn: 我越紧张就越解释不清楚。后来我突然想出了一个主意,什么也不说了,从包里拿出两张纸,放到他前面。他一看,脸上马上阴转多云了。
example.py: wǒ yuè jǐn zhāng jiù yuè jiě shì bù qīng chu hòu lái wǒ tū rán xiǎng chū le yí ge zhǔ yi shén me yě bù shuō le cóng bāo lǐ ná chū liǎng zhāng zhǐ fàng dào tā qián miàn tā yí kàn liǎn shàng mǎ shàng yīn zhuǎn duō yún le
example.translation: The more nervous I got, the less clearly I explained myself. Later, I suddenly had an idea. I stopped talking, took two pieces of paper out of my bag, and placed them in front of him. As soon as he saw them, his face immediately brightened up.

转.definition: to turn, to shift, to change

example.cn: 我越紧张就越解释不清楚。后来我突然想出了一个主意,什么也不说了,从包里拿出两张纸,放到他前面。他一看,脸上马上阴转多云了。
example.py: wǒ yuè jǐn zhāng jiù yuè jiě shì bù qīng chu hòu lái wǒ tū rán xiǎng chū le yí ge zhǔ yi shén me yě bù shuō le cóng bāo lǐ ná chū liǎng zhāng zhǐ fàng dào tā qián miàn tā yí kàn liǎn shàng mǎ shàng yīn zhuǎn duō yún le
example.translation: The more nervous I got, the less clearly I explained myself. Later, I suddenly had an idea. I stopped talking, took two pieces of paper out of my bag, and placed them in front of him. As soon as he saw them, his face immediately brightened up.

example.cn: 我越紧张就越解释不清楚。后来我突然想出了一个主意,什么也不说了,从包里拿出两张纸,放到他前面。他一看,脸上马上阴转多云了。
example.py: wǒ yuè jǐn zhāng jiù yuè jiě shì bù qīng chu hòu lái wǒ tū rán xiǎng chū le yí ge zhǔ yi shén me yě bù shuō le cóng bāo lǐ ná chū liǎng zhāng zhǐ fàng dào tā qián miàn tā yí kàn liǎn shàng mǎ shàng yīn zhuǎn duō yún le
example.translation: The more nervous I got, the less clearly I explained myself. Later, I suddenly had an idea. I stopped talking, took two pieces of paper out of my bag, and placed them in front of him. As soon as he saw them, his face immediately brightened up.

example.cn: 是加州的两家公司五月寄给我的录用通知。总经理看了接着问:“既然你在美国公司找到了工作,为什么还要回中国工作呢?”
example.py: shì jiā zhōu de liǎng jiā gōng sī wǔ yuè jì gěi wǒ de lù yòng tōng zhī zǒng jīng lǐ kàn le jiē zhe wèn jì rán nǐ zài měi guó gōng sī zhǎo dào le gōng zuò wèi shén me hái yào huí zhōng guó gōng zuò ne
example.translation: They were job offer letters sent to me in May by two companies in California. After the general manager looked at them, he then asked: 'Since you found a job in an American company, why did you still want to come back to China to work?'

录用.definition: to take someone on staff, to employ

example.cn: 是加州的两家公司五月寄给我的录用通知。总经理看了接着问:“既然你在美国公司找到了工作,为什么还要回中国工作呢?”
example.py: shì jiā zhōu de liǎng jiā gōng sī wǔ yuè jì gěi wǒ de lù yòng tōng zhī zǒng jīng lǐ kàn le jiē zhe wèn jì rán nǐ zài měi guó gōng sī zhǎo dào le gōng zuò wèi shén me hái yào huí zhōng guó gōng zuò ne
example.translation: They were job offer letters sent to me in May by two companies in California. After the general manager looked at them, he then asked: 'Since you found a job in an American company, why did you still want to come back to China to work?'

example.cn: 是加州的两家公司五月寄给我的录用通知。总经理看了接着问:“既然你在美国公司找到了工作,为什么还要回中国工作呢?”
example.py: shì jiā zhōu de liǎng jiā gōng sī wǔ yuè jì gěi wǒ de lù yòng tōng zhī zǒng jīng lǐ kàn le jiē zhe wèn jì rán nǐ zài měi guó gōng sī zhǎo dào le gōng zuò wèi shén me hái yào huí zhōng guó gōng zuò ne
example.translation: They were job offer letters sent to me in May by two companies in California. After the general manager looked at them, he then asked: 'Since you found a job in an American company, why did you still want to come back to China to work?'

example.cn: 既然你在美国公司找到了工作,为什么还要回中国工作呢?
example.py: Jìrán nǐ zài Měiguó gōngsī zhǎodào le gōngzuò, wèishénme hái yào huí Zhōngguó gōngzuò ne?
example.translation: Since you found a job in an American company, why did you still want to come back to China to work?

example.cn: 是加州的两家公司五月寄给我的录用通知。总经理看了接着问:“既然你在美国公司找到了工作,为什么还要回中国工作呢?”
example.py: shì jiā zhōu de liǎng jiā gōng sī wǔ yuè jì gěi wǒ de lù yòng tōng zhī zǒng jīng lǐ kàn le jiē zhe wèn jì rán nǐ zài měi guó gōng sī zhǎo dào le gōng zuò wèi shén me hái yào huí zhōng guó gōng zuò ne
example.translation: They were job offer letters sent to me in May by two companies in California. After the general manager looked at them, he then asked: 'Since you found a job in an American company, why did you still want to come back to China to work?'

example.cn: 那你是怎么回答的?
example.py: Nà nǐ shì zěnme huídá de?
example.translation: So how did you answer?

example.cn: 我要是这样说,他很可能会以为我在中国找工作,只是短期打算。
example.py: Wǒ yàoshi zhèyàng shuō, tā hěn kěnéng huì yǐwéi wǒ zài Zhōngguó zhǎo gōngzuò, zhǐshì duǎnqī dǎsuàn.
example.translation: If I said that, he would probably think I was only planning to work in China for a short term.

example.cn: 好在这个时候我已经不紧张了。
example.py: Hǎozài zhège shíhou wǒ yǐjīng bù jǐnzhāng le.
example.translation: Fortunately, I wasn't nervous anymore by then.

example.cn: 我就从中国经济发展,谈到他们公司的产品,再谈产品的销售,然后解释为什么希望去他们公司工作。
example.py: Wǒ jiù cóng Zhōngguó jīngjì fāzhǎn, tán dào tāmen gōngsī de chǎnpǐn, zài tán chǎnpǐn de xiāoshòu, ránhòu jiěshì wèishéme xīwàng qù tāmen gōngsī gōngzuò.
example.translation: I started by talking about China's economic development, then about their company's products, and then about product sales, and finally explained why I wanted to work for their company.

example.cn: 我要是这样说,他很可能会以为我在中国找工作,只是短期打算。好在这个时候我已经不紧张了。我就从中国经济发展,谈到他们公司的产品,再谈产品的销售,然后解释为什么希望去他们公司工作。总经理听着听着,脸上多云转晴了。
example.py: wǒ yàoshi zhèyàng shuō tā hěn kěnéng huì yǐwéi wǒ zài Zhōngguó zhǎo gōngzuò zhǐshì duǎnqī dǎsuàn hǎozài zhège shíhou wǒ yǐjīng bù jǐnzhāng le wǒ jiù cóng Zhōngguó jīngjì fāzhǎn tándào tāmen gōngsī de chǎnpǐn zài tán chǎnpǐn de xiāoshòu ránhòu jiěshì wèishénme xīwàng qù tāmen gōngsī gōngzuò zǒngjīnglǐ tīngzhe tīngzhe liǎnshang duōyún zhuǎn qíng le
example.translation: If I said that, he would probably think I was only planning to work in China for a short term. Fortunately, I wasn't nervous anymore by then. I started by talking about China's economic development, then about their company's products, and then about product sales, and finally explained why I wanted to work for their company. As the general manager listened, his face gradually cleared up.

example.cn: 你觉得自己最大的缺点是什么？
example.py: Nǐ juéde zìjǐ zuìdà de quēdiǎn shì shénme?
example.translation: What do you think is your biggest weakness?

example.cn: 哈,我觉得,你最大的缺点就是爱吃零食。
example.py: Hā, wǒ juéde, nǐ zuìdà de quēdiǎn jiùshì ài chī língshí.
example.translation: Ha, I think your biggest weakness is that you love to eat snacks.

善于.definition: to be good at, to be adept in

example.cn: 善于工作的人往往也是善于休息的,我在这方面还很不够。
example.py: shànyú gōngzuò de rén wǎngwǎng yěshì shànyú xiūxi de, wǒ zài zhè fāngmiàn hái hěn bùgòu.
example.translation: People who are good at work are often also good at resting, and I'm not quite good enough in this aspect.

example.cn: 善于工作的人往往也是善于休息的,我在这方面还很不够。
example.py: shànyú gōngzuò de rén wǎngwǎng yěshì shànyú xiūxi de, wǒ zài zhè fāngmiàn hái hěn bùgòu.
example.translation: People who are good at work are often also good at resting, and I'm not quite good enough in this aspect.

加班.definition: to work overtime, to work extra shifts

example.cn: 实习的时候,我工作一有压力就熬夜加班。
example.py: Shíxí de shíhou, wǒ gōngzuò yī yǒu yālì jiù áoyè jiābān.
example.translation: During my internship, whenever I was under pressure, I would stay up late and work overtime.

example.cn: 我又说,只要我们能把缺点变成优点,缺点就没那么可怕了。说到这儿,总经理站起来,一边跟我握手,一边笑着说,他相信我的能力,让我等他们的好消息。
example.py: wǒ yòu shuō zhǐyào wǒmen néng bǎ quēdiǎn biànchéng yōudiǎn quēdiǎn jiù méi nàme kěpà le shuōdào zhèr zǒngjīnglǐ zhàn qǐlái yìbiān gēn wǒ wòshǒu yìbiān xiào zhe shuō tā xiāngxìn wǒ de nénglì ràng wǒ děng tāmen de hǎo xiāoxi
example.translation: I added, as long as we can turn our weaknesses into strengths, weaknesses are not so terrible. At this point, the general manager stood up, shook my hand, and said with a smile that he believed in my abilities and told me to wait for their good news.

example.cn: 我又说,只要我们能把缺点变成优点,缺点就没那么可怕了。
example.py: Wǒ yòu shuō, zhǐyào wǒmen néng bǎ quēdiǎn biànchéng yōudiǎn, quēdiǎn jiù méi nàme kěpà le.
example.translation: I added, as long as we can turn our weaknesses into strengths, weaknesses are not so terrible.

握手.definition: to shake hands, to clasp hands

example.cn: 我又说,只要我们能把缺点变成优点,缺点就没那么可怕了。说到这儿,总经理站起来,一边跟我握手,一边笑着说,他相信我的能力,让我等他们的好消息。
example.py: wǒ yòu shuō zhǐyào wǒmen néng bǎ quēdiǎn biànchéng yōudiǎn quēdiǎn jiù méi nàme kěpà le shuōdào zhèr zǒngjīnglǐ zhàn qǐlái yìbiān gēn wǒ wòshǒu yìbiān xiào zhe shuō tā xiāngxìn wǒ de nénglì ràng wǒ děng tāmen de hǎo xiāoxi
example.translation: I added, as long as we can turn our weaknesses into strengths, weaknesses are not so terrible. At this point, the general manager stood up, shook my hand, and said with a smile that he believed in my abilities and told me to wait for their good news.

example.cn: 我又说,只要我们能把缺点变成优点,缺点就没那么可怕了。说到这儿,总经理站起来,一边跟我握手,一边笑着说,他相信我的能力,让我等他们的好消息。
example.py: wǒ yòu shuō zhǐyào wǒmen néng bǎ quēdiǎn biànchéng yōudiǎn quēdiǎn jiù méi nàme kěpà le shuōdào zhèr zǒngjīnglǐ zhàn qǐlái yìbiān gēn wǒ wòshǒu yìbiān xiào zhe shuō tā xiāngxìn wǒ de nénglì ràng wǒ děng tāmen de hǎo xiāoxi
example.translation: I added, as long as we can turn our weaknesses into strengths, weaknesses are not so terrible. At this point, the general manager stood up, shook my hand, and said with a smile that he believed in my abilities and told me to wait for their good news.

example.cn: 雪梅面试后，那家公司通知她下周开始上班。
example.py: Xuěméi miànshì hòu, nà jiā gōngsī tōngzhī tā xià zhōu kāishǐ shàngbān.
example.translation: After Xuemei's interview, the company notified her to start work next week.

聚会.definition: to get together, to congregate; party, get-together, social gathering

example.cn: 雪梅和柯林都很高兴，他们决定请朋友们到雪梅住的地方来聚会，庆祝一下。
example.py: Xuěméi hé Kē Lín dōu hěn gāoxìng, tāmen juédìng qǐng péngyoumen dào Xuěméi zhù de dìfang lái jùhuì, qìngzhù yíxià.
example.translation: Xuemei and Ke Lin were very happy, and they decided to invite their friends to a party at Xuemei's place to celebrate.

example.cn: 今天我们大家聚在一起，是为了给李哲接风，给天明和丽莎饯行，也庆祝雪梅找到工作。
example.py: Jīntiān wǒmen dàjiā jù zài yìqǐ, shì wèile gěi Lǐ Zhé jiēfēng, gěi Tiānmíng hé Lìshā jiànxíng, yě qìngzhù Xuěméi zhǎodào gōngzuò.
example.translation: Today we're all gathered together to welcome Li Zhe, to send off Tianming and Lisha, and also to celebrate Xuemei finding a job.

接受.definition: to accept, to take on, to undertake

example.cn: 他接受了天明的建议，到一家跨国公司来实习。
example.py: Tā jiēshòu le Tiānmíng de jiànyì, dào yī jiā kuàguó gōngsī lái shíxí.
example.translation: He accepted Tianming's suggestion to intern at a multinational company.

接风.definition: to host a welcome meal for a visitor from afar

example.cn: 今天我们大家聚在一起，是为了给李哲接风，给天明和丽莎饯行，也庆祝雪梅找到工作。
example.py: Jīntiān wǒmen dàjiā jù zài yīqǐ, shì wèile gěi Lǐ Zhé jiēfēng, gěi Tiānmíng hé Lìshā jiànxíng, yě qìngzhù Xuěméi zhǎodào gōngzuò.
example.translation: Today we're all gathered together to welcome Li Zhe, to send off Tianming and Lisha, and also to celebrate Xuemei finding a job.

example.cn: 张天明和丽莎很快就要回美国了，所以这次聚会也是给他们饯行的晚会。
example.py: Zhāng Tiānmíng hé Lìshā hěn kuài jiù yào huí Měiguó le, suǒyǐ zhè cì jùhuì yě shì gěi tāmen jiànxíng de wǎnhuì.
example.translation: Zhang Tianming and Lisha will be returning to the US soon, so this gathering is also a farewell party for them.

example.cn: 来的客人除了天明、丽莎、李哲外，还有李文和马克。
example.py: Lái de kèrén chúle Tiānmíng, Lìshā, Lǐ Zhé wài, hái yǒu Lǐ Wén hé Mǎkè.
example.translation: Besides Tianming, Lisha, and Li Zhe, the guests who came also included Li Wen and Mark.

example.cn: 柯林去超市买了很多饮料、零食和水果。雪梅准备了一个火锅，还从附近的一家餐馆叫了外卖。
example.py: Kē Lín qù chāoshì mǎi le hěn duō yǐnliào língshí hé shuǐguǒ Xuěméi zhǔnbèi le yí ge huǒguō hái cóng fùjìn de yì jiā cānguǎn jiào le wàimài
example.translation: Ke Lin went to the supermarket and bought a lot of drinks, snacks, and fruit. Xuemei prepared a hot pot and also ordered takeout from a nearby restaurant.

聚.definition: to gather, to get together, to congregate

example.cn: 今天我们大家聚在一起，是为了给李哲接风，给天明和丽莎饯行，也庆祝雪梅找到工作。
example.py: Jīntiān wǒmen dàjiā jù zài yìqǐ, shì wèile gěi Lǐ Zhé jiēfēng, gěi Tiānmíng hé Lìshā jiànxíng, yě qìngzhù Xuěméi zhǎodào gōngzuò.
example.translation: Today we're all gathered together to welcome Li Zhe, to send off Tianming and Lisha, and also to celebrate Xuemei finding a job.

出差.definition: to be away on business or on a business trip

example.cn: 下个星期一，星期五就要到欧洲出差，推销太阳能板和节能电池。
example.py: Xià ge xīngqīyī, xīngqīwǔ jiù yào dào Ōuzhōu chū chāi, tuīxiāo tàiyángnéng bǎn hé jiénéng diànchí.
example.translation: Next Monday. And on Friday, I have to go on a business trip to Europe to promote solar panels and energy-saving batteries.

推销.definition: to market, to promote the sale (of goods/ merchandise)

example.cn: 下个星期一，星期五就要到欧洲出差，推销太阳能板和节能电池。
example.py: Xià ge xīngqīyī, xīngqīwǔ jiù yào dào Ōuzhōu chū chāi, tuīxiāo tàiyángnéng bǎn hé jiénéng diànchí.
example.translation: Next Monday. And on Friday, I have to go on a business trip to Europe to promote solar panels and energy-saving batteries.

example.cn: 下个星期一，星期五就要到欧洲出差，推销太阳能板和节能电池。
example.py: xià ge xīngqīyī xīngqīwǔ jiù yào dào ōuzhōu chūchāi tuīxiāo tàiyángnéng bǎn hé jiénéng diànchí
example.translation: Next Monday. And on Friday, I have to go on a business trip to Europe to promote solar panels and energy-saving batteries.

example.cn: 柯林去超市买了很多饮料、零食和水果。雪梅准备了一个火锅，还从附近的一家餐馆叫了外卖。
example.py: Kē Lín qù chāoshì mǎi le hěn duō yǐnliào língshí hé shuǐguǒ Xuěméi zhǔnbèi le yí ge huǒguō hái cóng fùjìn de yì jiā cānguǎn jiào le wàimài
example.translation: Ke Lin went to the supermarket and bought a lot of drinks, snacks, and fruit. Xuemei prepared a hot pot and also ordered takeout from a nearby restaurant.

example.cn: 这是我们美国大学的校友，李哲，刚从美国来。
example.py: Zhè shì wǒmen Měiguó dàxué de xiàoyǒu, Lǐ Zhé, gāng cóng Měiguó lái.
example.translation: This is our university alumnus from the US, Li Zhe. He just came from the States.

关照.definition: to take care of, to look after

example.cn: 大家好！请多关照。
example.py: Dàjiā hǎo! Qǐng duō guānzhào.
example.translation: Hello everyone! Please look after me.

example.cn: 那我们不就是同事了吗？
example.py: Nà wǒmen bù jiùshì tóngshì le ma?
example.translation: Then aren't we colleagues?

example.cn: 我是个“自由”职业者，当过英文家教，演过电视剧，还拍过广告，有时候也搞点儿翻译。
example.py: wǒ shì ge zìyóu zhíyèzhě dāng guo Yīngwén jiājiào yǎn guo diànshìjù hái pāi guo guǎnggào yǒu shíhou yě gǎo diǎnr fānyì
example.translation: I'm a 'freelancer'. I've been an English tutor, acted in TV dramas, and also been in commercials. Sometimes I do a bit of translation.

example.cn: 我是个“自由”职业者,当过英文家教,演过电视剧,还拍过广告,有时候也搞点儿翻译。
example.py: wǒ shì ge zì yóu zhí yè zhě dāng guo yīng wén jiā jiào yǎn guo diàn shì jù hái pāi guo guǎng gào yǒu shí hou yě gǎo diǎnr fān yì
example.translation: I'm a 'freelancer.' I've been an English tutor, acted in TV dramas, and filmed commercials. Sometimes I also do some translation.

example.cn: 我看过你演的电视剧。
example.py: Wǒ kànguo nǐ yǎn de diànshìjù.
example.translation: I've seen the TV drama you were in.

搞.definition: to do, to carry on, to be engaged in

example.cn: 我是个“自由”职业者，当过英文家教，演过电视剧，还拍过广告，有时候也搞点儿翻译。
example.py: wǒ shì ge zìyóu zhíyèzhě dāng guo Yīngwén jiājiào yǎn guo diànshìjù hái pāi guo guǎnggào yǒu shíhou yě gǎo diǎnr fānyì
example.translation: I'm a 'freelancer'. I've been an English tutor, acted in TV dramas, and also been in commercials. Sometimes I do a bit of translation.

example.cn: 我说怎么有点儿面熟呢，我看过你演的电视剧。
example.py: Wǒ shuō zěnme yǒudiǎnr miànshú ne, wǒ kànguò nǐ yǎn de diànshìjù.
example.translation: I was wondering why you look a bit familiar. I've seen the TV drama you were in.

example.cn: 不过是三流演员而已。
example.py: Búguò shì sānliú yǎnyuán éryǐ.
example.translation: I'm just a third-rate actor, that's all.

example.cn: 不过是三流演员而已。
example.py: búguò shì sānliú yǎnyuán éryǐ
example.translation: I'm just a third-rate actor, that's all.

稳定.definition: stable, steady; to stabilize, to be steady

example.cn: 说白了，实际上是工作有点儿不稳定。
example.py: Shuō bái le, shíjìshang shì gōngzuò yǒudiǎnr bù wěndìng.
example.translation: To be frank, the work is a bit unstable.

example.cn: 李哲，你哥哥的朋友真不简单啊，这么年轻就当上总经理了。
example.py: Lǐ Zhé, nǐ gēge de péngyou zhēn bù jiǎndān a, zhème niánqīng jiù dāngshàng zǒngjīnglǐ le.
example.translation: Li Zhe, your brother's friend is really something, becoming a general manager at such a young age.

example.cn: 当然。在这里，我每天都会看到、听到新鲜的事，永远也写不完。
example.py: dāngrán zài zhèlǐ wǒ měitiān dōu huì kàndào tīngdào xīnxiān de shì yǒngyuǎn yě xiě bu wán
example.translation: Of course. Here, every day I see and hear new things. I'll never run out of things to write about.

放心.definition: to feel relieved, to be at ease

example.cn: 听了你们的话，我放心多了。
example.py: Tīngle nǐmen de huà, wǒ fàngxīn duō le.
example.translation: After hearing what you all said, I feel much more relieved.

联系.definition: to contact, to get in touch; connection, relation

example.cn: 现在外国人来中国发展，中国人到国外学习、工作，大家的联系多了，关系近了，世界变小了。
example.py: Xiànzài wàiguó rén lái Zhōngguó fāzhǎn, Zhōngguó rén dào guówài xuéxí, gōngzuò, dàjiā de liánxì duō le, guānxì jìn le, shìjiè biàn xiǎo le.
example.translation: Nowadays, foreigners come to China to develop their careers, and Chinese people go abroad to study and work. Everyone's connections have increased, relationships have gotten closer, and the world has become smaller.

联系.definition: to contact, to get in touch; connection, relation (lit. to combine and tie)

example.cn: 现在外国人来中国发展,中国人到国外学习、工作,大家的联系多了,关系近了,世界变小了。
example.py: xiànzài wàiguórén lái Zhōngguó fāzhǎn, Zhōngguórén dào guówài xuéxí、gōngzuò, dàjiā de liánxì duō le, guānxi jìn le, shìjiè biàn xiǎo le.
example.translation: Now foreigners come to China to develop their careers, and Chinese people go abroad to study and work. Everyone's connections have increased, relationships have gotten closer, and the world has gotten smaller.

example.cn: 朋友们，来，大家举起杯来，为我们的友谊干杯！
example.py: Péngyoumen, lái, dàjiā jǔ qǐ bēi lái, wèi wǒmen de yǒuyì gānbēi!
example.translation: Friends, come, let's raise our glasses and toast to our friendship!

example.cn: 下个星期一，星期五就要到欧洲出差，推销太阳能板和节能电池。
example.py: Xià ge xīngqīyī, xīngqīwǔ jiù yào dào Ōuzhōu chūchāi, tuīxiāo tàiyángnéng bǎn hé jiénéng diànchí.
example.translation: Next Monday. And on Friday, I have to go on a business trip to Europe to promote solar panels and energy-saving batteries.
